name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: Stripping the legal avenue to right wrongs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voters desperately need a " private right to action " to protect their rights. All that phrase means is that we, the people, can bring forward a lawsuit ourselves when we see wrongdoing in our elections.
These 8th Circuit decisions strip us of that -- in a world where most legal action around voting rights comes from groups like ours and our partners, not from the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ). And we've got at least these four years of DOJ's Civil Rights division facing internal attacks from a hostile presidential administration that doesn't just believe conspiracy theories, but spreads them.
There's so much at risk, Team. RUSH $25 or more right now so we have the resources we need to fight rulings like this one and protect our right to vote across the country >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=3AXbqZ1hS4M9QqTLJcUDbrBTLR6MKixVtWNXMxjGzuWkxDi+Bh0u5QJtdDJhw4lZKFxMGU2JzYNWm/Di09bbKOW1Qy/OENnuabGRhE1Xtfg=]
Democracy Docket: New Ruling Cuts Off Key Tool to Protect Minority Voters [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=3AXbqZ1hS4M9QqTLJcUDbrBTLR6MKixVtWNXMxjGzuWkxDi+Bh0u5QJtdDJhw4lZKFxMGU2JzYNWm/Di09bbKOW1Qy/OENnuabGRhE1Xtfg=]
Folks: An update from the federal 8th Circuit on one of the most dangerous anti-voter rulings we’ve seen in years .
A federal appeals court this week cut off a key avenue for private groups and individuals to bring racial discrimination claims under the Voting Rights Act (VRA). The ruling, which applies in seven states, further weakens the ability of our civil rights law to protect voters, and could lead to the Supreme Court settling the issue.
This goes back to an initial ruling from 2023, the impact of which is pretty simple to understand: That voters and voting rights organizations can no longer sue to overturn unjust laws under the Voting Rights Act. According to the 8th Circuit, and now confirmed on appeal, only the Department of Justice (DoJ) has the legal standing to sue states over voting laws.
With former Florida AG Pam Bondi -- a "big lie" spreading MAGA acolyte -- serving as Attorney General, it's clear that the DOJ is not going to protect voting rights over the next four years.
Team, we have to fight this ruling and make sure voters and advocacy groups have the right to defend voting rights in court. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can to make every vote count, either at the ballot box or in court >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=15&amtOpts=&recurringAm=15&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=poJrXLK-IDpmeWR9QmosfRHJu_brkMqo86pbDhfs6iQ=&contactdata=3AXbqZ1hS4M9QqTLJcUDbrBTLR6MKixVtWNXMxjGzuWkxDi+Bh0u5QJtdDJhw4lZKFxMGU2JzYNWm/Di09bbKOW1Qy/OENnuabGRhE1Xtfg=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25&amtOpts=&recurringAm=25&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=poJrXLK-IDpmeWR9QmosfRHJu_brkMqo86pbDhfs6iQ=&contactdata=3AXbqZ1hS4M9QqTLJcUDbrBTLR6MKixVtWNXMxjGzuWkxDi+Bh0u5QJtdDJhw4lZKFxMGU2JzYNWm/Di09bbKOW1Qy/OENnuabGRhE1Xtfg=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=50&amtOpts=&recurringAm=50&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=poJrXLK-IDpmeWR9QmosfRHJu_brkMqo86pbDhfs6iQ=&contactdata=3AXbqZ1hS4M9QqTLJcUDbrBTLR6MKixVtWNXMxjGzuWkxDi+Bh0u5QJtdDJhw4lZKFxMGU2JzYNWm/Di09bbKOW1Qy/OENnuabGRhE1Xtfg=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=100&amtOpts=&recurringAm=100&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=poJrXLK-IDpmeWR9QmosfRHJu_brkMqo86pbDhfs6iQ=&contactdata=3AXbqZ1hS4M9QqTLJcUDbrBTLR6MKixVtWNXMxjGzuWkxDi+Bh0u5QJtdDJhw4lZKFxMGU2JzYNWm/Di09bbKOW1Qy/OENnuabGRhE1Xtfg=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=250&amtOpts=&recurringAm=250&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=poJrXLK-IDpmeWR9QmosfRHJu_brkMqo86pbDhfs6iQ=&contactdata=3AXbqZ1hS4M9QqTLJcUDbrBTLR6MKixVtWNXMxjGzuWkxDi+Bh0u5QJtdDJhw4lZKFxMGU2JzYNWm/Di09bbKOW1Qy/OENnuabGRhE1Xtfg=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=3AXbqZ1hS4M9QqTLJcUDbrBTLR6MKixVtWNXMxjGzuWkxDi+Bh0u5QJtdDJhw4lZKFxMGU2JzYNWm/Di09bbKOW1Qy/OENnuabGRhE1Xtfg=]
This is all about the legal term "private right of action". The 8th Circuit says it doesn't exist. That means the pro-voting lawsuits we've seen in states like Wisconsin, Georgia, Florida, and others nationwide wouldn't be possible anymore if the Supreme Court backs up this ruling.
We won’t sugarcoat this: This could be a crushing blow to many voting rights organizations across the country, ourselves included. If this new appellate ruling is not overturned by the Supreme Court, it could unravel all of the great work pro-voting organizations are doing across the country — and allow dozens of unjust, unconstitutional voter restrictions to stand.
Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. As voter suppression laws become increasingly targeted and oppressive , our work to combat them must become smarter, stronger, and more accessible to everyone.
We can't do this alone. Help defend our right to vote with $25 or however much you can today and make every voice heard in our elections >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=3AXbqZ1hS4M9QqTLJcUDbrBTLR6MKixVtWNXMxjGzuWkxDi+Bh0u5QJtdDJhw4lZKFxMGU2JzYNWm/Di09bbKOW1Qy/OENnuabGRhE1Xtfg=]

Why Marlene? Here are just a few of the many reasons we need to send her to Congress:
* **Marlene is ready to bring new leadership to AZ-01.** She’s lived in Arizona for 36 years and raised her kids here, and unlike David Schweikert, she hasn’t lost sight of the everyday needs of Arizona families. She’d also be the first Latina to represent Arizona in Congress!
* **Marlene has won similar fights throughout her career.** We’re seeing unprecedented corruption in Washington, and who better to expose it than a former broadcast journalist who took on the powerful every day? She will fight to hold Donald Trump accountable and defend our Constitution.
* **Marlene has the support of grassroots Arizona donors, top leaders like Attorney General Kris Mayes and former Governor Janet Napolitano, and groups like EMILYs List and BOLD PAC.** Arizonans and all sorts of folks who know what it takes to get the job done are backing Marlene, and we hope you will too!

name: Team AOTL
subject: A blueprint for states’ voting laws
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
This coordinated attack on democracy is escalating. That’s why we need your help.
|
---

Peter,
_**Imagine this**_ : You’re excited to register to vote and make your voice heard in an upcoming election — just to find out, rather than a typical ID, you may also need an original copy of your birth certificate.
Unfortunately, this could be the reality for millions of Americans. **That’s because the SAVE Act,** which passed in the House of Representatives in April **and is now before the Senate** , would require documentary proof of citizenship in person. That means you’d likely have to take time out of your work day to travel to your county’s election office with an original birth certificate or valid U.S. passport for anyone registering to vote for the first time or updating their registration.
The SAVE Act would almost _**instantly**_ disenfranchise millions of Americans. Don’t have a passport? Lost your original documents in a move or a natural disaster? Got married and changed your last name? Exercising your right to vote suddenly becomes more difficult.
All On The Line is not sitting on the sidelines. When the SAVE Act was introduced in the House, we organized supporters like you to make our stance clear, and collectively, we sent thousands of messages to Congress urging representatives to vote NO. Now, before it moves to a vote in the Senate, we’re continuing to mobilize voters across the entire country to reject one of the most _dangerous threats to voting rights in decades_ — and we need your help.
**Let’s defend free and fair elections so we can build a truly representative democracy — this work is only made possible by grassroots supporters like you.[Will you donate now to help ramp up our efforts against the SAVE Act and other efforts to take power away from voters?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107999498/546534876/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_SAVESen_email_20250519-AOTL-Tier1-SAVESen_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250519-AOTL-Tier1-SAVESen_&utm_campaign=SAVESen&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwMjljNDc2LTBmMzUtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jZj8-gG5vOu6V3TaJIaNkZJsv4nHemGlHNHxEETtA3o=)**

Here’s the thing Peter: Unfortunately, we can’t stop there even if we defeat this legislation in the Senate. Some states are using the SAVE Act as a blueprint to attack the right to vote.
**IN OHIO...**
❗A proposed bill would require documentary proof of citizenship, meaning you’d likely ONLY be able to register to vote or update your registration directly with the county in person. This would end voter registration drives and online voter registration.
❗Ballot drop boxes would be banned, eliminating accessible voting options, leading to long lines and a lengthy process to return ballots in person.
❗If you end up voting through a provisional ballot and fail to provide “proper” documentation afterward, your registration would be automatically canceled.
**IN WYOMING...**
❗A bill would require anyone registering to vote to present documentary proof of U.S. citizenship. Once again, this is a hardship for many — as replacing original documentation or obtaining a passport can be _extremely_ costly and time-consuming.
**IN TEXAS...**
❗A bill currently being considered would create proof of citizenship requirements for both voter registration applicants _AND_ existing registered voters.
❗It would even create new criminal penalties for election officials for errors in citizenship verification.
**We are witnessing a coordinated attack on democracy at the state and federal levels. It’s not surprising, but it is deeply un-American. This is a moment that requires strong defenders of democracy to step forward and take action.**
_That’s exactly why we’re here, and why we need you alongside us._
**[Your contributions help fuel our critical grassroots efforts to fight back against anti-democracy legislation wherever it crops up. Make a donation of $15 or more today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107999506/546534938/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_SAVESen_email_20250519-AOTL-Tier1-SAVESen_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250519-AOTL-Tier1-SAVESen_&utm_campaign=SAVESen&express_lane=true&amount=15&emci=5c736b69-f734-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a029c476-0f35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&contactdata=QwtNBAtHIfPqYRABwYw+dCAHRV8d/hUBfR+sqH13MJw5aKa/4/xxJ/VPaY6Ky+2puY86+dutIclneKjFdUiqJ2+FKx9nCHMUPokQ2xIipEupXEX9nXXVDNp8KOCg6E5gvYKYQDbZ44yi2pZIzXbnCA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwMjljNDc2LTBmMzUtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jZj8-gG5vOu6V3TaJIaNkZJsv4nHemGlHNHxEETtA3o=)**

clean_body: This coordinated attack on democracy is escalating. That’s why we need your help. | Peter, Imagine this : You’re excited to register to vote and make your voice heard in an upcoming election — just to find out, rather than a typical ID, you may also need an original copy of your birth certificate. Unfortunately, this could be the reality for millions of Americans. That’s because the SAVE Act, which passed in the House of Representatives in April and is now before the Senate , would require documentary proof of citizenship in person. That means you’d likely have to take time out of your work day to travel to your county’s election office with an original birth certificate or valid U.S. passport for anyone registering to vote for the first time or updating their registration. The SAVE Act would almost instantly disenfranchise millions of Americans. Don’t have a passport? Lost your original documents in a move or a natural disaster? Got married and changed your last name? Exercising your right to vote suddenly becomes more difficult. All On The Line is not sitting on the sidelines. When the SAVE Act was introduced in the House, we organized supporters like you to make our stance clear, and collectively, we sent thousands of messages to Congress urging representatives to vote NO. Now, before it moves to a vote in the Senate, we’re continuing to mobilize voters across the entire country to reject one of the most dangerous threats to voting rights in decades — and we need your help. Let’s defend free and fair elections so we can build a truly representative democracy — this work is only made possible by grassroots supporters like you.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Here’s the thing Peter: Unfortunately, we can’t stop there even if we defeat this legislation in the Senate. Some states are using the SAVE Act as a blueprint to attack the right to vote. IN OHIO... ❗A proposed bill would require documentary proof of citizenship, meaning you’d likely ONLY be able to register to vote or update your registration directly with the county in person. This would end voter registration drives and online voter registration. ❗Ballot drop boxes would be banned, eliminating accessible voting options, leading to long lines and a lengthy process to return ballots in person. ❗If you end up voting through a provisional ballot and fail to provide “proper” documentation afterward, your registration would be automatically canceled. IN WYOMING... ❗A bill would require anyone registering to vote to present documentary proof of U.S. citizenship. Once again, this is a hardship for many — as replacing original documentation or obtaining a passport can be extremely costly and time-consuming. IN TEXAS... ❗A bill currently being considered would create proof of citizenship requirements for both voter registration applicants AND existing registered voters. ❗It would even create new criminal penalties for election officials for errors in citizenship verification. We are witnessing a coordinated attack on democracy at the state and federal levels. It’s not surprising, but it is deeply un-American. This is a moment that requires strong defenders of democracy to step forward and take action. That’s exactly why we’re here, and why we need you alongside us. = Thank you, The AOTL Team is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. # [ACTION ALERT: VOTE YES ON HB 4076 AND HB 4535](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU0ODc1MTAwNjc3NTM5ODIxLFwiclwiOjE1NDg3NTEyNTEzNjYyMzE2OX0iLCJzIjoiZGVlYzk2YTVmNWUwODNlZSJ9 "ACTION ALERT: VOTE YES ON HB 1586, HB 4076 AND HB 4535 AND VOTE NO ON HB 3540")
|
---
HB 4076 by Representative Jeff Leach, sponsored in the Senate by Senator Lois Kolkhorst, would prohibit the denial of organ transplantation based solely on the organ recipient’s vaccination status.

HB 4535 by Representative John McQueeney, sponsored in the Senate by Senator Kelly Hancock, would require that vaccinators receive written informed consent prior to administering a COVID vaccine, and authorizes the development of an “information sheet” for COVID jabs that includes information on the risks and lack of safety testing for this particular shot.
**Both bills are being heard in the Senate HHS Committee TOMORROW, Tuesday, May 20.** TAKE ACTION NOW BY URGING MEMBERS OF THE HHS COMMITTEE TO SUPPORT THESE GOOD BILLS! **1- Email the Committee Members**

name: Katie Porter
subject: Trump cabinet secretary trading stocks… again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39737%2E3422442%2Eia8Emw)
Dear Derek,
Last week, ProPublica reported that Attorney General Pam Bondi sold more than $1 million in stock the day Trump’s tariff announcement crashed the market.
Today, ProPublica is out with a new report that Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy sold stocks just a couple days before Trump announced his “reciprocal” tariffs.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250519_2_ak?refcode=em20250519-39737&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39737_3422442_ia8Emw&akid=39737%2E3422442%2Eia8Emw)
**To quote Taylor Swift: “I think I’ve seen this film before, and I didn’t like the ending.”**
I’m tired of high-ranking government officials betraying the public trust by trading stocks while they’re in office. This keeps happening again and again, and nothing changes.
**When I was in Congress, I spearheaded legislation to crack down on top-level officials trading individual stocks.** In my political work, I would only endorse Congressional candidates who would commit to banning Congressmembers from trading stocks.
We deserve leaders who uphold the highest ethical standards and avoid any actions that would even give the appearance of a conflict of interest. Every single government official can choose to do this (and of course, the president should lead by setting a good example)—and if they won’t, Congress needs to step up.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250519_2_ak?refcode=em20250519-39737&refcode2=39737_3422442_ia8Emw&akid=39737%2E3422442%2Eia8Emw)
—Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250519-39737&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39737_3422442_ia8Emw&akid=39737%2E3422442%2Eia8Emw)**

In my political work, I would only endorse Congressional candidates who would commit to banning Congressmembers from trading stocks. We deserve leaders who uphold the highest ethical standards and avoid any actions that would even give the appearance of a conflict of interest. Every single government official can choose to do this (and of course, the president should lead by setting a good example)—and if they won’t, Congress needs to step up. —Katie Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

name: Right Street Journal
subject: RSJ: Top Ten Stories for May 19, 2025
body:
---
# Right Street Journal: Top Ten Stories
Each week, _Right Street Journal_ delivers ten handpicked stories shaping America's future -- from Capitol Hill to your hometown.
1. **Fox News: White House Warns 9 Million Could Lose Health Insurance if Trump 's Budget Bill Fails**
The White House released an analysis this week warning that up to 9.2 million Americans could lose health coverage if Congress fails to pass President Trump's latest budget proposal. The administration is emphasizing the consequences of gridlock, warning of a ripple effect on hospitals, rural clinics, and the broader economy.
[https://www.foxnews.com/politics/wh-study-warns-9-million-americans...](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/J892UupLatWlnTtYXFJhGv2g/PDyMucN0eTtAtrf6XuKL7Q)
2. **Daily Wire: Top Business Leaders Celebrate Trump 's Economic Success in Middle East**
Business leaders across the oil and defense sectors praised President Trump for delivering a slew of investment deals during his Middle East tour. Executives highlighted job creation, trade momentum, and strengthened geopolitical ties as indicators of an American-led energy renaissance abroad.
[https://www.dailywire.com/news/top-business-leaders-jubilant...](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/98927639cqJSHD22bG83ZBdLjA/PDyMucN0eTtAtrf6XuKL7Q)
3. **Breitbart: Executives Praise Trump After Trillions in Middle East Deals**
President Trump's recent trip to the Middle East secured over $2 trillion in commercial agreements, ranging from defense contracts to technology sharing. Industry leaders say the administration is reasserting U.S. economic dominance globally, even as domestic political battles intensify.
[https://www.breitbart.com/politics/2025/05/17/executives-laud-trump...](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/2gwt892gTQJPNqQHZrMTtOoQ/PDyMucN0eTtAtrf6XuKL7Q)
4. **Washington Examiner: J.D. Vance Leads 2028 GOP Primaries as Harris and Buttigieg Lag**
In early polling for the 2028 presidential election, Senator J.D. Vance leads the Republican field with strong support in the Midwest and South. On the Democratic side, Kamala Harris and Pete Buttigieg face declining favorability, opening the door for new challengers.
[https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/washington-secrets/3412235...](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/763rOlfbdcgFlZM742j892vvSQ/PDyMucN0eTtAtrf6XuKL7Q)
5. **The Federalist: New Solicitor General Targets Nationwide Injunctions at Supreme Court**
D. John Sauer, recently appointed Solicitor General, is preparing arguments to challenge the widespread use of nationwide injunctions by federal judges. Conservative legal scholars argue such rulings overstep constitutional boundaries and distort the separation of powers.
[https://thefederalist.com/2025/05/14/new-solicitor-general-prepares...](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/82DeqGxDmKVkMSLFU9ONvA/PDyMucN0eTtAtrf6XuKL7Q)
6. **Fox News: Trump Administration Fires Top U.S. Copyright Official**
In a continuation of agency shakeups, the Trump administration has dismissed the Register of Copyrights, Shira Perlmutter, just days after firing the Librarian of Congress. The White House cites a need for "fresh leadership aligned with modern innovation goals."
[https://www.foxnews.com/politics/trump-admin-fires-top-us-copyright...](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/UXrSzAb8TGa9NXXxtvAVQA/PDyMucN0eTtAtrf6XuKL7Q)
7. **Daily Wire: DOJ Redirects Funds from Transgender Grants to Law Enforcement**
The Department of Justice announced it will reallocate grant funding previously intended for transgender outreach programs to support local police departments and border enforcement. Conservatives hail the move as a reprioritization of core public safety needs.
[https://www.dailywire.com/news/exclusive-trump-justice-department...](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/iLNVKU3BLVSkGyPIhTqLfA/PDyMucN0eTtAtrf6XuKL7Q)
8. **Breitbart: Trump Announces Lifting of Sanctions on Syria**
In a surprise announcement, President Trump declared an end to longstanding U.S. sanctions on Syria, stating that the policy reversal will open doors for reconstruction and diminish Russian and Iranian leverage in the region.
[https://www.breitbart.com/news/u-s-to-remove-brutal-and-crippling-sanctions-on-syria/](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/L4JRjcpP69fFswYfbC8NZg/PDyMucN0eTtAtrf6XuKL7Q)
9. **Washington Examiner: Smartmatic Faces Legal Setback in New York Court**
A New York court dismissed multiple defamation claims filed by voting machine firm Smartmatic against Fox News, weakening the company's efforts to seek large-scale damages. The ruling marks a turning point in the legal battles surrounding 2020 election coverage.
[https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/3409871/smartmatic-bribery-fox-news...](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/nmbVG0kFLwgHGhZxgqcmig/PDyMucN0eTtAtrf6XuKL7Q)
10. **The Federalist: Biden 's Prostate Cancer Diagnosis Draws Bipartisan Support**
News of former President Joe Biden's prostate cancer diagnosis has prompted an outpouring of bipartisan support, including from President Trump, who posted well wishes on social media. Leaders from both parties praised Biden's decades of public service and wished him a full recovery.
[https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/3415361/harris-democrats-republicans...](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/l/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/R763hbHBDnzPNWWFzQZv7ojQ/PDyMucN0eTtAtrf6XuKL7Q)

[View web version](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/w/SA2g8e0zvnmRykSlCcaPiQ/qpCKE7lHKU3q3CtQeeqFLA/PDyMucN0eTtAtrf6XuKL7Q) [Unsubscribe here](https://contact.rightstreetjournal.com/unsubscribe/zwuMrrCbT0qcQZbpAps9UkSIzlemtxdlw5K8MlTk763D4/qpCKE7lHKU3q3CtQeeqFLA/PDyMucN0eTtAtrf6XuKL7Q)

At key junctures **we were outfought by the far-right for control of the Supreme Court** and now we are forced to live with the consequences of rulings like today's and the 2022 Dobbs decision that stripped women of their right to choose.

MAGA might not have gotten such a hold on the Supreme Court, Presidency, and Congress if Democratic state Supreme Courts had been able to stop gerrymandering of congressional and state legislative districts.

**Our comeback starts at the state level.** In 2018, the PA Supreme Court threw out unfair maps drawn by Republicans and drew their own fair maps. As a result PA remains a swing and has competitive Congressional races...

But the PA Supreme Court is now under assault. clean_body: At key junctures we were outfought by the far-right for control of the Supreme Court. | | Peter, Merely three days after last week's much needed win in which the Supreme Court shot down Trump's attempt to use the Alien Sedition Act to conduct mass deportations and suspend habeas corpus... We were delivered a crushing blow today on a different migrant case. The Supreme Court has ruled that hundreds of thousands of Venezuelans in America legally will be stripped of their protected status : | At key junctures we were outfought by the far-right for control of the Supreme Court and now we are forced to live with the consequences of rulings like today's and the 2022 Dobbs decision that stripped women of their right to choose. MAGA might not have gotten such a hold on the Supreme Court, Presidency, and Congress if Democratic state Supreme Courts had been able to stop gerrymandering of congressional and state legislative districts. Our comeback starts at the state level. In 2018, the PA Supreme Court threw out unfair maps drawn by Republicans and drew their own fair maps. As a result PA remains a swing and has competitive Congressional races... But the PA Supreme Court is now under assault. MAGA is attempting to remove Democratic justices from the PA Supreme court this 2025. Losing this fight means losing PA as a swing state forever, and more Dem defeats at every level, which is why Defend our Court is ringing the alarm bells. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: There's still time on the clock to mount a comeback and it starts with defending the Democratic majority in the PA Supreme Court. Team Defend Our Courts | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | | Sent via . name: Bryan
subject: May 19 Campaign Update
body:
I'm working to put America first. Here is some of the work I've been doing to get our nation back on track.

| | | | | [|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=63d6a292cf&e=e907534017)
| | | | | **May 19, 2025**
---
| Here’s an update from our campaign:
---
| | | | | This week in Washington, I am working to enact the conservative reforms you sent me to Congress to secure.
The House is slated to vote on critical legislation this week. As part of our work, we have targeted $1.5 trillion in savings through common-sense reforms to cut spending.

---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=6f64e92c21&e=e907534017)
|
The House is able to make these important reforms and still [**protect programs**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=7e9a7d1704&e=e907534017) for our seniors like Social Security and Medicare. We are also stopping a [**$4.5 trillion tax increase**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=7f12969d55&e=e907534017) that would cost the average Wisconsin family more than [**$1,500**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=0c458d3e0e&e=e907534017) each year.
Republicans are ready to deliver on our America First agenda.
---
|
# Listening to You
Last week, I asked you what you believe we should focus on in Washington over these next critical weeks. We had a great response and hundreds of participants.
If you haven’t already, be sure to [**share your views in the next 48 hours**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=7396b48963&e=e907534017)**** before our survey closes!
---
| [OFFICIAL SURVEY](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=402744fad7&e=e907534017)
---
|
# Milwaukee Judge Indicted
On Wednesday, Milwaukee Judge Hannah Dugan was [**indicted**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=8b7f0b5201&e=e907534017) by a federal jury for obstructing the arrest of an illegal alien, Eduardo Flores-Ruiz, charged with [**violent crimes.**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=23febd2b8c&e=e907534017)
---
| While many on the Left [**undermine**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5b05b23ea3&e=e907534017) our law enforcement officers and put public safety at risk, I will work with **President Trump** and support the men and women who keep our community safe and our border secure.
---
| [STAND WITH STEIL ➡️](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=199ce17fb3&e=e907534017)
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil
---
| [DONATE](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=cf44df631b&e=e907534017)
---
|
---
| | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/steilforwisconsin/march-14050623?e=e907534017)
Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. * PO Box 103 * Oak Creek, WI 53154-8618 * USA
[update your preferences](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&e=e907534017&c=e1555a553a) or [unsubscribe](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&t=b&e=e907534017&c=e1555a553a)
---
|

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Join Me to Save OMG from a Lawsuit Threatening Press Freedom
body:
On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, “Trump’s a sociopathic narcissist...I’m in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do” about Trump.

| [****](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zpd7994rnj144jglrd49kghkdomiua4723t889vg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj6aoj2c5h2bs)
[****](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zrqa74a60eu20gpmpgum7011ottjgo2d9ln5ap1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj6aoj2c5h2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, founder of O'Keefe Media Group (OMG), where we risk everything to expose corruption through undercover journalism.

Right now, we're facing a newly filed, **federal lawsuit that could destroy our mission and silence journalists everywhere** --[**and I need your help**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z59tr4k00dkfjpftjpg4etee27gp8a05n22e73h8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj6aoj2c5h2bs).

On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, "**_Trump 's a sociopathic narcissist_** _..._ I'm in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do" about Trump.

His baseless claims--defamation, fraud, wiretapping--**are meant to bankrupt us**.

As I told the Associated Press, "This is an attack against the First Amendment... the process is the punishment."

If Mannina's defamation claim wins, **it 's over for OMG**.

Our "American Swiper" program, which drives our exposes, could spark countless lawsuits from others we've exposed, ending our work.

**We have just 21 days from being served to hire top D.C. attorneys and respond, or we risk losing by default**.

Liberty Guard is hosting our legal defense fund, and [**I 'm asking you to join our fight with a donation today.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zukbnqmnjctq24coiongc0or4rbcfn50a2e8415o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj6aoj2c5h2bs)

Please donate today to stand with OMG and save press freedom.

More than ever, I need patriots like you to help respond by this 21-day deadline and keep the OMG alive and allow us to **keep fighting corruption with the truth**.

[**Your support will defend not just OMG but the right to fearless journalism.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z70itmqlpes5qjhc74sf0qk3gbk7o26f98hu6i88_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj6aoj2c5h2bs)

Join The Fight Today,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. We have 21 days to act, or the powerful win. [**Donate now to protect the First Amendment.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z8unuuospcs4ag8bp5t98m54v8csepoc9cogn300_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj6aoj2c5h2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z75ml2bplecifvcfd9q0a03vuk0eplfh8kofllv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj6aoj5c9h2bs)
---
| |
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9go5on6vspj42oo9ss2au2nq9u1msrtdtol191g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj6aoj5c9h2bs) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvgdt6c12gic9ln8m0lv3bllqmbj890p9bg4btv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj6aoj5c9h2bs)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Pop Acta Media | First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

subject: Join Me to Save OMG from a Lawsuit Threatening Press Freedom
body:
On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, “Trump’s a sociopathic narcissist...I’m in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do” about Trump.

| [****](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z06tvqqr60dag2i2ef5uva0m82en4bp620bvuh9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj66p36c5h2bs)
[****](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm5c85cd9fdkll0ervlkge63ijlpggm84h4kpia8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj66p36c5h2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, founder of O'Keefe Media Group (OMG), where we risk everything to expose corruption through undercover journalism.

Right now, we're facing a newly filed, **federal lawsuit that could destroy our mission and silence journalists everywhere** --[**and I need your help**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhkh37749e4gm48nqr7ei0tndolrus11g9mrfb58_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj66p36c5h2bs).

On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, "**_Trump 's a sociopathic narcissist_** _..._ I'm in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do" about Trump.

His baseless claims--defamation, fraud, wiretapping--**are meant to bankrupt us**.

As I told the Associated Press, "This is an attack against the First Amendment... the process is the punishment."

If Mannina's defamation claim wins, **it 's over for OMG**.

Our "American Swiper" program, which drives our exposes, could spark countless lawsuits from others we've exposed, ending our work.

**We have just 21 days from being served to hire top D.C. attorneys and respond, or we risk losing by default**.

Liberty Guard is hosting our legal defense fund, and [**I 'm asking you to join our fight with a donation today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zovbtc44dmkkgk018c7qgbjnj3arl7631is3auf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj66p36c5h2bs)

Please donate today to stand with OMG and save press freedom.

More than ever, I need patriots like you to help respond by this 21-day deadline and keep the OMG alive and allow us to **keep fighting corruption with the truth**.

[**Your support will defend not just OMG but the right to fearless journalism.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zip3o8m3u8eo3j8tpd7496f4kogvmn4ii0rkqjtg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj66p36c5h2bs)

Join The Fight Today,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. We have 21 days to act, or the powerful win. [**Donate now to protect the First Amendment.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg2fjvqs7ebmqnoq74jiecp4d4tf3kf2mihl6ppg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj66p36c5h2bs)

body:

I'm James O'Keefe, founder of O'Keefe Media Group (OMG), where we risk everything to expose corruption through undercover journalism.

Right now, we're facing a newly filed, **federal lawsuit that could destroy our mission and silence journalists everywhere** --[**and I need your help**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0gqp8gqbompl8v9bklmcjuvvufit75dis6rplq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj69pr4cdh2bs).

His baseless claims--defamation, fraud, wiretapping--**are meant to bankrupt us**.

As I told the Associated Press, "This is an attack against the First Amendment... the process is the punishment."

If Mannina's defamation claim wins, **it 's over for OMG**.

Our "American Swiper" program, which drives our exposes, could spark countless lawsuits from others we've exposed, ending our work.

**We have just 21 days from being served to hire top D.C. attorneys and respond, or we risk losing by default**.

Liberty Guard is hosting our legal defense fund, and [**I 'm asking you to join our fight with a donation today.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2so1a98vut7lvjed9le5od20bm2maotdhfeqi60_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj69pr4cdh2bs)

[**Your support will defend not just OMG but the right to fearless journalism.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs5knl43l1kgau7s38un2jo9j39b96c6s9aqoikg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctj69pr4cdh2bs)

James O’Keefe

---
---
# Scared Yet? This Is Just The Beginning
---
# Wall Street Elites Are Manufacturing Billions Using Your Retirement
In the chaos of the recent crash, the media had their scapegoats ready.
* “It’s Trump’s fault!”
* “Trump’s tariffs caused this.”
* “Trump’s tariffs are putting the economy in jeopardy.”

They used fear to push millions of Americans into panic. They distracted you with headlines.

All, while Wall Street was staging one of the most blatant wealth grabs in modern history.

Hard-working people like you saw their retirement accounts shrink by the minute while the elites made billions with your 401(k) as their bait.

It’s the same script, over and over again, and you’re not supposed to notice.

You’re supposed to be too scared, too distracted, and too confused to take action with the power you have to save yourself.

| | | Peter,

President Trump's powerful joint address to Congress left the Democrats **REELING.** Their behavior was a stark reminder that they are entirely out of touch with the American people.

As President Trump honored American heroes, the Democrats sat in stunned silence, refusing to applaud for the very people they claim to represent. Steelworkers, farmers, grieving mothers, and a young boy battling brain cancer - all ignored by the Democrats.

* “It’s Trump’s fault!”

All, while Wall Street was staging one of the most blatant wealth grabs in modern history.

Hard-working people like you saw their retirement accounts shrink by the minute while the elites made billions with your 401(k) as their bait.

name: Team Evergreen
subject: Virtual Day of Action TODAY: Tell your reps to vote against the big, bad billionaire bill
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
We must save historic climate and clean energy investments
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3603360/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi—

As soon as this week, the House of Representatives could vote on President Trump and congressional Republicans’ signature legislation—the one we’ve been raising the alarm about that would give billionaires and corporate polluters trillions of dollars in tax breaks.

This is an **extremely serious attack** that could kneecap all the climate and clean energy progress we’ve made while hurting millions of working Americans across the country.

To fight back, we’re joining with Americans for Tax Progress, Public Citizen, and more for a **national call-in day TODAY** to light up the phone lines and make sure our representatives know we want them to sink this bill. [**Will you join us by making a quick phone call to your House Representative right now?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3603361/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[🗣️ MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3603362/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| **Here’s what else is at stake if this bill passes:** |
---
|
* Working Americans nationwide could lose access to popular clean energy programs that save us money on electricity costs and create good-paying jobs.
* Clean Air Act standards that limit the amount of pollution from cars and trucks could get rolled back, making the air we breathe less safe.
* Millions of Americans could lose access to healthcare and programs that help put food on the table for their families, if programs like Medicaid and SNAP get slashed.
* And, unfortunately, so much more.

|
---
| The good news is that we’ve already seen some splintering among Republicans during the committee stages of the bill, which means they have a slim majority and very little room for error to make their plan work. [**That’s why we need to put pressure on House Members NOW to vote NO.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3603363/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[📞 CALL YOUR REP NOW](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3603364/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| It may feel intimidating to get on the phone, but **every call you make matters and is closely tracked by Congressional offices.** If your representative is a Republican or on the fence, it can give them the push they need to vote for their constituents’ interests. And if your representative is a Democrat, it can provide the support they need to know they’re making the right call.

⏳ We have a short window of time to make our voices heard—to make as many calls as we possibly can and let our representatives know where we stand. [**I hope you’ll participate in this critical National Call-In Day with us today.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3603365/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
| Thanks for all that you do,

Team Evergreen |
---
| **P.S.** If you’ve already called, thank you. [**_You can actually call again!_**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3603366/87SdQ4wZ) And you can **forward this message to your friends and family** and ask them to take action to protect our climate and clean energy progress. |
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3603367/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/)
---
Follow Evergreen Action on Bluesky and LinkedIn.
---
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3603368/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3603369/87SdQ4wZ)
---|---
And follow our new project, **Hope This Helps.**

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Tell JD Vance to apologize for his tasteless response to Joe Biden’s cancer announcement
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell JD Vance to apologize for his tasteless response to Joe Biden’s cancer announcement](https://default.salsalabs.org/T050fbecd-474b-4d29-ac74-bef68de56ecb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e2a7965-79c7-4cf3-a47a-c37d8d6b3628/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The news about Joe Biden's cancer had barely broken, when JD Vance decided the world needed to be reminded of what a [colossal jerk](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17fb4d8c-dfb9-4451-9f37-6a5b197f545a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) he is. Instead of wishing Biden a full recovery, expressing sympathy, or doing any of the things that people who have a non-lizard heart do, Vance decided to spew conspiracy theories, [bash Biden](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta75aabb3-042f-41bf-b15d-9db501506aa4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), and go into full-on asshole mode. Even Trump gave an [appropriate response](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7345913c-bfea-4590-a037-1c3d7b134210/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). When you're a bigger asshole than Trump, that's an achievement. [**Add your name, and tell Vance to apologize.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T036007a8-18a5-428d-a857-60713bdfb5fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfffb2508-e39c-44bd-9b38-2b9075481461/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc1d10ab6-69a9-46a4-8c57-26656cff1413/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T42203509-2809-41f3-ab07-bb8663aec9d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: You lit this match
body:
You didn’t just believe in us. You built us.

| | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auuD/?__vbtrk=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, Recently, I shared the story of how this America First youth REVOLUTION all started with the supporters who got us there... In short, it all began in my garage, just me. But with a calling on my heart that said, _“Go fight for your country.”_ And I told these faithful supporters who’ve had our back all these years the story of what they helped build. **But now Friend... I’m asking you to join me in writing the next chapter in Turning Point USA’s fight to DEFEAT the Left in our cultural war over young Americans...** Because right now, we have a rare chance to take this movement to an entirely new level: **Every single gift made this month to Turning Point USA is being MATCHED, dollar-for-dollar, up to $2.5 MILLION!** That means: 🔥 Every student we reach → becomes TWO. 🔥 Every campus we travel to → becomes TWO. 🔥 YOUR impact for America → gets amplified TWICE as far.
---
[ **Join Turning Point USA &**
**DOUBLE Your Impact**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auuD/?__vbtrk=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
We are seeing something _extraordinary_ happen in this country... Students are rising. The crowds are swelling. The momentum is real. Just look at this:
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auuD/?__vbtrk=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
_And friend, it was patriots just like you who helped make this happen._ But the work is not done. Not even close.
---
[ **Join Turning Point USA &**
**DOUBLE Your Impact**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auuD/?__vbtrk=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Thank you — in advance — for taking a stand and never giving up on this generation. And most of all, thank you for fighting alongside us to save our great nation! For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auuD/?__vbtrk=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
**P.S.** Forwarded to you below is the FULL STORY of how our game-changing movement all started.It’s what I originally sent to every one of our supporters, unchanged. It’s personal. But I want you to know how patriots like YOU made this movement possible...Because I want you to join us in making history together. So, make sure to give it a read, because I’m forever grateful for what our supporters enabled Turning Point USA to do... and the revolution they’ve sparked in our nation’s youth. _**[And remember, if you choose to join Turning Point USA today, any gift you make this month will be DOUBLED – meaning you’ll have TWICE the impact in fighting for America!](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auuD/?__vbtrk=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
---
[ **Join Turning Point USA &**
**DOUBLE Your Impact**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auuD/?__vbtrk=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
|
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auuD/?__vbtrk=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, We recently wrapped our latest stop on the California leg of the American Comeback Tour at UC San Diego. I wish you could have been there to see it. Another packed quad. Students eager to listen. Flags waving. Cheers for America. Energy you could feel in your bones. _Not in Texas... Not in Florida..._ **_California._** The “Deep Blue” stronghold the Left said we’d never touch. But we did. And we’ll keep going. **Because of patriots like you.**
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auuD/?__vbtrk=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
As I stood there looking out at the crowd — hundreds of young patriots rising up in a place the Left said they owned — I couldn’t help but think...**Nearly 13 years ago, all of this felt...****_impossible._** Back then, Turning Point USA wasn’t the cultural phenomenon it is today.It wasn’t an office. It wasn’t a team. _It was just me._ No money. No connections. Just a desk and an old computer in a dusty garage in the Chicago suburbs._But what I did have was a vision..._ It was 2012. The Left controlled every classroom, every campus, and nearly every corner of our culture.Their narrative was everywhere: America was evil... Faith was “oppressive”... Freedom was outdated... The Conservative movement was dead... _And most of all, young people belonged to the Left._**I didn’t believe that. I couldn’t accept that. I couldn’t just stand by and watch the Left win.** Back then, it was no wonder WHY we were losing young people to the Left...The Conservative movement felt stale... Conservative organizations felt like a snooze... And it felt like no one had an idea of how to reach America’s youth... I believed if we were ever going to win young people back for America, we needed excitement. Energy. Passion. And ZEAL for our ideas.**My dream was to launch a conservative youth movement that would inspire young people to stand for truth — and LOVE this country again.** I didn’t know what I was going to call this dream... this feeling... this movement.So, I picked up the phone, called my dad, and said, “I think I’m supposed to start something, but I don’t have a name for it...” **He replied...****_"How about Turning Point?"_** And just like that, a fire was lit. Turning Point USA was born. On the promise that we could TURN this country around, one young heart at a time. The early days were brutal.I remember driving across the Chicago suburbs to small Tea Party meetings talking about “generational theft”... I remember my first Turning Point USA speaking event in Peoria, Illinois during the summer of 2012, where just six people showed up...**And I remember the look in their eyes — those early patriots —****when I told them the vision:**_“We’re going to create a youth movement that LOVES America.”_ _“We’re going to go on campus and win hearts and minds.”_ _“We’re going to push back — and we’re going to WIN.”_ They didn’t laugh... They didn’t walk out...**They believed. And so did you.**
---
You see, this isn’t my story. This is YOUR story. Because without you... _there is no Turning Point USA._ Without you... _there is no American Comeback story._ Without you... _there is no cultural shift happening right now in schools, churches, homes, and on every campus across our great nation._ You were there when the campus quads and halls were empty... stood by us when our signs got torn down. You had our backs when the mob showed up — when they shouted, screamed, and tried to wipe us off the map.**You didn’t give up. And neither did we.** But we were never supposed to be winning...The Left thought they owned this generation. They thought their indoctrination had worked. _But they were wrong._ I remember standing at tables on hostile campuses with nothing but flyers and hope, praying to have a conversation that would light a spark. I went where I was told a young conservative didn’t belong. And I kept going back.
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auuD/?__vbtrk=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
**And then... something happened...** **_The students started listening._** They started to question everything, think for themselves, and no longer be afraid to stand up. Then, they started showing up. _In DROVES._ And now? We’re not just watching history unfold... you and I are making it. **Friend, just LOOK at the movement we’ve built:** 🔥 A network of 820,000+ conservative student activists
🔥 1,800+ college and high school chapters
🔥 All 50 states. No territory unclaimed.🔥 16 BILLION+ total views across online platforms🔥 5 MILLION+ daily viewers online
🔥 Over 10 million young people turned away from the Left
🔥 Students rising up — even in DEEP blue states Fellow patriot, we’re not just winning arguments and “owning the libs” anymore... We’re winning hearts. We’re changing minds. We’re turning the tide. This generation wasn’t “lost.” _They were LIED to._ **But because of YOU — they’re hearing the truth. They’re finding their voices. They’re discovering their courage. They’re falling in love with this country again!**
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auuD/?__vbtrk=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
_Praise God!_ And you know what? This generation is just getting started.**But let me say this clearly: The battle is far from over.** The Left is on the ropes — but still dangerous.They’re doubling down with new tactics. They’re more aggressive than ever in our schools, our media, our digital spaces. They’re coming after our students harder than ever before — because they know we’re winning._We cannot give them back an inch._ So now, as we look back on how far we’ve come... It’s time to fight even harder.We’re going to press in. We’re going to drive deeper into enemy territory.**We’re going to reach more students, train more leaders, and destroy more strongholds of Leftist control.** Not with violence. Not with hate. But with truth. With courage. And with patriots like YOU standing shoulder-to-shoulder with us.
---
Friend, I want you to feel proud as you read this today. Because this movement — the energy, the fire, the growth, the headlines — it's yours. You lit the match. You fanned the flames. You stood in the gap. **And now you are helping raise up the most Conservative, most Patriotic, most fired-up youth generation in 50 years.** That’s not hype. That’s reality. And it’s only possible you never gave up. **So, thank you. Thank you for fighting with me. Thank you for loving this country enough to invest in its future. For believing this country is worth saving.** Let’s keep our foot on the gas. Let’s keep changing minds. Let’s keep winning this culture war. Because we were never supposed to be winning... And yet here we are. For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auuD/?__vbtrk=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
**P.S.** Thank you for reading what was admittedly a long email.But I wanted you to know how far we’ve come and how thankful I am for you! And if this email stirred something in you... If you’re proud of what YOU helped build...If you want to see even MORE students come alive for truth, for God, and for America...Then I have good news.**Right now, through the month of May, every single donation to Turning Point USA is being MATCHED, dollar-for-dollar, up to $2.5 MILLION.** Why? Because an extremely generous Turning Point USA supporter wanted to rally as many grassroots patriots as possible to DEFEAT the Left in our culture... for good.That means your impact gets DOUBLED. **That means two times the students you’ll reach. Two times the truth heard. Two times the hearts and minds you’ll win over for AMERICA.** So, if you’ve been waiting for the right moment to take your stand — this is it. This is your chance to pour fuel on the fire that you helped start.You aren't just supporting a cause anymore — you’re powering a cultural REVOLUTION. _**[Let’s carry the momentum through to every campus, every platform, every cultural stronghold until we WIN. Double the impact of your gift to Turning Point USA today.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auuD/?__vbtrk=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
---
[ **DOUBLE Your Impact &**
**Support Turning Point USA**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auuD/?__vbtrk=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwNzMyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=290732&trkid=689512725&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

Because an extremely generous Turning Point USA supporter wanted to rally as many grassroots patriots as possible to DEFEAT the Left in our culture... for good.That means your impact gets DOUBLED. That means two times the students you’ll reach. Two times the truth heard. Two times the hearts and minds you’ll win over for AMERICA. So, if you’ve been waiting for the right moment to take your stand — this is it. This is your chance to pour fuel on the fire that you helped start.You aren't just supporting a cause anymore — you’re powering a cultural REVOLUTION. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1932, Amelia Earhart took off for her historic solo transatlantic flight from Newfoundland to Ireland, becoming the first woman to accomplish such a feat. [Watch a video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1q8zAUxvGrkbcYWZ_JoOGFl0ALabt1NIp0FJ9GsYJ8EqNefXFvoevzwG_4f57Gk8eM8-XN38BRKuMM65KBCOr4uFaPM9zBByCfr8tCOF8b1VFwoXdc7wQfo8fcRtVFlwAEyA7cYJW1Uhslu8kNOinpk9wrqw0YkwSYA7d2SP4MEFWHbtO4Fnzg3ArR-2jioA9JGr6HEAJTHCJSqf1XwZkmSLmVJ9Q-lFuX3UR0X5j8x8SRieO6rn0rD3qcYfu3xVOYmDw-mfzfdkgf8Prevl-66uJ9xZxxMZYpfrl5zL8k_anD04mfAAAA__-4o3If). ## Trump, Putin, Zelensky Hold Peace Calls
President Trump said Monday that Russia and Ukraine have agreed to begin direct talks to end the war, [following back-to-back calls with Presidents Zelensky and Putin](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnMVvQccaYDB66sKVrR2TOR3KJAylcQ-nTV-krdP6kn_T9P079KUqW6fwe7xx0nPuJtzWzKi_9122JMvGDI7HGfFtXlem269IjoDuAOyD0KUre-7pIYWRGtgWHytfeW9fUtrgEiuwqjuQJqCU3psHZ1iYPPMDIMRYSXho4hArAI5YxNalyx9E20DIRmRo4ic5LeZ1l0guPeZ-fvJQ034scLqqP1dg3g53Bbtu2chjotRnsXmcMdlmebLCjn-Puvve2un5qsYT02CRnWRtvajjfo-Q_Uf-V4RnwNwAA__8xuXKq). Trump described the conversations with Putin as “productive,” lasting over two hours, and suggested the Vatican could serve as host for negotiations. The Kremlin confirmed no timeline has been set and offered few specifics. Zelensky warned the U.S. [not to sideline Kyiv](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O3CAURp8Gd4ww-Ge2oJgoots0KyWldQ3XMzeDwYI7a_ntI6_yBlsf6dN3zp_36R0oUrr_ghUtL3lKuNeIzFim17MAJdwQPDLEZ61M6XlwmbTSvVS91GoKQPGYuibYBVGjadC2YzeOph860zwseIB2aK_dfDXtPI8YvBqHdpxxeJuh7xuy55rqtWqVGrW-QBhC278tZlBX9N6LTmEgzuXyN1PiBy7xyJ9YLj6vTbQP5q0KcxPaCe32fb-sNZ1MaIdJ3meh3Sl1wlxiENpxea2brHBUWV61EkhIQf7XlZxlZSgsaV0xEDDKL3uZk_QIFRcqKLSDIm-31vXm47cwLnsKwvz8cbbEvX5g2Zpiw7ZTjFSHUXTqvgLFr9f8rdSfVv8LAAD___UmlWM) and insisted any peace must include the return of occupied territory.
## Biden Cancer Spurs Cover-Up Claims
Former President Biden’s prostate cancer diagnosis, announced on Friday, is drawing fire over [whether his White House hid signs of decline](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2S3CAQhU-DMqZQC4ndgMCJsnXqUNULzQweBiho7Vq3d-ErOOmk633v59fH8YExxXz_iS-yHMqR6bsnYqZ2nM-GMVMldMSYnr1zzM-L2wEKVqlWCerwGNN16MnbQAS0TGRno41Z1k0v08NuBhZNgCuoQOACzm-L8WHV4ZOCAT1FO2hqBTUrZQBu6Dc_r-9h2dQbOeeEVuQjl3b7XWLmB4V0lS9qN1deU7IP5trF8kPALmDPVy2dx0vAPsACdjXO_C5gP7sc_QTs9Ed-Rk9ZYvTUZT97JccSc-EHNemGgTyrxMDUZCjtRU3WRn2IuMvaSmdkkg6zoyZ9xHsuPQ721Kyv3zGl2DcjtLq_MKZ_afm_Jv6y8DcAAP__Z9GSbQ). Doctors say the aggressive, bone-spreading cancer likely [developed over five to ten years](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ynDAMhZ_GdNox5u9SUKShu2lTMlpLLArGZmzvMuTpM84rpFEhab4z3_n1vXyjOPGvn3jwlNeweL6S45w5Lu89ong-GS1ndHtKWfx-57gYbTrQHRi9EIq7l7aiaWU23FQ81UM7DE3Xt021Tfxc0XbPYeybrtdPHtuG--arrq2lEbu-kqnQdGd0rfVgzAOpp7ob16bXX2ytVa1mkhzi43cQnzde3R0-HB82HJWbtpzPpJofyszKzP4-Q8rlpMxcwMrMuox6VGZ-Jyh-yswUbA4Rri3AFeLOBJfkDZ5C7CFtwZZVSQGL3nIEEnz5kCQBegLrUI4Ea4gHRzgj_4EDb9jww7AhAUliTFweAIHYIrEycxUnOi9xTlI_qFa_DhT3zyP_V_mfyfwNAAD__5dtmys), raising questions about why no red flags appeared during Biden’s 2024 physical. Vice President JD Vance said [Americans “need to be honest”](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGy3CAMRb8Gd97BAhtv4SIN3Uub0sMDea0sCw5o1-O_z5BfSKNRcedI5_76Wr8cRUqPn-6FC295TXjWiMxY1vezOEp4oPPILj5rZUrPi8sKEsZejj3INTiK16q7sGyIgKrDZTDaGDVOWnX7gpu5y9lrpfWozByUCVsY3fcQAm6TDh0tjSZHkIOUBuDmwhSG8b6pSc7ovRdaYiDO5fY7U-Idt3jlD5abz68uLjvzUYX6IcAKsOd53t7VcQ7uagEBtnIulwDbzATYI0di8m1thwVY2cZwF2A_Lnns_7yxMuVU-28KmPodXeS9P0qu7Bh731KlD-QeKVdqpFkZUOPQDATYrizhOClGqpMRWj5ejuK_d_m_Ov4s8DcAAP__iQmQPw) about whether Biden was fit for duty, while Donald Trump Jr. suggested a cover-up. The controversy comes just as [_Original Sin_](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFOwzAUheGncbZEzo0Tu4MHaJUBVEAChJgiE9-0lzp2ZLuNytOj8grMR_qO9H_sh70hR_7wZGbUeQqDxzU5zBnjcD5FQx4XNCNm404pZfKna44DcGhL3pbAB2vIXQdRWD0hAjYF6loKKZu2E01x1GilUkrwSXSbr1FJUKqpu06CElzgaAvSN423wGvOJUBlbGfrdjM1HVc4jiMTHC3lEKvvQD4fcXLXcMFYjWEunD7mvCTW3DHoGfTrulZmNj_B32YG_XOkA3njylfy5UvERBZ9Lrc3oXxfyh0lk3IM58SgtwuD_p7v3j4ftw_bTRG1XVZyjlInmeCH2ZD7u83_anXR8BsAAP__3DZ9ug), a tell-all book dropping today, claims top aides concealed Biden’s cognitive and physical struggles during his reelection run.
## Stinky Tree Faces Statewide Bans, Bounties
The invasive Callery pear tree, infamous for its foul odor [likened to dead fish or worse](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAURb8Gd4zww9iegiJS5G7TpkQYHgsZDCN4sxP_feT9hdRH9-re8_vDfNiUU_n8ZQ_UFKop-O4ZibCZ16PZVPCJ1iHZ_OidUnmc1AwIUFwoDsJ4m_JppsHrgAgoB9TjMi2LVPMkh6jBO5z9uq8w3mG19xDWdYbdqX1xGMb7kPTVJhSIUYgF4Gb97Ed1D3IWKzrn2CTQJ6rt9qemQhFDPusXtpurx5B1JHp2Jn8w2BhsFDGmnC_GYIv1wOsQg63g3062mQN9suadGjLYlBQzqJH3eiDvZAk7T72_kO_1VejktfBoi__mJxLvB-Z8cmp4xZncaG8YmPwZn0PT_vlOOac-L2wSn4dN3zsG-i-xXxr-BQAA__8gOo-p), has been labeled invasive in over 30 states due to its rapid spread and ecological disruption. Four states—Ohio, Pennsylvania, South Carolina, and Missouri—[have banned it](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDEOnDAQRU9jOiNjsM0WLtLQbdqUaGQPMFljIzMBcftoc4X0X1_vvV_v-Q2UKK8_YUfPS5kz3mdCZqzzn08FynggBGRIn_Nkyp-H66yVNlIZqdUcgdIzD030C6LGvkHfucG53tihbzb_UmO0sddgg-mselnX9eMSRhNtNKN1DfnvmzJadUo5rVuINnbmtfRWjRhCEIPCSFxq-7tQ5g2X9JQLaxvK3iS_MR-n6H8IPQk93ffdLlB3yDEC1ec7Enr6Wgk9lY2KhBzlAfKoZa2wn5KhrsiSN5SULzjpQhkgJayPPBCq5Ioo9DRaZwfTbrynpvp43JQSndaJQa07UPrHw_8V8fL6bwAAAP__MVyHug), and Minnesota and Kansas will follow suit in 2026 and 2027, respectively. Virginia, Missouri, North Carolina, Kansas, and Ohio offer free native trees in exchange for felled Callery pears. In Ohio’s Franklin County, [residents can receive up to $100](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOgzAQBNCvMR3ILBhC4eIaulx7JVrwGnwxNlo7Qfz9KfmF66Z4Go3m5z7d0XkX1m_cSWcbp0Bn8pQz8fR8MLpAB-FCGf0jpezC48o8gQRVSlWCnAw6f01tYbQlAmoK0nXf9n2jurYpNq2UwWEgSTeslbGEHTQWblaB6WCosXD63SYVyFrKHqBC05laDbbp5I2WZRGtJONy5Oo3upA3sv6KL-JqiXvh9ZbzkUTzJWAUMJ7nWc2OTcJgZh_jnt5MwLgiGwourO_M8XRhLTMTpTJt_JxTuTKmREnAuKD3xFc5Mxob2ZQHIX-wgLFgbY7Tee9S14tWrjs6_5mS__XfS8NfAAAA__8dbYgD) and $150 in New Albany for replacing invasive trees with approved native species. Once a landscaping favorite for its fast growth and spring blooms, the Callery pear has become a botanical blunder, threatening native ecosystems and posing storm hazards thanks to its brittle, easily broken branches.

clean_body: President Trump said Monday that Russia and Ukraine have agreed to begin direct talks to end the war, . | | | | | | Tuesday, May 20, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1932, Amelia Earhart took off for her historic solo transatlantic flight from Newfoundland to Ireland, becoming the first woman to accomplish such a feat. . Just when he thought he was angling for dinner, a Wisconsin fisherman ended up . His big catch wasn’t a fish, but a forgotten tugboat that's been ghosting the Great Lakes since 1923. Read more below. We’re proud to give our Flyover Endorsed seal to LMNT! Our founders, CEO, and team members have enjoyed their products for years, and we’re proud to present them as today’s sponsor. We love LMNT! | Don’t feel like reading The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Trump, Putin, Zelensky Hold Peace Calls President Trump said Monday that Russia and Ukraine have agreed to begin direct talks to end the war, . Trump described the conversations with Putin as “productive,” lasting over two hours, and suggested the Vatican could serve as host for negotiations. The Kremlin confirmed no timeline has been set and offered few specifics. Zelensky warned the U.S. and insisted any peace must include the return of occupied territory. Biden Cancer Spurs Cover-Up Claims Former President Biden’s prostate cancer diagnosis, announced on Friday, is drawing fire over . Doctors say the aggressive, bone-spreading cancer likely , raising questions about why no red flags appeared during Biden’s 2024 physical. Vice President JD Vance said about whether Biden was fit for duty, while Donald Trump Jr. suggested a cover-up. The controversy comes just as , a tell-all book dropping today, claims top aides concealed Biden’s cognitive and physical struggles during his reelection run. Stinky Tree Faces Statewide Bans, Bounties The invasive Callery pear tree, infamous for its foul odor , has been labeled invasive in over 30 states due to its rapid spread and ecological disruption. Four states—Ohio, Pennsylvania, South Carolina, and Missouri—, and Minnesota and Kansas will follow suit in 2026 and 2027, respectively. Virginia, Missouri, North Carolina, Kansas, and Ohio offer free native trees in exchange for felled Callery pears. In Ohio’s Franklin County, and $150 in New Albany for replacing invasive trees with approved native species. Once a landscaping favorite for its fast growth and spring blooms, the Callery pear has become a botanical blunder, threatening native ecosystems and posing storm hazards thanks to its brittle, easily broken branches. | | | Trump has made it no secret that he is set on dismantling news media channels that are holding him accountable – like MSNBC! He's gone so far as to say, "They're really corrupt and they're illegal." What?? Peter, we can't let Trump or his MAGA allies attack our right to free speech. We'll need to stand with our journalists who are fighting for the truth and to hold this administration accountable. [That's why we're checking in our team with a 1-minute poll that closes at midnight tonight:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T63fcf1f8-a5aa-47a9-b791-9555b0a946f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Do you support MSNBC?

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tacb0c965-1f13-4835-90ea-1eeb793e7d78/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Amy Carnevale
subject: Join the tradition! Lincoln-Reagan Reception Thurs May 29
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Republican Party Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee
body:
Support candidates down ballot..
| | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jiu_o1lhi9BtzvEt0oXcH-_CToFDRY2T_oHZdSrEMcOpDiqY5C7fNtQhi51QJAc6sBY0Byx5APhUyAyrEUi1DtO-qsd2ywLlpUIEzjkENHOqWgFKS-9bxQR2VoxyJR4kazRQ8Ha-9RegMzD8aXxmEw==&c=B4NHlag7d8uTlDsBi5nnokO47giwV_yZUVdQaoRJVwKp-2KEXTd5YQ==&ch=2p6cRTJVVuDGu_f-X_US0Z4FFa6h1051tQTcGi1M-WevjHCeTPDJlQ==)

Hello Peter,
I wanted to make sure you received your personal invitation to attend this year's Lincoln-Reagan Reception on Thursday, May 29 in Boston!
The MassGOP's Annual Lincoln-Reagan Reception is a long-standing tradition in Massachusetts that Former Governor Charlie Baker and Lt. Gov. Karyn Polito have participated in for more than a decade!
Please, join the tradition this year and help support candidates down the ballot.
Last year's event proved particularly impactful: funds raised enabled the MassGOP to navigate a challenging presidential election year in a deep blue state and achieve a historic victory in the 2024 Massachusetts State Legislature races. Defending all incumbent seats and adding five new Republicans, the party achieved a remarkable gain unseen since 1984.
In just three weeks, the party has the opportunity to keep that winning momentum with Taunton City Councilor Larry Quintal in his race for State Rep on June 10th.
Your invitation to this year's Lincoln-Reagan Reception is below with all of the details.
Please RSVP to [finance@massgop.com](mailto:finance@massgop.com) or [online here](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jiu_o1lhi9BtzvEt0oXcH-_CToFDRY2T_oHZdSrEMcOpDiqY5C7fNmBTBJO2Zps1w_suNFCKhYpR3C-y0MPFrmCvmDB8UIR2ShA1w_qxsHNFZgi8ON2X0A_S6DRf92yTgTCNUzfSRahNQTTnZvqVUU85t-pCeCChOUhxeoqKo1GEWXWPTVHbe9Stt5wUBtIi0tFQWk2oX0h4dgfkNGKK-Q==&c=B4NHlag7d8uTlDsBi5nnokO47giwV_yZUVdQaoRJVwKp-2KEXTd5YQ==&ch=2p6cRTJVVuDGu_f-X_US0Z4FFa6h1051tQTcGi1M-WevjHCeTPDJlQ==).
See you on the 29th!
Kind regards, Amy
Amy Carnevale Chair, Massachusetts Republican Party

clean_body: Support candidates down ballot.. | | | | | == Hello Peter, I wanted to make sure you received your personal invitation to attend this year's Lincoln-Reagan Reception on Thursday, May 29 in Boston! The MassGOP's Annual Lincoln-Reagan Reception is a long-standing tradition in Massachusetts that Former Governor Charlie Baker and Lt. Gov. Karyn Polito have participated in for more than a decade! Please, join the tradition this year and help support candidates down the ballot. Last year's event proved particularly impactful: funds raised enabled the MassGOP to navigate a challenging presidential election year in a deep blue state and achieve a historic victory in the 2024 Massachusetts State Legislature races. Defending all incumbent seats and adding five new Republicans, the party achieved a remarkable gain unseen since 1984. In just three weeks, the party has the opportunity to keep that winning momentum with Taunton City Councilor Larry Quintal in his race for State Rep on June 10th. Your invitation to this year's Lincoln-Reagan Reception is below with all of the details. Please RSVP to mailto:finance@massgop.com or ==. See you on the 29th! Kind regards, Amy Amy Carnevale Chair, Massachusetts Republican Party | | | | == | | == | Paid for by the Massachusetts Republican Party Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac St Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | |

name: JD Vance
subject: I thank God every day for this victory
body:
We needed it.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auAA/?__vbtrk=MjkwODEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwODEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend - this is Vice President JD Vance.
**_[I sat down to write you this email today and ended up writing more than I had planned, but I hope you’ll take the time to read my message in its entirety](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auAA/?__vbtrk=MjkwODEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwODEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
As my term as Vice President crosses the 100 day mark, I am reflecting on the importance of winning the election in 2024, _and how different our country would be if the result were different_.
I thank God every day for raising up our movement in victory, because the vision for America that Kamala Harris was running on was straight out of a nightmare.
Just think -
**Kamala would have supercharged DEI in every facet of American life.** President Trump and I rooted out DEI in our government, root and stem.
**Kamala would have imported another 20 million illegal immigrants across our open southern border.** President Trump and I have completely closed our southern border and have begun the largest deportation effort in the history of our country.
**Kamala would have implemented Soviet-style price controls while exporting our jobs.** President Trump and I have lowered prices and are bringing back the good-paying jobs that made the American economy the envy of the world.
Right now, we are truly entering the Golden Age of America, and the success of our Administration does not belong to us, it belongs to the American people, the forgotten men and women of our country who were sold out by the elites and political class of our country for decades.
**Since the day I got into politics, I’ve been fighting for the citizens of this country to reclaim the promise of America that was stolen from them by the political class in DC.**
That’s a fight I’m happy to be in, shoulder to shoulder with patriots like you, friend.
**_But it’s also a fight that the Democrats and their billionaire donors are chomping at the bit to have again in 2026._**
Make no mistake, the Democratic political machine is firing on all cylinders to win back power. They are posting record fundraising hauls, hiring highly trained activists in key districts and states, and recruiting candidates to run against every vulnerable Republican in the country.
Here’s the long and short of it -
**_[For the first time since being sworn in, I’ve teamed up with Chairwoman Elise Stefanik - one of my strongest allies in Congress - to raise $250,000 in the next 10 days](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auAA/?__vbtrk=MjkwODEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwODEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
That’s no walk in the park, and it won’t be easy, but trust me it’s going to be worth it.
**_[You know by now that I didn’t come from much, so when I ask for something, it’s important](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auAA/?__vbtrk=MjkwODEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwODEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
I’m asking you to help us just get a little bit closer. We’ve set a goal to have our average gift of $47, if you can just chip in $40 to help us get there it is a major win for our country.
[CHIP IN](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auAA/?__vbtrk=MjkwODEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwODEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_In Freedom,_
**Vice President JD Vance**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/auAA/?__vbtrk=MjkwODEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwODEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

A Houston startup successfully launched a small-scale test rocket with a rotating detonation engine last week in New Mexico.
