## House Approves Bail Reform Package
The Texas House gave initial approval Monday to a package of bills that would [impose new restrictions on bail](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ypCAQhZ8Gs56CVlcNCDYxu5tuaLXQDtRFmQIc77z9Fr7CJh31-fnO36_li3zwx_MP7azLzxaXg68cuBROy0o-JN5i2l-UM2cXz8w27rygxB5kDygXSz58lq6xepV2Ug1rNXTD0I7jMDZOj5udkLEfuSdqtxbR0kSEg7GkOkmN19VM9iiVkkq1j55GOa2kiInGtdtEJ9n6EtOjOC78Q3kLn_jm9DBxb4J2pbyyaH8LnAXO13U9TPDmG2vbEo_6JXCuWALnWy9wrpkCZ1mPmgTOuSRvCieo0JDOwBnIvukwDMWleD4d3GK4V4DLeePAkYU1RPPNFuiA2srRGcAf8Er89vHMkDlnH4-a2iRtX5cPwedfg-jkcycfbozyf-O_Nf4LAAD__zJdnL4), an issue Gov. Greg Abbott has designated a legislative priority and advocated for many years. Senate Bill 9 would [restrict bail for violent offenders](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2u6yAQBeDV4I4IMMROQfEad3ntLa0xDDESDhYz-dv9lbOFW4_mHH3n5zpfIZd8v_2HDT2_U53v-KKCzNjmBXJpmGrbdiBCWuuDMNYNZ6OMk8pJo-YIuXxm20W_qHjRHXo92GHox3EYu9WDHkarzlFb7VJyoJwOMfRGO5PAmb7L_ghTziitldb9ycGoLgtoQIBxsUlYhTFzbSdekfENlMqnPrGdQt264lfmnUT_T5hJmCksBA_ifD-uwkwHR5ip1ABFmOn7L78Q-ayMJLnK0BAYJXHLgbHJwy33WnLISF3zcX_lUjKdB2HVbYNcvtX8t8Ge3vwGAAD__8xCgiI), regulate charitable bail organizations, and allow prosecutors to appeal a magistrate’s decision to release a suspect on bond. Meanwhile, Senate Bill 40 would prohibit local governments from funding organizations that provide bonds. Two constitutional amendments were also considered, but only one received the requisite two-thirds support to advance to a public referendum in November. Senate Joint Resolution 5, which passed 133-8, would allow judges to [deny bail in certain felony cases](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGS6yAMBuDT4A6PwNiQguI17vLaLT0iyDE7OGSAxM7td-w9wqpQpfk13_91na4YYnjc_-NKtu5zmh60lUi1Up4chphpTnl9YilUlvQq5NNKkwTZc-i5hMljiJ9JNd468BfRkBVaad0Zo02zWIEOQakB1DFwG-iiPXSDMNqg87IJ9giDXoIQIETX9mjg4lAgIRqnZqaAfKgpt3WhSjuWOX7Sm3J7S2sT7VLrs7DuH5Mjk-O2be2cdo2vUsPjOGFyPExMjoeH_4L4GcRPES_fmYtz9022_rmFGEMZNFNwXzHE81H9Wz1vK38CAAD__2CHenE) if the suspect is a public safety threat. Senate Joint Resolution 1, denying bail to illegal immigrants accused of violent crimes, did not pass.
## Severe Storms Hit Palo Pinto County
Thunderstorms in North Texas [produced at least one tornado](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu5CAUheGnwR0juMCAC4pt3GXbLa1ruIyRsBkBiZO3X828Qupf-nR0_n2sH5hLPh9_8SA_vlNdT7p6oTGorRvm0ijVdjyxd-p7_ewU60ErCDBcGA5ijZjLz6qn6DcRZzmRl1Zbq5yzbto9OQvOWrCz1c6hRGfUJjWBikqEFKbsX5gwIKQUUqqbQSfmDSUSott0YlpQzKO229hp0Df2VH7qF7VbqMdU_D7GszP1h8HCYLmu63YlxFdksGAbORR6BcKxU2OwvA3-qC3Wk4_aToyVj_3zjNT6qO3gqeUeKo944IN4TSmHjKUzWMBZvpmgZmMUl_N95loD8VklwaW7OwkpJHnfpubj88ql5H63TIvHgbm8B4_f3fzl4X8AAAD__ynmkMM) that touched down on Sunday, causing damage in parts of Palo Pinto County and prompting two school districts to cancel classes. The National Weather Service confirmed that an EF-1 tornado with estimated peak winds of 105 mph touched down in Gordon, damaging 31 homes and the town’s newly remodeled school. Power lines were knocked down, and an [18-wheeler overturned in nearby Santo](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAURb8GOw08UZmCYhu62XZL85THSIJggBnHv9_M_sLWN7kn5_zc5zv64OPjG3fS9e3SHOksgWqlPC_oQyaX8n5gKVS29Cxk004zcBhaPrTAZ4s-XLNsrF64vYmGtJjkNPVKTarZ9A3tCjhxMS7CCTGMJKSTI1qlejlY23j9OeMDcCG4EH03oOK3BQUSolqkY5KT9TXlrm5U6Y3FhSu9KHdr2pugt1qPwvovBoaBOc-zi8tq3fmZGZiPDwMT0oqBgTkwpPbwsaZ2Tc9Yr7amHNGmtjyjxauN_rFVBqZXsh8lMDBN1vY4fQi-jBOT_LGjD3_w-r9kLw2_AQAA__9mDYEI). Residents reported baseball-sized hail in some areas. At least four people were taken to the hospital with non-life-threatening injuries. Santo ISD canceled classes on Monday, and Gordon ISD is [closed for the rest of the week](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAUhZ9GOwwgDlhQbGP3b7ulucplJEGvgTvjzNtv3FfY7hQn5-T7_vzMP5ByOp6_YUfPn0jzgVfNyIxlXiDlgpHKfkKtWDd6VQy046ylHoQchJZzgJS_s2mDX2QYVYteWWNt75x17eah17K349BbFfqHM1o5I9GND61sjNG1yd9jctBSKalU3w3g5LiAAgRwi4mNkRgSU-l4Q8YP1Ji_9MbSrbS32W_MZ236X42eGj1d19VF-pgb4y40erpjoyemckAgEWCHJ4oTMokzHUxipdfBX7FmqlgFXyTquhFlEVLlklaubfHhvFLOqT5sY-Rzh5T__fP_WXt7_TcAAP__-y-D9A). Damage was also reported on the north side of the Metroplex. A downed power line [ignited a fire](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAUhZ_G3rAA4wADQxdv6drRug6XgIRzLaBx8vaV8wrdznB-dL6f63KFlNPj_g0buvYKtDzwqBlbw7KskHLBQGXboVaskX4retpwkVxOjE9M8sVDyu9F9d6t3FvRoxNaaT0ao00fndUAVnA06maniw_jOGlzs0pYrYOcfJ_cWcYnyYXgQozDBIbbFQQggFlV6BRHnxqVoUVs-IIa8pueWIYbbX12sbW9duNXJ-dOzsdxDIFe6rxxGjo5n7KT8yfKDoQWsbBG5QGeWISUWW1Utsr2SI3YM3mkvji_HynnVC-6U_y-QcqfwfY_TE8n_wIAAP__8St-uw) in the backyard of a Flower Mound resident.
## Texas Company Tests Revolutionary Rocket Engine
Venus Aerospace, a Houston-based startup founded in 2020, [successfully tested a rotating detonation rocket engine](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuupDAQRVcDmZE_fEzgYBKyN-mEqMAFWG1sZBfQ7H7UvYUX36ujo_PvZ_wB511Y_8KOht5LHAPe2SMRpnEC5xMuMe0H5Ix5i2dGG3ccJZcN4w2TfLTg_DPWpTUTt70o0Yiu7jqldafLzTTN0vWqrRutOJegddsqVD2qGmZE7EpnPjDeSC4EF0JVDWjeTyAAAfRUL0XN0TqKqaINCd-QF__EC1M1x730ZiM6cqH-FHIo5HDfd5UPmPGzFnIgnLcQfVyfQg4XhjMzwBS_F2ZxOimzIxIGcuD9wxJe0Z_kYoD0sBTnFxLDsLqA7Ha0MQ_B7pBeTGRii3frRuxyFmOZjD1u573LbVfUfN3B-a8j_a7sZeT_AAAA___bl5K_) at Spaceport America in New Mexico last week, marking the first time the technology has been demonstrated in the U.S. Rotating detonation engines have no moving parts and use sustained supersonic combustion to generate thrust. [They offer greater efficiency and power](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OozAQRZ8GOkdjY_4KF9uky7ZboiEew2gNRvYkJPv0q-QVvvpeHR2dP7fphhx5X37jRk5eIU07nSWSCOVpRo6ZQsrbgaVQWdOjkE8bTQZMq6BVBiaPHN-Trb2bwY-6Jqd72_fNMPRDvTpvZ4O9HkZsfBh9IGMxUNu12s6D7kLN7gOD1oDWoHVzaXGAcUaNhDjMNlQWyLOkfJGVhF5YQnynJ-XLPW11dKvIUarmV2Wulbku_G9LPn22yly_d1UEszyOok6OXu10KnodMXneF5XT_S-JwjsVFTgXUSHysooSKqIMAHRgwZo6O3-cHCOXrq8sLBty_BrIz7o9nfkfAAD__yA7hG4) than traditional rocket engines and are being researched for potential military and commercial applications. Venus Aerospace intends to [develop a hypersonic aircraft](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE8DmVG7MQMTONiEbDbdEDW4PbZkMLINzNx-xb_Cz0oqqVTv_XtNL_LBb--_tLIuHxunja8cuBRO00w-JLYxrTvlzNnFI7OJK08I2AnoBMJkyIfvpGqjZzBPWbOWver7dhj6oXYaAGeWs5rNIi221ljL2Bo72AcuRtna63sMOgQpQcq26WiA50ySmGiYla0UsPElpqY4LvyhbMM3npyaJa510K6UPVftnwrHCsfruprFpbjdbYXjcoRyJK5wpFT8Eu508nZkQZxi3mlh4fzbibwzG1ESnRzETVriJhDaFp6dana310mb_fIh-PzoKwXvlXz4-VB-Z-7U-D8AAP__mheFlA) with a cruising speed of Mach 4 (3,069 mph) and a top speed of Mach 9 (6,905 mph). At those speeds, a flight between Tokyo and LA would take less than two hours. "_We've proven that this technology works—not just in simulations or the lab, but in the air_ ,” [said CEO Sassie Duggleby](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOozAQRp8GOtB4uNgULrZJl223RAMMwZIvyJ6Q5O1X-V_h7z995-j8u893ct7Fx18KbOW9pznyq3gW4Twv5HzmPeVwUilcjvQsvKXAMwIODQwNwryR85-5rze7wDapmq3SvdadMdrUh50WWtEAr1qZbjI4MiDCuoysh7VfxtrZ7xkMCEqBUl07kIFpIUVMZJZ-r3rgzUnKrRws_Kay-0-6OLdrCrW3h8hZqu5PhbcKb19HSbF1MaaLxKUY6PwuK7xdHJ-lIc6pnLRyc3xOziVFtzbCRZrdu8chDY4aQat-gvaQ4Otst_PlvHdl1FUPj0DO_7Dld8Uui_8DAAD__59EgiA).

Greg Abbott has designated a legislative priority and advocated for many years. | | | | | | Tuesday, May 20, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1893, an election designated the as the county seat of Potter County. A Houston startup successfully launched a small-scale test rocket with a rotating detonation engine last week in New Mexico. Read up on this in today's Roundup. Do you love Texas? So do our 285,000 readers. Advertise in The Texas Flyover and connect your business with passionate locals. . You'll want to keep this stock ticker on your watch list from today's sponsor . Abilene ☀️ 83/60° | Amarillo ☀️ 80/50° | Austin 🌦️ 96/74° | Brownsville 🌥️ 97/81° | Corpus Christi 🌥️ 92/80° | DFW ☀️ 84/69° | El Paso ☀️ 89/59° | Houston 🌦️ 93/78° | Laredo 🌤️ 104/78° | Lubbock ☀️ 85/54° | Midland ☀️ 87/59° | San Antonio ⛅ 101/76° | Tyler 🌩️ 85/67° | Waco ⛅ 87/68° Don’t feel like reading the national edition of The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | House Approves Bail Reform Package The Texas House gave initial approval Monday to a package of bills that would , an issue Gov. Greg Abbott has designated a legislative priority and advocated for many years. Senate Bill 9 would , regulate charitable bail organizations, and allow prosecutors to appeal a magistrate’s decision to release a suspect on bond. Meanwhile, Senate Bill 40 would prohibit local governments from funding organizations that provide bonds. Two constitutional amendments were also considered, but only one received the requisite two-thirds support to advance to a public referendum in November. Senate Joint Resolution 5, which passed 133-8, would allow judges to if the suspect is a public safety threat. Senate Joint Resolution 1, denying bail to illegal immigrants accused of violent crimes, did not pass. Severe Storms Hit Palo Pinto County Thunderstorms in North Texas that touched down on Sunday, causing damage in parts of Palo Pinto County and prompting two school districts to cancel classes. The National Weather Service confirmed that an EF-1 tornado with estimated peak winds of 105 mph touched down in Gordon, damaging 31 homes and the town’s newly remodeled school. Power lines were knocked down, and an . Residents reported baseball-sized hail in some areas. At least four people were taken to the hospital with non-life-threatening injuries. Santo ISD canceled classes on Monday, and Gordon ISD is . Damage was also reported on the north side of the Metroplex. A downed power line in the backyard of a Flower Mound resident. Texas Company Tests Revolutionary Rocket Engine Venus Aerospace, a Houston-based startup founded in 2020, at Spaceport America in New Mexico last week, marking the first time the technology has been demonstrated in the U.S. Rotating detonation engines have no moving parts and use sustained supersonic combustion to generate thrust. than traditional rocket engines and are being researched for potential military and commercial applications. Venus Aerospace intends to with a cruising speed of Mach 4 (3,069 mph) and a top speed of Mach 9 (6,905 mph). At those speeds, a flight between Tokyo and LA would take less than two hours. "We've proven that this technology works—not just in simulations or the lab, but in the air ,” . | Flying together with our sponsor Keep This Stock Ticker on Your Watchlist They may not be trading on the Nasdaq yet, but Pacaso just reserved the ticker “$PCSO.” No wonder Founded by the man who took Zillow from seed to IPO, Pacaso brings co-ownership to the $1.3T vacation home industry. They’ve already generated $1B+ worth of luxury home transactions across 2,000+ buyers. Now, after 41% gross profit growth last year, surpassing $110M+ total, Pacaso is ready for what’s next. () ➤ Sunray: Demolition crews have begun tearing down a grain elevator that was the site of an explosion that injured five workers in March. () ➤ Aransas Pass: A woman is seeking answers after the city reportedly issued a building permit for a house that now sits on her parents’ property, even though they didn’t submit an application. Mayor Jason Knight says the dispute must be resolved in civil court. () ➤ Justin: Police found several domesticated rats dumped on the side of the road on Saturday. The "black hooded fancy rats" were transferred to DFW Rat Rescue for adoption. () ➤ Dallas: The city council is considering taking out a $1 billion loan to move forward with $3.7 billion in renovations to the Kay Bailey Hutchison Convention Center. The loan would be repaid by revenue bonds issued next year. () ➤ San Antonio: Thousands of people walked through downtown on Sunday morning to honor the memory of loved ones who died in the line of duty while serving in the military or as first responders. The walk was part of a nationwide initiative organized by the nonprofit Carry The Load. () ➤ The U.S. Supreme Court ruled last week that a civil rights case against Harris County deputy Roberto Felix Jr., who fatally shot Ashtian Barnes during a traffic stop in 2016, should be reinstated to determine whether Felix used excessive force. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 5/20/2025
body:
Was DNC vice chair David Hogg undone by procedure—or politics?
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks!
Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Governor Polis [vetoed a top-priority labor bill](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) backed by unions, highlighting friction within his own party. In Colorado Springs, two suspects are on trial for allegedly [staging a hate crime hoax](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) during the 2023 mayoral race—one has already pleaded guilty. Meanwhile, Denver officials report a [58% drop in homicides](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), crediting tougher immigration enforcement, while mayors across the state remain [divided on immigration policy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
A [fourth wolf](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) from Colorado’s reintroduction program has died, raising questions about the long-term viability of the effort. And in this week’s COvid Chronicles, we revisit May 2020, when C&C Coffee became the center of a [statewide rebellion against lockdown orders](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and helped galvanize a grassroots political movement.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** President Trump is facing a legal challenge to his [diversity-focused executive orders](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with opponents like CO Attorney General Weiser arguing they violate constitutional protections. Meanwhile, controversy brews in the Democratic Party after David Hogg was ousted as DNC vice chair—critics say it was a [political takedown masked as a procedural fix](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). And doctors are questioning the timeline of President Biden’s sudden [prostate cancer diagnosis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), saying the condition likely existed throughout his presidency.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Steven Mosher argues Trump decisively [won the first round of his tariff war with China](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), forcing Beijing to retreat under economic pressure. Meanwhile, Joe Cunningham warns that GOP moderates are [misreading the 2024 election results](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—risking defeat in 2026 by abandoning bold reforms and conservative principles that energized voters in the first place.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, May 20, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Out of order: Was DNC vice chair David Hogg undone by procedure—or politics?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
David Hogg says the Democratic National Committee (DNC) is trying to “fast-track” his removal as vice chair. The party insists it’s just following procedure. But veteran parliamentarian Gregory Carlson says what happened may violate one of the most basic principles of Robert’s Rules of Order – you can’t go back and undo a vote after the meeting is over.
“Usually, you can’t overturn something that’s already happened on procedural grounds,” Carlson said. “You have to challenge it at the time that it’s happening.”
Back in February, Hogg and Pennsylvania state Rep. Malcolm Kenyatta were elected to serve as DNC vice chairs. But in May, the party’s Credentials Committee reversed the election, siding with a complaint that accused party officials of improperly combining two vice chair positions into a single ballot.
That ballot pairing, the complaint claimed, violated the DNC’s gender-parity rules – and disadvantaged female candidates.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[The COvid Chronicles May 8–15, 2020: C&C made headlines. Polis made an example. Colorado made up its mind.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Castle Rock’s C&C Coffee & Kitchen reopened on Mother’s Day in defiance of Gov. Polis’ lockdown orders, sparking statewide rebellion. The restaurant’s license was revoked, but the public rallied in support—taping cash to the windows and dining in anyway.
* Law enforcement and county officials across Colorado—from Larimer to Teller—openly defied mask mandates and gathering limits, citing constitutional concerns and rising mental health crises. Nearly half of Colorado’s counties filed for local control.
* As small businesses collapsed, unemployment soared, and state messaging contradicted itself, Coloradans began to question the legitimacy of continued restrictions. The moment marked a cultural and political turning point in Colorado’s pandemic response.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[GET YOUR TICKET HERE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[A tale of two cities: How two Colorado mayors stand far apart on immigration](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Denver Mayor Mike Johnston champions a “welcoming city” approach, defending sanctuary policies and pushing back on federal immigration crackdowns—even suggesting civil disobedience. In contrast, Colorado Springs Mayor Yemi Mobolade embraces immigration enforcement, supports ICE raids, and emphasizes prioritizing local residents.
* Denver has invested nearly $90 million in shelters and services for incoming migrants, hiring a D.C. law firm to defend its policies in federal court. Colorado Springs, meanwhile, reaffirmed its non-sanctuary status and refused to offer city-funded aid to migrants.
* Denver and Colorado are now facing a federal lawsuit over “sanctuary” laws, while Denver also sues FEMA for withholding $25 million in promised aid. The clash underscores broader national tensions over immigration enforcement and local autonomy.

**[Devotional: In life’s fast lane, choosing the wrong road to a path of folly happens easily](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER****| COMMENTARY | MAY 18** _We live in a world where countless roads claim to lead to success—express lanes to happiness, toll-free routes to purpose, and flashy detours promising fulfillment in the Eternal Now. And many folks, good-hearted and well-meaning, are sprinting full speed ahead._
__
**[Silent signature, rising resistance: HB1312 becomes law, but parents vow to fight on](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | MAY 17** _Gov. Jared Polis signed House Bill 25-1312 into law on Friday, May 16, without a press conference, social media announcement or public ceremony. While the bill, known as the “Kelly Loving Act,” was hailed by progressive lawmakers as a milestone for transgender rights, many Coloradans who opposed the bill say the governor’s quiet signature is a telling indication of just how controversial the legislation had become._ __
**[Notarfrancesco: TRAILS goes beyond SEL—it’s activism wrapped in therapy language](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY KELLY NOTARFRANCESCO | COMMENTARY | MAY 15** _Should teachers in Colorado K-12 classrooms be performing daily assessments on the thoughts and feelings of your children? At the beginning of the 2024-25 school year, Pueblo D70 School District controversially implemented a Social Emotional Learning (SEL) curriculum which Superintendent Ronda Rein described in an email from September 24, 2024 as a “daily assessment of thoughts and feelings.”_ __

Roosevelt was deeply connected to U.S. presidential history—not only was Theodore Roosevelt his fifth cousin and Eleanor his fifth cousin once removed, but he was also **related to 10 other presidents by blood or marriage** , including John Adams, James Madison, and Ulysses S. Grant. Though FDR was an only child, he and Eleanor had six children, two of whom served in Congress: James in California and Franklin Jr. in New York, who also held a post in the Kennedy and Johnson administrations.

Arresting a sitting Democratic Congresswoman for the "crime" of conducting her congressional duty of oversight at an ICE detention facility: | | == | Just in the first 5 months of his second term, Trump has: Tried to pass legislation to shutdown non-profits opposed to him, signed executive orders attacking the Democratic fundraising platform ActBlue to try and shut it down, arrested a Wisconsin judge, defied Supreme Court orders, publicly floated the idea of suspending habeas corpus, and now - arrested a sitting Democratic Congresswoman on frivolous charges. These moves are straight out of the dictator's playbook. Trump is flooding the zone with unconstitutional and illegal actions, trying to see what he can get away with to consolidate his power and to destroy organized opposition. Our leaders in D.C. have been paralyzed by the flurry of punches Trump has sent their way, incapable of fighting back. In their absence, the grassroots of the party have stepped up to the occasion - not letting Trump have an inch without resistance. From the beginning, National Ground Game has covered Trump's descent into fascism. We have called out every single fascist thing Trump has done in his second term. But we also put our money where our mouth is \- knocking on doors in deep-red districts in the FL special elections & organizing college students on conservative campuses. We have been on the frontlines of the fight against fascism and will continue to be with your support. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | With your support we'll continue to fight for our Democracy every single day. | | == | | == | == | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. body:

Derek,
I’m reaching out personally to invite you to join me for a fun and important evening in support of Granite Solutions and our mission to elect strong Republicans and defend New Hampshire’s charitable gaming industry!****

[](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)

**Granite Solutions Casino Night**
**Tuesday, June 3rd, 2025**
**6:00 PM – 9:00 PM**
**The Artisan Hotel, Salem, NH**
We’ll have poker, blackjack, roulette, and other favorite games — along with gourmet hors d’oeuvres, top-shelf cocktails, music, and prizes. Most importantly, your $50 ticket helps fuel the work we’re doing to elect Republicans here in New Hampshire.
Your support and attendance truly makes a difference. I hope you’ll join us!

Space is limited, and the RSVP deadline is Tuesday, May 27th.
**Rep. Joe Sweeney**

|
# _Follow The Silenced_ Premieres Worldwide
---
| |
---
| The energy in Austin was electric at the world debut of the groundbreaking documentary _Follow The Silenced_ before a **packed audience** last week. The event brought together medical freedom advocates, concerned citizens, and truth-seekers from all walks of life across the globe to witness a film that is **already changing the conversation**. From the opening scene to the final credits, this documentary delivers a powerful, unflinching look at the stories long buried by mainstream narratives. In attendance were many of the vaccine-injured, including **Brianne Dressen and Joel Wallskog** , founders of React19, and several others who are supported by their vital work and courageously shared their stories on camera - earning **standing ovations and heartfelt gratitude** from the audience. The filmmakers behind Follow The Silenced, including Mikki Willis, Matthew Guthrie and Tyler Lindsay, also shared remarks and received well-deserved praise for their **fearless commitment to truth and transparency**. Numerous frontline doctors, who continue to stand firm in the face of censorship and career risk, also joined the premiere and spoke with attendees, making the evening even more inspiring. A special thank-you goes out to our incredible special guests-**Dr. Bret Weinstein, Dr. Mary Talley Bowden, Zachary Levi, JP Sears, Del Bigtree, and Tim Kennedy,** and primary sponsor-**the ****Independent Medical Alliance** - for showing up, speaking out, and lending their voices to this critical moment. If you missed the in-person premieres or our local watch parties, you can now **watch and share this powerful film online—completely free**. Gather your friends and family, open your hearts and minds, and witness the **deeply troubling layers of government corruption** surrounding the COVID vaccine trials. Share this film far and wide...
---
|
---
**Together, we can ensure these voices are heard and never silenced again.**
| | | [ Watch Follow the Silenced HERE ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU0OTIwMDg0MjM1NjE3OTc5LFwiclwiOjE1NDkyMDExMTIzOTU5NTM4NX0iLCJzIjoiOWQ2ZDM3N2RjMDM0MTUzYyJ9)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Writing this is not the “safe” option
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Writing this is not the “safe” option. But it is the RIGHT option.

But I’ve never gone with the safe option. I only follow the right option.
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrmv6tkiihpiv39pia0c2v8t9bnraq46ak5l1mi0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctimepr6c1h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
My law licenses have been taken away and I can no longer defend myself in court. I may even face a 20-YEAR prison sentence in a case so severe that President Trump cannot even save me with a pardon.
---
_So, the “safe” thing to do right now would be to keep quiet and not say anything that would anger the powers-that-be._
---
_But that’s not who I am._
---
**Throughout my life, I’ve never gone with the “safe” option. I do what’s _RIGHT_.**
---
_And so, I’m speaking out and I’ve prepared a memo for you on something deeply troubling._
---
[**Please read it here: secure.rudygiulianifreedomfund.com/memo-access-for-dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvs0oc9vpvkuapj5idh2aqt57jbu6d9mer2164b0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctimepr6c1h2bs)
---

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znlhuvjbnq9aeb0b64kttthamogispb6nkpmb3d8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctimepr6c1h2bs)
__
---

[READ THE MEMO](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqtg38qqk7mp5jk833bsm02vjh04kmpshg6kabdg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctimepr6c1h2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcnv8d7nkjkftpfbqj8qdbthuol4hff0ot2ofaq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctimepr6c1h2bs)

name: Paula Scanlan
subject: I will not be silent
body:
When I refused to quietly accept this violation of my privacy and dignity, college administrators told me I was the problem.

| | | When I refused to quietly accept this violation of my privacy and dignity, college administrators told me I was the problem.
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn9cmteturprbaisqntoq2235pm1ufualo04blk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctim1or4clh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Please help me stop the radical Left from erasing true womanhood by submitting your _**[“I Will Not Be Silent” Reply](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrr0gbfnnlkcq7oan6g4ijii6qbejpm3rckvqrlo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctim1or4clh2bs)**_ right away. Your response is crucial because I was forced to undress every day in front of “Lia” (formerly Will) Thomas—a 6'4" male on the University of Pennsylvania women's swim team.And when I refused to quietly accept this violation of my privacy and dignity, **college administrators told me I was the problem.** Imagine being an 18-year-old girl stepping onto a college campus, eager to grow in wisdom, character, and strength.Instead, you're met with administrators, professors, and coaches who instruct you to:
---
| |
* Ignore biological truths plainly visible to your own eyes,
* Pretend it’s “fair” when men compete in women’s sports, and
* Welcome men into your locker rooms and other private spaces.

---
And if you dare to object, you’re warned: **stay silent—or face the consequences.** That’s what happened to me. To earn my place on the University of Pennsylvania’s NCAA Division I swim team, I began training in elementary school—eventually swimming twice a day and logging up to 50,000 yards per week in high school.College recruiters praised my drive and discipline, telling me my work ethic would open doors far beyond the pool. So I was stunned when college administrators disregarded those same standards and instead celebrated my male teammate—who had ranked in the 400s and 500s nationally on the men’s team—as “brave” and “heroic” for switching to the women’s team, where he instantly became one of the top-ranked “female” swimmers in the country.When I voiced my concerns, administrators shut me down. They told me it was “non-negotiable” that this man would compete alongside me—and undress beside me in the women’s locker room.They didn’t fix the injustice. They offered me **“psychological services”** to help me accept it. Then came their “advice”: _“Be a team player. Don’t get canceled for being a bigot.”_ But I was raised to stand up for what is right, good, and true.
How could I stay silent and support a lie—knowing that if I gave in, the next generation of young women would pay the price?Would you want your daughter, sister, or granddaughter to remain quiet in that moment? Or would you want her to have the courage to speak the truth?Unfortunately, the social pressure these Leftists are putting on young women is working all too often.**In fact, o****ver 60% of young women (ages 18-29) are not just silent when it comes to radical woke policies but publicly support them** \-- the same policies that have degraded and harmed them by depriving them of their rights to safety, privacy, and equal opportunity.Leftists gloat that young women are a lost cause. **Don’t believe it. That’s just another lie.** Yes, many young women say they’re “liberal.” But under the surface liberalism you find when it comes to **marriage, motherhood, finances, and crime** , these same young women express **strong, naturally conservative instincts** —ones they’ve **abandoned or hid out of fear of conflict.** In other words: **they’re not a lost cause. They’re just silenced and indoctrinated.** But the time for sitting back while radicals reshape our young women, campuses, and culture is over.**You and I must stand up—and make it clear: we will not be silenced.** **[That’s why I’m asking you to submit your “I Will Not Be Silent” Reply right away.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpckvu6oiq67psgapm825st8j23gs178qm1gkeeg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctim1or4clh2bs)** When I reflect on everything I experienced, I no longer wonder how this happened.**It happened because too many people stayed silent.** Too many leaders—people entrusted with protecting young women—chose cowardice over courage, conformity over truth.And beneath their failure lies something even more dangerous: a radical ideology that has taken root in our institutions.An ideology that tells girls truth and morality are relative.That faith and family are oppressive. That their worth depends on blind allegiance to the woke agenda—And that anyone who dares to dissent will be cast out, condemned, and forgotten.You and I know this is a lie. But tragically, many young women are falling for it. And that’s exactly why the **Clare Boothe Luce Center for Conservative Women** exists—to embolden these women, to equip them, and to show them they’re not alone.[**That’s why I need you to submit your “I Will Not Be Silent” Reply right now....**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8lb9smad0gbpu0hs5cq4r06sdrfsc46sjco5es0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctim1or4clh2bs) UPenn and the NCAA gave “Lia” Thomas a platform to push a harmful agenda. Now the **Luce Center** is giving women like **Riley Gaines** and me a platform to speak the truth. For more than 30 years, with support from patriots like you, the **Luce Center** has been reaching young women on college campuses to prepare and support them in standing up for their conservative values against the attacks of the radical Left.
---
**#1. They’re giving students a platform to share their beliefs.**
---
Guest lecturers on college campuses are overwhelmingly liberal.Studies have proven this anti-conservative bias, with both liberals and conservatives attesting to the fact.That’s why the **Luce Center** helps students host campus lectures featuring conservative guest speakers like **Abby Johnson, Riley Gaines, Allie Beth Stuckey, Kristan Hawkins, Liz Wheeler, KT McFarland** and myself. The **Luce Center** was the first organization to host **Riley Gaine** s and me as speakers to fight in defense of women’s sports and privacy. And in March, I gave a **Luce Center** campus lecture at the University of California, Berkeley. It was an incredible experience talking with young women about the importance of courageously speaking out for the truth despite the overwhelming pressure the culture uses to silence you. [**When you give $35 or more to the Luce Center**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1ppodi1cn896u5pprhep7ljhuo5odmjk4mavp1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctim1or4clh2bs), you’re making sure young women can discuss and share their conservative values with other students on campus and overcome the blatant anti-conservative bias.
---
**#2. They’re fostering community and friendships.**
---
My time at UPenn left me feeling isolated and fearful to share my beliefs.But when I saw Riley Gaines - a fellow female collegiate swimmer who competed and tied with “Lia” Thomas - speaking publicly about her experience, I knew I didn't have to be silent. That’s why the **Luce Center** prioritizes hosting National Student Summits giving young conservative women the chance to meet likeminded peers who will help strengthen each other as they battle against the radical ideology in today’s culture. [**When you give $35 or more to the Luce Center**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z91ra6p1v4jshu4h7m9hcuk1sqma47bl2tbgcte0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctim1or4clh2bs), you help foster friendships and community among young conservative women when they need it most.
---
**#3. They’re training young women to actively fight back against the Left’s harmful agenda.**
---
It isn’t enough for us to create barriers to keep the lies of the Left out. We must root out the radical ideology from our colleges, government institutions, and culture.Which is why the Luce Center offers Summer, Fall, and Spring internships for young women to strengthen them in their fundamental patriotic American values.As interns they receive expert led training in...
---
* Public speaking
* Journalism
* Constitutional Law
* Professional Firearms
* And etiquette

---
[**When you give $35 or more to the Luce Center** ,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z25n1dub04q80ft37d9taman3pqmsgt8hpog57eg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctim1or4clh2bs) you’re helping the Luce Center in equipping young women with the necessary skills, knowledge, and connections they need to be leaders on the front line in the fight against the radical Left. After hearing all the great work they do, I know you probably want to fund a National Student Summit or Campus Lecture on your own, but all I’m asking you to do is to _**[_**support the Luce center with your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsadss989stn1tnp0oefmsmddcbf1km46vp7h0so_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctim1or4clh2bs)**_. Please give whatever you can, whether it's smaller or larger, because the **Luce Center** is up against the bottomless pockets of the radical Left and the woke universities. Now more than ever, we need conservatives willing to stand up and fight against the radical indoctrination of young women. And I've seen firsthand how the **Luce Center** has helped hundreds of young women across the country to do just that. They've done incredible work, but they can't do it alone.**Please don't let us lose another generation of women to the Left!** Thank you for taking the time to read my story and for joining me in supporting the young women of America.Sincerely,
---
Paula Scanlan
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsb73o4urrqk2j6nl6nkrgt49uaqqgeko19k1i8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctim1or4clh2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3h4uc897p5c9ifmgmkfms5doe2gfmajt4ddve1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctim1or4clh2bs)
---
|
---
| | P.S. The Left is stealing the hearts and minds of the young women across our country through manipulation and lies. I experienced their tactics firsthand when I was forced to undress every day in front of a 6'4'' man at UPenn. We need to stop the Left's attack and support conservative young women to stand strong in their beliefs.**[You can make an impact today by rushing back your gift of $35 or more to the Luce Center for Conservative Women!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1ta842br95vh46e70need7hv4n3vcugfkaob7uo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7ctim1or4clh2bs)** We can't lose another generation of women to the Left. Thank you for your support!

clean_body: When I refused to quietly accept this violation of my privacy and dignity, college administrators told me I was the problem. | | | When I refused to quietly accept this violation of my privacy and dignity, college administrators told me I was the problem. | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Please help me stop the radical Left from erasing true womanhood by submitting your right away. Your response is crucial because I was forced to undress every day in front of “Lia” (formerly Will) Thomas—a 6'4" male on the University of Pennsylvania women's swim team.And when I refused to quietly accept this violation of my privacy and dignity, college administrators told me I was the problem. Imagine being an 18-year-old girl stepping onto a college campus, eager to grow in wisdom, character, and strength.Instead, you're met with administrators, professors, and coaches who instruct you to: | | Ignore biological truths plainly visible to your own eyes, Pretend it’s “fair” when men compete in women’s sports, and Welcome men into your locker rooms and other private spaces. And if you dare to object, you’re warned: stay silent—or face the consequences. That’s what happened to me. To earn my place on the University of Pennsylvania’s NCAA Division I swim team, I began training in elementary school—eventually swimming twice a day and logging up to 50,000 yards per week in high school.College recruiters praised my drive and discipline, telling me my work ethic would open doors far beyond the pool. So I was stunned when college administrators disregarded those same standards and instead celebrated my male teammate—who had ranked in the 400s and 500s nationally on the men’s team—as “brave” and “heroic” for switching to the women’s team, where he instantly became one of the top-ranked “female” swimmers in the country.When I voiced my concerns, administrators shut me down. They told me it was “non-negotiable” that this man would compete alongside me—and undress beside me in the women’s locker room.They didn’t fix the injustice. They offered me “psychological services” to help me accept it. Then came their “advice”: “Be a team player. Don’t get canceled for being a bigot.” But I was raised to stand up for what is right, good, and true. How could I stay silent and support a lie—knowing that if I gave in, the next generation of young women would pay the price?Would you want your daughter, sister, or granddaughter to remain quiet in that moment? Or would you want her to have the courage to speak the truth?Unfortunately, the social pressure these Leftists are putting on young women is working all too often.In fact, o**ver 60% of young women (ages 18-29) are not just silent when it comes to radical woke policies but publicly support them \-- the same policies that have degraded and harmed them by depriving them of their rights to safety, privacy, and equal opportunity.Leftists gloat that young women are a lost cause. Don’t believe it. That’s just another lie. Yes, many young women say they’re “liberal.” But under the surface liberalism you find when it comes to marriage, motherhood, finances, and crime , these same young women express strong, naturally conservative instincts —ones they’ve abandoned or hid out of fear of conflict. In other words: they’re not a lost cause. They’re just silenced and indoctrinated. But the time for sitting back while radicals reshape our young women, campuses, and culture is over.You and I must stand up—and make it clear: we will not be silenced. When I reflect on everything I experienced, I no longer wonder how this happened.It happened because too many people stayed silent. Too many leaders—people entrusted with protecting young women—chose cowardice over courage, conformity over truth.And beneath their failure lies something even more dangerous: a radical ideology that has taken root in our institutions.An ideology that tells girls truth and morality are relative.That faith and family are oppressive. That their worth depends on blind allegiance to the woke agenda—And that anyone who dares to dissent will be cast out, condemned, and forgotten.You and I know this is a lie. But tragically, many young women are falling for it. And that’s exactly why the Clare Boothe Luce Center for Conservative Women exists—to embolden these women, to equip them, and to show them they’re not alone. UPenn and the NCAA gave “Lia” Thomas a platform to push a harmful agenda. Now the Luce Center is giving women like Riley Gaines and me a platform to speak the truth. For more than 30 years, with support from patriots like you, the Luce Center has been reaching young women on college campuses to prepare and support them in standing up for their conservative values against the attacks of the radical Left. #1. They’re giving students a platform to share their beliefs. Guest lecturers on college campuses are overwhelmingly liberal.Studies have proven this anti-conservative bias, with both liberals and conservatives attesting to the fact.That’s why the Luce Center helps students host campus lectures featuring conservative guest speakers like Abby Johnson, Riley Gaines, Allie Beth Stuckey, Kristan Hawkins, Liz Wheeler, KT McFarland and myself. The Luce Center was the first organization to host Riley Gaine s and me as speakers to fight in defense of women’s sports and privacy. And in March, I gave a Luce Center campus lecture at the University of California, Berkeley. It was an incredible experience talking with young women about the importance of courageously speaking out for the truth despite the overwhelming pressure the culture uses to silence you. , you’re making sure young women can discuss and share their conservative values with other students on campus and overcome the blatant anti-conservative bias. #2. They’re fostering community and friendships. My time at UPenn left me feeling isolated and fearful to share my beliefs.But when I saw Riley Gaines - a fellow female collegiate swimmer who competed and tied with “Lia” Thomas - speaking publicly about her experience, I knew I didn't have to be silent. That’s why the Luce Center prioritizes hosting National Student Summits giving young conservative women the chance to meet likeminded peers who will help strengthen each other as they battle against the radical ideology in today’s culture. , you help foster friendships and community among young conservative women when they need it most. #3. They’re training young women to actively fight back against the Left’s harmful agenda. It isn’t enough for us to create barriers to keep the lies of the Left out. We must root out the radical ideology from our colleges, government institutions, and culture.Which is why the Luce Center offers Summer, Fall, and Spring internships for young women to strengthen them in their fundamental patriotic American values.As interns they receive expert led training in... Public speaking Journalism Constitutional Law Professional Firearms And etiquette you’re helping the Luce Center in equipping young women with the necessary skills, knowledge, and connections they need to be leaders on the front line in the fight against the radical Left. After hearing all the great work they do, I know you probably want to fund a National Student Summit or Campus Lecture on your own, but all I’m asking you to do is to . Please give whatever you can, whether it's smaller or larger, because the Luce Center is up against the bottomless pockets of the radical Left and the woke universities. Now more than ever, we need conservatives willing to stand up and fight against the radical indoctrination of young women. And I've seen firsthand how the Luce Center has helped hundreds of young women across the country to do just that. They've done incredible work, but they can't do it alone.Please don't let us lose another generation of women to the Left! Thank you for taking the time to read my story and for joining me in supporting the young women of America.Sincerely, Paula Scanlan | | | | | P.S. The Left is stealing the hearts and minds of the young women across our country through manipulation and lies. I experienced their tactics firsthand when I was forced to undress every day in front of a 6'4'' man at UPenn. We need to stop the Left's attack and support conservative young women to stand strong in their beliefs.** We can't lose another generation of women to the Left. Thank you for your support! name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: 14 days
body:
Peter, TWO WEEKS. That’s how long we have until early voting starts. I’ll cut to the chase. I need to know 100% that you are planning to vote in the New Jersey Primary. We NEED your voice and your vote if we’re goi
| | [ ]()
---
Peter, TWO WEEKS. That’s how long we have until early voting starts. I’ll cut to the chase. I need to know 100% that you are planning to vote in the New Jersey Primary. We NEED your voice and your vote if we’re going to kick out the lemons and save our state from Left Wing Lunacy. **Please,_please_ take the pledge **(and if you have already – I see you, and THANK you! 😉 Instead, please forward this to a friend in NJ).
---
[ **I PLEDGE to vote in the NJ Primary** ](https://xtz223.keap-link007.com/v2/click/6198f302a2df689901c476208c13c91a/eJyNj00LgkAURf_LW0vmZzE7EZFBcyG1DmsGGrJxGJ-Sif-9scJVQdt3zz2POwJyWUmkDAjc8eG6Hlig-VkowSXGjcTq_ErdwHc8x4JayGuqm04BGb-WF2A-h17gW4CD4gbZl1Gc0SI95rTIDKkqbX785Qk263DxJLuI5jBNP8X8JjDpjbsFgrrj8yImzCo86NrwF0TVEts-CVzVg-2zqC23vSlWSnHJPqszPrzr0xPv9V7q)
---
Once you’ve taken the pledge, make a plan to vote early. Don’t wait til Election Day. It’s too risky. You might be sick. Your car could break down. There could be long lines or problems at your polling place.
**Your vote is too important to risk it.** **Early Voting Details**
🗓️ **When?** Tuesday, June 3, 2025 – Sunday, June 8, 2025;
🕙 **Times?** Tuesday-Saturday, 10:00 a.m.–8:00 p.m. and Sunday, 10:00 a.m.–6:00 p.m.
🤔 **Do I need an appointment?** No appointment is necessary!
📍**Where?** Find your locations by county [here >>](https://xtz223.keap-link007.com/v2/click/604e934d5ef6b12afb802f07cdb63f95/eJyNkMGKwkAMht8l5-qsrXWhNxGRUvUgel4GG3R0zAwzsVil7250l93LCt5C8uULf27ASJq4rKGAC1_TNIMEAm6NN0g8ccR6-5ym-XCQDRKwho6z4M4eitu_y7_Aoz3K8lEC3HoUZL0aT6pyOfual8tKSK-D3HjLk39-_Hmmi3E5h657KcaT4Wkj7ggFhzM-EtVGUvEmWOH3zD4WStGhv3ONiqwZFVqZG0dRNY6xhzrYtieloV0_7vlkRay9R6p_vlJh-63v7tcwbAc=) Thank you for doing your part to save our state. After this primary, I hope we can say WAYYYY more than 22% of Common Sense voters engaged. That’s how we turn this around. Let’s go! For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
| [ ]()
---
President
Common Sense Club
---
|
---
Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsenseclub.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsenseclub.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.
---
[Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/27675842/baa95e35a71af86a) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
A Memorial Day to Remember
-It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. -It's Gary Sinise here... -I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.

| | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=98616d8f49124dc5bb8a6795222f639c&_e=qCi4phIWNGU6YxISRdbQ8FKGp0JvOGk5dPr-dlgK_KUN3Z5FoWXozlohOertJGGv-FVocNbhbs9j1WnE9LNnMpXhYA9l6ARJGpKcHB4HQvbM6HoF4sfYgfYIcgJuyLnoDPEchiiW_VBP0XK97kFRwax8MrCSWFVYqXEEDiQh9FyI1YjQvxIvy_gQ5jmT3g3-WidTEIDPIPpMPhaqgNqVncqVKd1QvKAvwvPy5tHdBL4LJrPApPdLRb3_e3NjjeOAOx0hQI6pkepjOIrQSvMSnQ14NWJtvufmpRf-W7mOpqFaK6I_I9yrzUS7M0dYRalG)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life. It inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I am now back again this year as Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. as we celebrate the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=98616d8f49124dc5bb8a6795222f639c&_e=qCi4phIWNGU6YxISRdbQ8FKGp0JvOGk5dPr-dlgK_KUN3Z5FoWXozlohOertJGGv-FVocNbhbs9j1WnE9LNnMpXhYA9l6ARJGpKcHB4HQvbM6HoF4sfYgfYIcgJuyLnoDPEchiiW_VBP0XK97kFRwax8MrCSWFVYqXEEDiQh9FyJDXpV4XvTlQdVRGnhJ7y0w6mmRuqsQFuWmZX8wLTVOS8d7F_k_xLESizsEZSwS-Mj4bvvbZhrZqeelh62s_O6Si-8zmsom8AsRg1zG1X0SkW7w2RFuwGJYqMajDEDi1ijeKpMG-0f_n1WnrJaqJC9)
---
[**Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=98616d8f49124dc5bb8a6795222f639c&_e=qCi4phIWNGU6YxISRdbQ8FKGp0JvOGk5dPr-dlgK_KUN3Z5FoWXozlohOertJGGv-FVocNbhbs9j1WnE9LNnMpXhYA9l6ARJGpKcHB4HQvbM6HoF4sfYgfYIcgJuyLnoDPEchiiW_VBP0XK97kFRwax8MrCSWFVYqXEEDiQh9FwDEtfAhuJ79pDC_jZFX7hCWpnOfrr27eQl4m2sFgeekBCyxx8txzfvwlAAXqbNtBmHAzz0FVbNQo1_x2hpKqs4x8sPA77PoN8Nl8EPnV_yY4gvbo2HIqknmG8RPuCVDGJqrQqAPdK938nIMoGhzi4P) The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year, but its significance is miles apart. _Every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for in our effort to honor those who sacrificed for our country._ **American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded**** _entirely_****by private citizens like you.** [**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=98616d8f49124dc5bb8a6795222f639c&_e=qCi4phIWNGU6YxISRdbQ8FKGp0JvOGk5dPr-dlgK_KUN3Z5FoWXozlohOertJGGv-FVocNbhbs9j1WnE9LNnMpXhYA9l6ARJGpKcHB4HQvbM6HoF4sfYgfYIcgJuyLnoDPEchiiW_VBP0XK97kFRwax8MrCSWFVYqXEEDiQh9Fw-BbYLLvS8aSmRm48LDiVKyoVl0yPy24n-hri86ldVF2trI1P0kZXgV3kxNSn8pXN-KP3ujHWIPFkbJFLgrYoC1yMIZD2gvXpeQOpW9SWMUgrGxG99grcrJxczGJNEt7a86_AU7pDU9Qhxi8khDaAp) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._ **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time.**
---
[ **Support the American Veterans Center**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=98616d8f49124dc5bb8a6795222f639c&_e=qCi4phIWNGU6YxISRdbQ8FKGp0JvOGk5dPr-dlgK_KUN3Z5FoWXozlohOertJGGv-FVocNbhbs9j1WnE9LNnMpXhYA9l6ARJGpKcHB4HQvbM6HoF4sfYgfYIcgJuyLnoDPEchiiW_VBP0XK97kFRwax8MrCSWFVYqXEEDiQh9FykNEKlItY1u5X4G2wocGfbhYKvZmXJbuCH27iguVz3lA_mRo64KMOOHyC8ZPSCtah3vD9MCGukfxhqRez3N5kaxJhk2GN8-NXVK6SYUUqlM_wX5etaDq2DRRfYykVyZYxZzWUskvAl1b35YtwOMxzQ)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. [**Friend, thank you for your support of America 's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=98616d8f49124dc5bb8a6795222f639c&_e=qCi4phIWNGU6YxISRdbQ8FKGp0JvOGk5dPr-dlgK_KUN3Z5FoWXozlohOertJGGv-FVocNbhbs9j1WnE9LNnMpXhYA9l6ARJGpKcHB4HQvbM6HoF4sfYgfYIcgJuyLnoDPEchiiW_VBP0XK97kFRwax8MrCSWFVYqXEEDiQh9Fxn6-ZiS4E6R1pPOSacZrAWTcjcWjes-VaPTIMCV4b_6MfpyDNuO92O8BzmHqi6MoiXB68rdcuYpMmA3vvG5mlnL_jt2cwQ_qaEjRND7u_NZirBS5L5swvHNJWEHwXGaS5isvbGy384GTNeGpO2tXto) Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[ **Support the American Veterans Center**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=98616d8f49124dc5bb8a6795222f639c&_e=qCi4phIWNGU6YxISRdbQ8FKGp0JvOGk5dPr-dlgK_KUN3Z5FoWXozlohOertJGGv-FVocNbhbs9j1WnE9LNnMpXhYA9l6ARJGpKcHB4HQvbM6HoF4sfYgfYIcgJuyLnoDPEchiiW_VBP0XK97kFRwax8MrCSWFVYqXEEDiQh9FxTfYjE8b6J6t4v8xn1Zap2rfIj-5dyCuFk06z3vQ_g-zZ5XhK600wj4jl-xPUTh72w9bzkUvLJyLP09tXrjNyS96Ktv8uzh7jh_qRO7ySVnhv_VX_7spOEghXKHGkVJVElINnpNoLxeDkf43R4ihLF)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

I am now back again this year as Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. as we celebrate the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year, but its significance is miles apart. Every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for in our effort to honor those who sacrificed for our country. American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirelyby private citizens like you. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

body:
We're on the brink of disaster.

Friend - This is Senator Eric Schmitt. **
**I don't usually send emails like this, but the situation is dire. **
**We're on the brink of disaster. The Democrats are waging an all-out war on the America First agenda, and we're running out of time.**
**As a top ally of President Trump in the U.S. Senate, I'm fighting tooth and nail to defend our values, our freedom, and our way of life. **
**But the radical Left is pulling out all the stops to take us down.**
**They're amassing a war chest of millions to defeat us and silence patriots like you. They're using every dirty trick in the book to undermine President Trump's agenda and restore their grip on power.**
**If we don't act IMMEDIATELY, everything we have worked so hard for will be DESTROYED, and all hope will be LOST. The America First agenda will be dead in its tracks, and our country will be forever changed.**
**We can't let them win. We must act NOW to defend our agenda and our country. That's why I'm coming straight to you today with an urgent plea for help.**
**We need to raise the funds necessary to take on the radical Left and secure our victories once and for all. Trust me when I say that every single dollar counts when the stakes are this high.**
**That's why I'm sounding the alarm.
I'm asking you, Friend, to dig deep and give what you can. name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: If you knew…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
Please, really think about it.
#

We have a question for you, Peter. And please — really think about it.
If you knew — and we mean really knew — that a $5 contribution meant Jon Ossoff would win re-election in the closest and most expensive Senate race of the midterms, wouldn't you be likely to make that donation?
And what if you knew that same $5 meant Democrats would retake the Senate and be able to stop Trump's legislative agenda for the next two years, wouldn't it be $5 well-spent?
We'll be upfront: it probably doesn't seem like $5 can do both of those things. After all, it seems like just $5 in the face of millions and millions?
But the truth is, as you read this, there are lots of people like you who share these goals who have already given their $5 today.
Now they are hoping you'll do the same. Especially because Senator Ossoff's fundraising has slowed a bit since Marjorie Taylor Greene said she wasn't running.
**[If re-electing Jon Ossoff and regaining control of the Senate to stop Trump's agenda seems worth $5 today, that's the contribution we're asking you to make. Help Senator Ossoff catch up on his fundraising goals.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may25.ZUBy2n&refcode=em250520&t=1&akid=360%2E5691347%2EHcDWbc)

Rob had a busy week in Washington and is voting on what’s best for NEPA. He is in our nation’s capital fighting for all Northeastern Pennsylvanians to try and preserve the TCJA Tax Cuts, and keep Medicaid for citizens who truly deserve it.

name: Eric Schmitt
subject: I don’t usually send messages like this, but this situation is DIRE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schmitt for Senate
body:
We're on the brink of disaster.

Friend - This is Senator Eric Schmitt. **
**I don't usually send emails like this, but the situation is dire. **
**We're on the brink of disaster. The Democrats are waging an all-out war on the America First agenda, and we're running out of time.**
**As a top ally of President Trump in the U.S. Senate, I'm fighting tooth and nail to defend our values, our freedom, and our way of life. **
**But the radical Left is pulling out all the stops to take us down.**
**They're amassing a war chest of millions to defeat us and silence patriots like you. They're using every dirty trick in the book to undermine President Trump's agenda and restore their grip on power.**
**If we don't act IMMEDIATELY, everything we have worked so hard for will be DESTROYED, and all hope will be LOST. The America First agenda will be dead in its tracks, and our country will be forever changed.**
**We can't let them win. We must act NOW to defend our agenda and our country. That's why I'm coming straight to you today with an urgent plea for help.**
**We need to raise the funds necessary to take on the radical Left and secure our victories once and for all. Trust me when I say that every single dollar counts when the stakes are this high.**
**That's why I'm sounding the alarm.
I'm asking you, Friend, to dig deep and give what you can. [Can you chip in $25, $10, or even just $5 RIGHT NOW to help reach our next upcoming fundraising goal and SAVE the America First agenda?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq5rpljvmd3elfmvj234eob4cqnv3ou79b363ho0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cthm4oj4clh2bs)[CHIP IN NOW | SAVE THE AMERICA FIRST AGENDA >>
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhq53fhpl24eagimsruoc8br977kjfm66b84e2jo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cthm4oj4clh2bs)If we don't meet each and every one of our critical fundraising goals, the media will declare the America First agenda dead, and our momentum will be lost. We can't let that happen.
[Please, Friend, rush an emergency donation now to ensure we have the resources necessary to fight back against anything the Left throws our way.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zeup9j93cb4cfmkhoentb4fb145h2k8al5km2aro_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cthm4oj4clh2bs)
Together, we can keep the MAGA momentum surging strong and ensure the SUCCESS of President Trump's agenda once and for all.
Thank you in advance,
Eric Schmitt [MAGA Senator from Missouri]| | |

name: Paula Scanlan
subject: I will not be silent
body:
When I refused to quietly accept this violation of my privacy and dignity, college administrators told me I was the problem.

| | | When I refused to quietly accept this violation of my privacy and dignity, college administrators told me I was the problem.
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdist8amgnuv1gf56lrjsm8kvi15vq5asqkse398_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cthm4oj4clh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Please help me stop the radical Left from erasing true womanhood by submitting your _**[“I Will Not Be Silent” Reply](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z55f0ui1m095080g83ak5d0k87ud0lupctqnp3j0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cthm4oj4clh2bs)**_ right away. Your response is crucial because I was forced to undress every day in front of “Lia” (formerly Will) Thomas—a 6'4" male on the University of Pennsylvania women's swim team.And when I refused to quietly accept this violation of my privacy and dignity, **college administrators told me I was the problem.** Imagine being an 18-year-old girl stepping onto a college campus, eager to grow in wisdom, character, and strength.Instead, you're met with administrators, professors, and coaches who instruct you to:
---
| |
* Ignore biological truths plainly visible to your own eyes,
* Pretend it’s “fair” when men compete in women’s sports, and
* Welcome men into your locker rooms and other private spaces.

---
And if you dare to object, you’re warned: **stay silent—or face the consequences.** That’s what happened to me. To earn my place on the University of Pennsylvania’s NCAA Division I swim team, I began training in elementary school—eventually swimming twice a day and logging up to 50,000 yards per week in high school.College recruiters praised my drive and discipline, telling me my work ethic would open doors far beyond the pool. So I was stunned when college administrators disregarded those same standards and instead celebrated my male teammate—who had ranked in the 400s and 500s nationally on the men’s team—as “brave” and “heroic” for switching to the women’s team, where he instantly became one of the top-ranked “female” swimmers in the country.When I voiced my concerns, administrators shut me down. They told me it was “non-negotiable” that this man would compete alongside me—and undress beside me in the women’s locker room.They didn’t fix the injustice. They offered me **“psychological services”** to help me accept it. Then came their “advice”: _“Be a team player. Don’t get canceled for being a bigot.”_ But I was raised to stand up for what is right, good, and true.
How could I stay silent and support a lie—knowing that if I gave in, the next generation of young women would pay the price?Would you want your daughter, sister, or granddaughter to remain quiet in that moment? Or would you want her to have the courage to speak the truth?Unfortunately, the social pressure these Leftists are putting on young women is working all too often.**In fact, o****ver 60% of young women (ages 18-29) are not just silent when it comes to radical woke policies but publicly support them** \-- the same policies that have degraded and harmed them by depriving them of their rights to safety, privacy, and equal opportunity.Leftists gloat that young women are a lost cause. **Don’t believe it. That’s just another lie.** Yes, many young women say they’re “liberal.” But under the surface liberalism you find when it comes to **marriage, motherhood, finances, and crime** , these same young women express **strong, naturally conservative instincts** —ones they’ve **abandoned or hid out of fear of conflict.** In other words: **they’re not a lost cause. They’re just silenced and indoctrinated.** But the time for sitting back while radicals reshape our young women, campuses, and culture is over.**You and I must stand up—and make it clear: we will not be silenced.** **[That’s why I’m asking you to submit your “I Will Not Be Silent” Reply right away.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zphl1cu687g30qpkpab65mueikknk56oq1f07hdg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cthm4oj4clh2bs)** When I reflect on everything I experienced, I no longer wonder how this happened.**It happened because too many people stayed silent.** Too many leaders—people entrusted with protecting young women—chose cowardice over courage, conformity over truth.And beneath their failure lies something even more dangerous: a radical ideology that has taken root in our institutions.An ideology that tells girls truth and morality are relative.That faith and family are oppressive. That their worth depends on blind allegiance to the woke agenda—And that anyone who dares to dissent will be cast out, condemned, and forgotten.You and I know this is a lie. But tragically, many young women are falling for it. And that’s exactly why the **Clare Boothe Luce Center for Conservative Women** exists—to embolden these women, to equip them, and to show them they’re not alone.[**That’s why I need you to submit your “I Will Not Be Silent” Reply right now....**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg51lj2kn1onijfmhro5lqhqri1lcc1n0caii8qo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cthm4oj4clh2bs) UPenn and the NCAA gave “Lia” Thomas a platform to push a harmful agenda. Now the **Luce Center** is giving women like **Riley Gaines** and me a platform to speak the truth. For more than 30 years, with support from patriots like you, the **Luce Center** has been reaching young women on college campuses to prepare and support them in standing up for their conservative values against the attacks of the radical Left.
---
**#1. They’re giving students a platform to share their beliefs.**
---
Guest lecturers on college campuses are overwhelmingly liberal.Studies have proven this anti-conservative bias, with both liberals and conservatives attesting to the fact.That’s why the **Luce Center** helps students host campus lectures featuring conservative guest speakers like **Abby Johnson, Riley Gaines, Allie Beth Stuckey, Kristan Hawkins, Liz Wheeler, KT McFarland** and myself. The **Luce Center** was the first organization to host **Riley Gaine** s and me as speakers to fight in defense of women’s sports and privacy. And in March, I gave a **Luce Center** campus lecture at the University of California, Berkeley. It was an incredible experience talking with young women about the importance of courageously speaking out for the truth despite the overwhelming pressure the culture uses to silence you. [**When you give $35 or more to the Luce Center**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7oa58fobu9ohmh1dkintd11p198e8h68ricm9oo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cthm4oj4clh2bs), you’re making sure young women can discuss and share their conservative values with other students on campus and overcome the blatant anti-conservative bias.
---
**#2. They’re fostering community and friendships.**
---
My time at UPenn left me feeling isolated and fearful to share my beliefs.But when I saw Riley Gaines - a fellow female collegiate swimmer who competed and tied with “Lia” Thomas - speaking publicly about her experience, I knew I didn't have to be silent. That’s why the **Luce Center** prioritizes hosting National Student Summits giving young conservative women the chance to meet likeminded peers who will help strengthen each other as they battle against the radical ideology in today’s culture. [**When you give $35 or more to the Luce Center**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdfovka3jppv64saang3h73736hfebeo1ds05c70_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cthm4oj4clh2bs), you help foster friendships and community among young conservative women when they need it most.
---
**#3. They’re training young women to actively fight back against the Left’s harmful agenda.**
---
It isn’t enough for us to create barriers to keep the lies of the Left out. We must root out the radical ideology from our colleges, government institutions, and culture.Which is why the Luce Center offers Summer, Fall, and Spring internships for young women to strengthen them in their fundamental patriotic American values.As interns they receive expert led training in...
---
* Public speaking
* Journalism
* Constitutional Law
* Professional Firearms
* And etiquette

---
[**When you give $35 or more to the Luce Center** ,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9igvged4b9cbc4t5shjubkvsefobp1mdql57sv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cthm4oj4clh2bs) you’re helping the Luce Center in equipping young women with the necessary skills, knowledge, and connections they need to be leaders on the front line in the fight against the radical Left. After hearing all the great work they do, I know you probably want to fund a National Student Summit or Campus Lecture on your own, but all I’m asking you to do is to _**[_**support the Luce center with your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5nt0u34bmntkikh404f9oorsv7c3emgpp8lenj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cthm4oj4clh2bs)**_. Please give whatever you can, whether it's smaller or larger, because the **Luce Center** is up against the bottomless pockets of the radical Left and the woke universities. Now more than ever, we need conservatives willing to stand up and fight against the radical indoctrination of young women. And I've seen firsthand how the **Luce Center** has helped hundreds of young women across the country to do just that. They've done incredible work, but they can't do it alone.**Please don't let us lose another generation of women to the Left!** Thank you for taking the time to read my story and for joining me in supporting the young women of America.Sincerely,
