subject: ACT NOW: Congress wants to greenlight violence against our clients
body:
A new attack on abortion access | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108049034/546674273/2141984067?sourceid=1150696&utm_campaign=25emaus-0503aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzlhZWQyYy1hMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WfzO4J3wANYsLp8Vu0SuLNQd_ZOkGwlaQcDfQcjJKgg=&emci=9d016e68-9b35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a39aed2c-a035-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108049035/546674274/2141984067?sourceid=1150696&utm_campaign=25emaus-0503aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzlhZWQyYy1hMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WfzO4J3wANYsLp8Vu0SuLNQd_ZOkGwlaQcDfQcjJKgg=&emci=9d016e68-9b35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a39aed2c-a035-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)
---|---
Peter,

Just days after a deadly bombing outside a fertility clinic in California, members of Congress are pushing to repeal the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act—[**the only federal law that protects reproductive health clinics and places of worship from violence and harassment.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108049036/546674275/734415106?sourceid=1150696&utm_campaign=25emaus-0503aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzlhZWQyYy1hMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WfzO4J3wANYsLp8Vu0SuLNQd_ZOkGwlaQcDfQcjJKgg=&emci=9d016e68-9b35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a39aed2c-a035-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) | [**SAY NO**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108049037/546674276/734415106?sourceid=1150696&utm_campaign=25emaus-0503aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzlhZWQyYy1hMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WfzO4J3wANYsLp8Vu0SuLNQd_ZOkGwlaQcDfQcjJKgg=&emci=9d016e68-9b35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a39aed2c-a035-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")
---
The FACE Act was passed in 1994 after a wave of anti-abortion violence, including the murder of Dr. David Gunn outside a clinic in Florida. The law made threatening patients or providers, or blocking access to care, a federal crime. But since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, attacks have skyrocketed—including almost 300 death threats or threats of harm. [**Repealing the FACE Act would say loud and clear: violence against patients and providers is no longer a federal crime.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108049038/546674277/734415106?sourceid=1150696&utm_campaign=25emaus-0503aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzlhZWQyYy1hMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WfzO4J3wANYsLp8Vu0SuLNQd_ZOkGwlaQcDfQcjJKgg=&emci=9d016e68-9b35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a39aed2c-a035-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)
[**TELL CONGRESS: NO REPEAL**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108049039/546674278/734415106?sourceid=1150696&utm_campaign=25emaus-0503aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzlhZWQyYy1hMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WfzO4J3wANYsLp8Vu0SuLNQd_ZOkGwlaQcDfQcjJKgg=&emci=9d016e68-9b35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a39aed2c-a035-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")
---
Earlier this year, President Trump pardoned multiple anti-abortion extremists convicted under the FACE Act. Some had broken into clinics, stolen fetal tissue, or harassed pregnant patients. [**Eight of them had targeted a Michigan clinic the Center for Reproductive Rights represents.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108049040/546674279/734415106?sourceid=1150696&utm_campaign=25emaus-0503aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzlhZWQyYy1hMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WfzO4J3wANYsLp8Vu0SuLNQd_ZOkGwlaQcDfQcjJKgg=&emci=9d016e68-9b35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a39aed2c-a035-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)

These pardons sent a clear and dangerous message: [**this kind of targeted violence is acceptable.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108049041/546674280/734415106?sourceid=1150696&utm_campaign=25emaus-0503aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzlhZWQyYy1hMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WfzO4J3wANYsLp8Vu0SuLNQd_ZOkGwlaQcDfQcjJKgg=&emci=9d016e68-9b35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a39aed2c-a035-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) Now Congress is trying to finish what he started by erasing the only federal protection clinics have left.

[**Repealing the FACE Act would endanger lives and embolden extremists. Demand your representative defend the FACE Act and protect people from violence.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108049042/546674281/734415106?sourceid=1150696&utm_campaign=25emaus-0503aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzlhZWQyYy1hMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WfzO4J3wANYsLp8Vu0SuLNQd_ZOkGwlaQcDfQcjJKgg=&emci=9d016e68-9b35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a39aed2c-a035-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)

In solidarity,

Center for Reproductive Rights

name: Jena for CO
subject: Did you see Jena’s profile in Vanity Fair?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Team,
Jena Griswold has never backed down from a fight—not against Trump, not against threats, and not when our democracy is on the line.
We wanted to ensure you saw this powerful Vanity Fair piece about her courage and why she’s running for Attorney General.
Read the article here. [https://www.vanityfair.com/news/story/jena-griswold-colorado-trump-death-threats]
Thanks,
Jena for CO

https://www.vanityfair.com/news/story/jena-griswold-colorado-trump-death-threats [https://www.vanityfair.com/news/story/jena-griswold-colorado-trump-death-threats]
Team —
As Colorado’s Secretary of State, Jena Griswold stood up to Donald Trump and MAGA extremists—defending our democracy, protecting our elections, and fighting for the truth. But that leadership comes at a cost.
In a powerful new profile by Vanity Fair, Jena opens up about the death threats she received, the harassment she endured, and why she refuses to be intimidated. Read the article here. [https://www.vanityfair.com/news/story/jena-griswold-colorado-trump-death-threats]
When Trump tried to overturn the 2020 election, Jena took him on.
When election deniers and conspiracy theorists attacked Colorado’s election systems, Jena responded with legislation to keep voters and election workers safe.
And when the Colorado Supreme Court ruled that Trump engaged in insurrection, Jena worked to uphold the Constitution, even in the face of threats to her life.
Now, Jena is running for Attorney General to continue the fight for justice and democracy in Colorado. She’s proven she won’t back down and is ready to do even more for our state. Read the Vanity Fair profile here. [https://www.vanityfair.com/news/story/jena-griswold-colorado-trump-death-threats]
Thanks for standing with her,
Team Griswold
Jena Griswold is running for Attorney General because Colorado needs a strong, proven leader in this critical moment. She'll stand up to Donald Trump to protect our rights and freedoms. She’ll fight for working- and middle-class Coloradans, hold big corporations accountable, and safeguard our land, air, and water.

name: Chris Taylor for Justice
subject: Breaking news: Judge Chris Taylor is running for a seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This race isn’t just about two different judges — it’s about two very different visions for Wisconsin’s future.
| Breaking news: **Judge Chris Taylor is running for the Wisconsin Supreme Court.**

[Before we say more, can you split $10 between this campaign and Voter Protection Project? We’re counting on grassroots support to win.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90249?t=6&akid=19898%2E878179%2EY6zy8t)

Friend, Chris has spent her entire career fighting for our freedoms. As a lawyer, public servant, and now as a judge, she’s never backed down from a tough fight.

**Today, Chris is stepping up once again — because our rights, our democracy, and our courts are under attack.**

Our opponent, Rebecca Bradley, embodies the division and extremism threatening everything we care about.

Bradley has sided time and again with right-wing special interests, opposing reproductive freedom, undermining workers’ rights, and threatening our democracy. She has turned her back on Wisconsinites.

This race isn’t just about two different judges. It’s about two very different visions for Wisconsin’s future and the importance of a fair and impartial Wisconsin Supreme Court.

If we’re going to compete with the right-wing money machine, we need a massive show of grassroots strength.

**During the last Wisconsin Supreme Court election, Elon Musk spent over _$20 million_ trying to buy a seat on our Supreme Court.**

If Elon Musk and other right-wing special interests get involved again, we need to be ready for everything they’ll throw at us. That’s why we’re asking:

[Can you become a founding donor by splitting a donation of $10 between our campaign and Voter Protection Project now?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90249?t=7&akid=19898%2E878179%2EY6zy8t) If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Chris Taylor for Justice and VPP will go through immediately. | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90251?t=8&akid=19898%2E878179%2EY6zy8t)

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90249?t=12&akid=19898%2E878179%2EY6zy8t)
Thank you,

Team Taylor
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19898%2E878179%2EY6zy8t). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19898%2E878179%2EY6zy8t).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19898%2E878179%2EY6zy8t) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=19898%2E878179%2EY6zy8t). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19898%2E878179%2EY6zy8t)

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: The End Price Gouging for Medications Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
On average, Americans spend over $1,400 on prescription drugs every year.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108049225/546674935/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDc1ZDVjMi1hMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jmW3BOJ-LbDhuryI8vJJGdA8xIFHueA72APwckRlISY=&emci=7186aaba-a035-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=8475d5c2-a035-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Americans are getting price-gouged at the pharmacy. We pay the highest prices in the world for prescription drugs, even though our tax dollars fund most of the cutting-edge research and development. On average, Americans spend over $1,400 on prescription drugs every year — the highest per capita drug spending in the world — largely because the pharmaceutical industry is ripping us off to make billions and billions in profits each year. _That is unconscionable._ In my town halls across every corner of the state, I've heard over and over from Oregonians about how sky-high prescription drug prices are pushing their budgets to the limit, often forcing them to make hard choices between paying for needed medicine and paying for groceries or rent. **I introduced the End Price Gouging for Medications Act to crack down on Big Pharma's greed.** The U.S. leads the world in prescription drug research — we should get the best prices on prescription drugs, not the worst. People want action on costs, and that's why my bill has bipartisan support. It would force Big Pharma to charge Americans no more than they charge for prescription drugs in other developed countries similar to the United States. Trump says he wants to lower drug costs. He should prove it by working with Congress to get it done. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

clean_body: On average, Americans spend over $1,400 on prescription drugs every year. | | | | Americans are getting price-gouged at the pharmacy. We pay the highest prices in the world for prescription drugs, even though our tax dollars fund most of the cutting-edge research and development. On average, Americans spend over $1,400 on prescription drugs every year — the highest per capita drug spending in the world — largely because the pharmaceutical industry is ripping us off to make billions and billions in profits each year. That is unconscionable. In my town halls across every corner of the state, I've heard over and over from Oregonians about how sky-high prescription drug prices are pushing their budgets to the limit, often forcing them to make hard choices between paying for needed medicine and paying for groceries or rent. I introduced the End Price Gouging for Medications Act to crack down on Big Pharma's greed. The U.S. leads the world in prescription drug research — we should get the best prices on prescription drugs, not the worst. People want action on costs, and that's why my bill has bipartisan support. It would force Big Pharma to charge Americans no more than they charge for prescription drugs in other developed countries similar to the United States. Trump says he wants to lower drug costs. He should prove it by working with Congress to get it done. Onward! name: Stand with Bernie on Gaza via Our Revolution
subject: Mass starvation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

The level of human suffering underway in Gaza has reached catastrophic
proportions. 53,000 have been killed. 2 million are slowly starving to
death. Every single day, more children die from bombs or starvation.

And it’s about to, somehow, get even worse. Netanyahu just launched a
major new ground offensive, saying that Israel plans to “take control of
the entire Gaza Strip.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29329?source=email-20250520&t=1031&akid=8507%2E5885482%2EbQa_SQ ]Headline: Israel plans full takeover of Gaza Strip, Netanyahu says

We have to do something NOW. And Bernie is leading the way with a path
forward to end our government’s backing of Netanyahu’s devastating,
immoral war.

Congress continues sending BILLIONS in weapons to enable the endless
destruction, loss, and trauma in Gaza. It’s unconscionable. It’s morally
wrong. And Bernie is calling on Congress to take action and stop the
endless flow of weapons.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29330?source=email-20250520&t=1032&akid=8507%2E5885482%2EbQa_SQ ]Together we can show Congress that the public will not rest until it
does something to finally stop Netanyahu. But it’s going to take ALL of us
standing with Bernie to finally stop the U.S. from enabling Israel’s wars.
Will you add your name?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29330?source=email-20250520&t=1033&akid=8507%2E5885482%2EbQa_SQ ]ADD YOUR NAME

It’s hard to believe, but there’s more. Reports just came out that Donald
Trump has hatched a terrifying and appalling plan to forcibly relocate up
to one million Gazans to Libya.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29329?source=email-20250520&t=1034&akid=8507%2E5885482%2EbQa_SQ ]Headline: Trump administration working on a plan to move 1 million
Palestinians to Libya

Make no mistake: Trump's reckless and inhumane policy would be ethnic
cleansing plain and simple. And it would set an incredibly dangerous
precedent reminiscent of the darkest chapters of our history.

Bernie is speaking out all over the media and in the corridors of the
Senate, insisting civilian lives matter more than weapons profits and
rejecting AIPAC’s immense pressure to suppress criticism of Israel's
military aggression.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29329?source=email-20250520&t=1035&akid=8507%2E5885482%2EbQa_SQ ]Headline: Bernie Sanders: Democrats 'not speaking up' on Gaza due to
fear of pro-Israel lobby

He is URGENTLY calling upon Congress to act – and Our Revolution has stood
alongside him every step of the way, mobilizing to end weapons sales to
Israel, opposing AIPAC’s attempts to silence critics of endless war, and
challenging Trump’s efforts to criminalize dissent here at home.

But as the suffering in Gaza only grows, NOW is the moment to speak
louder, clearer, and in greater numbers. We must urgently mobilize,
demanding Congress stop sending bombs, arms, and the implicit green-light
from Washington to a crisis that's already spiraled out of control.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29330?source=email-20250520&t=1036&akid=8507%2E5885482%2EbQa_SQ ]Will you urgently stand with Bernie today and demand Congress
immediately halt the weapons sales fueling the devastation in Gaza?

Bernie said it plainly himself: never before have we faced a more critical
moment. With atrocities escalating by the hour, and humanitarian
catastrophe unfolding in real time, every moment Congress remains silent
equals more suffering, more displacement, more innocent lives lost.

Together, let’s come together to change that.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=8507%2E5885482%2EbQa_SQ ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=8507%2E5885482%2EbQa_SQ ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=8507%2E5885482%2EbQa_SQ ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=8507%2E5885482%2EbQa_SQ ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=8507%2E5885482%2EbQa_SQ ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=8507%2E5885482%2EbQa_SQ ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28192?amount=5&refcode=email-20250520-image-nd&amounts=5%2C12%2C22&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&t=1027&akid=8507%2E5885482%2EbQa_SQ ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28192?amount=5&refcode=email-20250520-text-nd&amounts=5%2C12%2C22&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&t=1028&akid=8507%2E5885482%2EbQa_SQ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28193?amount=5&refcode=email-20250520-button-nd&amounts=5%2C12%2C22&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&t=1029&akid=8507%2E5885482%2EbQa_SQ ]GIVE $5 MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28194?amount=22&refcode=email-20250520-button-nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&t=1030&akid=8507%2E5885482%2EbQa_SQ ]GIVE $22 ONCE

| The wetter, the better

[How redwood forests rely on blankets of fog](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108051487/546681564/-809919633?utm_campaign=rm-2025-05&utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5NDVkM2JjLWE0MzUtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=APbOE1UNFwPZye0qnPzo9qe0CIc8gajLPVhDsqIcA_o=&emci=0619a20a-cf1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f945d3bc-a435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)
New research explores the complex relationship between redwoods and the fog they need to survive. But climate change is disrupting that delicate balance.
[Step into the fog](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108051488/546681565/-809919633?utm_campaign=rm-2025-05&utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5NDVkM2JjLWE0MzUtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=APbOE1UNFwPZye0qnPzo9qe0CIc8gajLPVhDsqIcA_o=&emci=0619a20a-cf1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f945d3bc-a435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108051489/546681566/1521004278?utm_campaign=rm-2025-05&utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5NDVkM2JjLWE0MzUtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=APbOE1UNFwPZye0qnPzo9qe0CIc8gajLPVhDsqIcA_o=&emci=0619a20a-cf1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f945d3bc-a435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)
Restoration
[Super team gathers to protect giant sequoias](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108051490/546681567/1521004278?utm_campaign=rm-2025-05&utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5NDVkM2JjLWE0MzUtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=APbOE1UNFwPZye0qnPzo9qe0CIc8gajLPVhDsqIcA_o=&emci=0619a20a-cf1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f945d3bc-a435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)
In 2024 the Giant Sequoia Lands Coalition restored fire-damaged groves, prepared trees to face future threats, and leapt into action to safeguard monarch sequoias during the Coffee Pot Fire.
[See the progress](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108051492/546681568/1521004278?utm_campaign=rm-2025-05&utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5NDVkM2JjLWE0MzUtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=APbOE1UNFwPZye0qnPzo9qe0CIc8gajLPVhDsqIcA_o=&emci=0619a20a-cf1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f945d3bc-a435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108051494/546681571/-295942965?utm_campaign=rm-2025-05&utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5NDVkM2JjLWE0MzUtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=APbOE1UNFwPZye0qnPzo9qe0CIc8gajLPVhDsqIcA_o=&emci=0619a20a-cf1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f945d3bc-a435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)
Shaking it for the trees
[Hope takes root at “Take Me to the Trees”](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108051501/546681576/-295942965?utm_campaign=rm-2025-05&utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5NDVkM2JjLWE0MzUtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=APbOE1UNFwPZye0qnPzo9qe0CIc8gajLPVhDsqIcA_o=&emci=0619a20a-cf1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f945d3bc-a435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)
On a recent spring evening, redwood-loving guests gathered in Golden Gate Park to celebrate conservation and dance the night away, raising over $725,000 to support League efforts.
[Hit the dance floor](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108051506/546681583/-295942965?utm_campaign=rm-2025-05&utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5NDVkM2JjLWE0MzUtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=APbOE1UNFwPZye0qnPzo9qe0CIc8gajLPVhDsqIcA_o=&emci=0619a20a-cf1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f945d3bc-a435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)

clean_body: Redwood Matters: News from the League | May 20, 2025 | The wetter, the better New research explores the complex relationship between redwoods and the fog they need to survive. But climate change is disrupting that delicate balance. Restoration In 2024 the Giant Sequoia Lands Coalition restored fire-damaged groves, prepared trees to face future threats, and leapt into action to safeguard monarch sequoias during the Coffee Pot Fire. Shaking it for the trees On a recent spring evening, redwood-loving guests gathered in Golden Gate Park to celebrate conservation and dance the night away, raising over $725,000 to support League efforts. Moon trees The League recently helped plant giant sequoia seedlings that are more well-traveled than all of us—unless you’re an astronaut, that is. | | Instagram Post of the Month ---|--- | | ---|--- 🌲We put out the call to defend the Endangered Species Act and you answered—big time. 💪 Over the past few weeks, more than 3,500 redwoods and wildlife supporters used our action alert link to send a public comment to the US Department of the Interior demanding the agency scuttle its plan to strip habitat protections from of the Endangered Species Act.👏 You joined over 125,000 people nationwide who are speaking up for the forests and animals that can’t speak for themselves. Thank you! 💚 📷 California red-legged frog. Photo by KQED Quest, Flickr Creative Commons. body:
I’ve served in the most violent regions of the world and the most dangerous streets in America. I’m not afraid to take on the D.C. Swamp. The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL |
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=54ef32b6ac0749a28696159e7f440ef8&_e=X8-PlOwXAbMnY5dP67k5tGUfmv9cHf8WMdpF1HrQGPVp9NppHwbetqKbsIS-1UoouaHl_7f5g6x2RBMs_EhA24X25Jivkrkhio-cdlyfL6oR7-zDjxeX5wX9KUqMksstW5M06BiJoJuh3_bdBqa-WzuXpl8OUbaqzoZpT1K84byPDOj0oPMQ0kAk-MEN1oyXx6NDwyz8MSqUqizEcOQI4Y3WzrHFdH5-A2cpre-Ar7RN2giJx5PvZXkOPQZcPTG07PCxAOhbiLL3pEvbmAfm8LnHRxB7NXNO4rUFCGNUkMc-pNExNEH-1wydqs1FnzRiGY2Oj7LHxlryD3aoXHh-ZTtxh1tnI5nB4siKpylqLMlSBXprcpgAWGXTJ8RfTMWblaNGpieRRdOT6X2qRAQxiQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**I enlisted in the U.S. Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general.** I deployed and led troops around the world, including Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and at our southern border during President Trump’s first term.

**I joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop and became Doraville’s Chief of Police.** I locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and was shot and stabbed in the line of duty.

**I’m proud to support President Trump.** I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state.

Honor. Integrity. Service. America First. That’s what our country needs right now, but Democrat Senator Jon Ossoff is totally AWOL.

[**My name is John King, solving problems is what I do, and I’m answering the call to run for U.S. Senate in Georgia to defeat Jon Ossoff and give President Trump the reinforcements he needs to Make America Great Again.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=54ef32b6ac0749a28696159e7f440ef8&_e=X8-PlOwXAbMnY5dP67k5tGUfmv9cHf8WMdpF1HrQGPVp9NppHwbetqKbsIS-1UoouaHl_7f5g6x2RBMs_EhA24X25Jivkrkhio-cdlyfL6oR7-zDjxeX5wX9KUqMksstW5M06BiJoJuh3_bdBqa-WzuXpl8OUbaqzoZpT1K84byPDOj0oPMQ0kAk-MEN1oyXx6NDwyz8MSqUqizEcOQI4Y3WzrHFdH5-A2cpre-Ar7RN2giJx5PvZXkOPQZcPTG05qppMLe-dd2dJvdENroBLSdG0w95crJoLPbHdggGyXiJzTi472tvRGruy_EvDpUBxiYXchJqmUeRSt3t_zf-fT2yqOfYDM8gj4vX61q-XqkHdAyQbsGqocFr9Q6IQe1yzUMh4iSIN_yYpSOb_ofr9g%3D%3D)

body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=TUNC+gOfvku0N76qulAZOQQvFGxj0sR1LiQV/nSpvsEp+f4S5LMTWEyTygT8LScTfB/bCZ5ZJplmdjNLBUSYWqA/P4wwjZWsINnxnY6Q7/E=]
NPR: Private funding saved the 2020 election. Now, some GOP-led states are banning it [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/NPR_PrivateFunding.png]
Private sector companies and nonprofit charities often donate money and provide grants to communities across the country to help administer voting.
This includes mail sorting machines in Philadelphia, nonpartisan voter registration staff in Arizona, and cameras to verify no one tampers with ballots in Bucks County, PA. Local officials have referred to this money as a "lifeline".
Now, 14 states have banned outside funding and five other states passed a ban that was vetoed by the Governor.
We want to hear from our supporters about your feelings about this news. Will you take our quick one-question poll right away?
Team: Do you believe that private grants should be allowed to help administer elections?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=TUNC+gOfvku0N76qulAZOQQvFGxj0sR1LiQV/nSpvsEp+f4S5LMTWEyTygT8LScTfB/bCZ5ZJplmdjNLBUSYWqA/P4wwjZWsINnxnY6Q7/E=] NO [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=TUNC+gOfvku0N76qulAZOQQvFGxj0sR1LiQV/nSpvsEp+f4S5LMTWEyTygT8LScTfB/bCZ5ZJplmdjNLBUSYWqA/P4wwjZWsINnxnY6Q7/E=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=TUNC+gOfvku0N76qulAZOQQvFGxj0sR1LiQV/nSpvsEp+f4S5LMTWEyTygT8LScTfB/bCZ5ZJplmdjNLBUSYWqA/P4wwjZWsINnxnY6Q7/E=]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [=] NPR: Private funding saved the 2020 election. Now, some GOP-led states are banning it [] Private sector companies and nonprofit charities often donate money and provide grants to communities across the country to help administer voting. This includes mail sorting machines in Philadelphia, nonpartisan voter registration staff in Arizona, and cameras to verify no one tampers with ballots in Bucks County, PA. Local officials have referred to this money as a "lifeline". Now, 14 states have banned outside funding and five other states passed a ban that was vetoed by the Governor. We want to hear from our supporters about your feelings about this news. Will you take our quick one-question poll right away? Team: Do you believe that private grants should be allowed to help administer elections? By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded: YES [=] NO [=] = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [=] Donate Now [=] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. name: House Republicans
subject: We can't thank you enough.
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj204p4ztw2yplvzwx1hmbeortj5hvhvxvas40xsnyr2bpgbk3am7ezbtuvlhyexd5uy0usyjf41idsf3699u&__stmp=swkof3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swkof3&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6ja70jpuvbppwhv4awq43babp3xifo3ryq5600a241d03hp99qrjs24776q1elkbsczx83qbxefe83rwkgmj8y87vhft3mll25wuuw7nb87x8kt6shnr0si2mz7mzuceepfax2q6f524s4d3rsnjx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swkof3&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swkof3&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swkof3&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swkof3&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6ja70jpuvbppwhv4awq43babpp8l9vhpt62prbgrd83xkbzl74zwy8zzboj5usw4uywzw3k5shtyvrvmfzs148gtmwcm27km22nppqbonwzyd9qhzj8uz3hawo4wwlwooc3pjggff03g5ys6cq0p5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swkof3&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swkof3&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Hey Derek, quick update on what John's been up to lately:
* Hundreds of trains run through PA each and every day, and John's always said he’ll work with anyone to help regular folks in PA.

* So as a member of the Commerce, Science, and Transportation Committee, John's working to make sure folks have efficient and reliable transit options.

* And just last week, he secured a commitment from the Amtrak Board leader nominee to restore train service between Reading and Philly by 2029.

So as John pushes to get this done, he needs to know how much support he has from this team. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: | | | Hey Derek, quick update on what John's been up to lately: Hundreds of trains run through PA each and every day, and John's always said he’ll work with anyone to help regular folks in PA. So as a member of the Commerce, Science, and Transportation Committee, John's working to make sure folks have efficient and reliable transit options. And just last week, he secured a commitment from the Amtrak Board leader nominee to restore train service between Reading and Philly by 2029. So as John pushes to get this done, he needs to know how much support he has from this team. Do you support expanding passenger rail?**🚆 | | | | Thanks, Team Fetterman HQ 💛 | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Tori Colgan
subject: Planned Parenthood did THIS?
body:
For decades, Planned Parenthood has staked its business on taking lives.
Thousands of children across the U.S. are waiting for placement in a foster home.
| | | [](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/JfHVBAcYrmVireEOf3uKD_TA9mxVTUZXqSbOqxSnsIhKOVaIb-MIB-XK4lU7VKfP-zsyroyNvRlNZI6qucqpunK5lPcbFXmrzRYGsgwyKr7v9NUpS6ZRhW5ElP3PsXiEqkfogJUOCXJqqvs5qw8JKIBFwCvZfN8SZYCH92zshuvqiGJdruzgfky42o_GhUyrNwBjrnH3LUkYaoYxPg7zc20i9TOZUUJ0EWzgD31Ozs-KYi5ZaulCpV_Wi3RRNf0nIV9kM8Bnq9FMMB5kyva_ccMEXBg5L6aLnHT-QJRG7wyubfXlUoxGNxj0vPR9Hi5FvRwnM0mv5yOwRcErR-9mHO-F7hrok6TmzjhasNq3ENC5kX2PEL97nCfJ2gu0p579dx9KJLkDTntaHpZJWJxenSKO5mfsrRzIo404xx6nHX53HZVWJjbiRqgV/R6Ai5pNS8vC8P1_VScCtKdwwTQTSAJuc/9)
**** Dear Fellow American,

For decades, Planned Parenthood has staked its business on taking lives.

Thanks to the billions of dollars it's received in taxpayer funds--including yours--it's the nation's largest abortion business.

Planned Parenthood has taken millions of unborn lives through abortion over decades. That's its primary business.

**According to a recent _New York Times_ expose, Planned Parenthood's single-minded focus on abortion has led to serious problems at its facilities:**

Filthy clinics. Untrained staff. Reckless medical care that leaves women injured and scarred--physically and emotionally.

In one case, a woman reported that her failed abortion resulted in weeks of pain, bleeding, and eventually an emergency delivery of a baby who later died.

Many of its facilities have fallen into disrepair. In one facility, sewage seeped into the abortion recovery room for days, making patients physically ill.

**These stories make my stomach turn.**

And, unfortunately, it doesn't stop there. Planned Parenthood's track record on puberty blockers and cross-sex hormones is equally disturbing.

Planned Parenthood has become the nation's _second-largest provider of gender-transition drugs._ It boasts about giving these drugs to minors.

Think about that: Planned Parenthood profits from pumping vulnerable, confused, and hurting kids with drugs that can permanently damage their bodies.

And I haven't even mentioned the organization's devastating legacy of racism and eugenics. Needless to say, Planned Parenthood has been riddled with scandal _since its inception._

Fortunately, I have some exciting news to share. My colleague John Bursch stood before the U.S. Supreme Court to argue that NO American should be forced to fund this radical, pro-abortion agenda.

If we win, that means states across the country could follow suit and cut off funding to Planned Parenthood--protecting more women, children, and unborn lives from its horrific actions.

Planned Parenthood doesn't deserve another dime of public funds--our hard-earned money.

**Please join me in signing this statement to stand against Planned Parenthood and speak up for every life that has been harmed by its radical agenda.**
****[Stop Planned Parenthood](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/utYrgB8PKsZhC7uJhZgWebBAza9S5wN0926nHxXqrT79Kj0u6kPyEdF2KlKNfqQnmvbTc8bNTyE_uE_NEgyRsWJA4MVJJ2lj8zKvdpvHtMYabSTF164rgCYvVdHsi8LDgEKK8Go29pU_Gv4wSNGBVt5GWE6t3JNQNtTqDHO-DYVmiKJSlkpMOfy4f1_YteqPjD8X5LREiWayui5WA4PtJoVE_My8IWmjLxE8L23yTGiIIP-jRt6S3ADRiTwGNGrtg3NysYDpISe24bt9-iPJx0racvdUyy-7xlpO-xsZ3FH4sn624RM27TvwBSacyj9Cnaqx_w64PIsqTKxYJJzTub0L3Ms6mbVr5bKMxlpw-fmUqZpGS3vdRi9UT_7ER1-oD6pUsh6LeEiPyTEb6qBdgRw1I6hJMIFvuqZEkEiVHUMT9kVJ4DBs7OqJ/UMoe9zA5zO9kCe6YfojSztDJF8w8Xe6W/9)

Let's send a message, loud and clear: Americans DO NOT want our taxpayer dollars to fund Big Abortion. Thank you for your support.

For life,

Tori Colgan
Director of Digital Fundraising [](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/iUekgthS-_gLQkRTCwc8V9US7FYhOvIZC23AlnVYhDxnIKsNlLbYM3nFkfZmxLVcM4921BqTJ8EOMFduZPS2gbeb5vkPscTrIPujg3TiBZ75NfynNf4xzNtsVvNasbfyUUNZmJh4gchZDr6lAIPO_p7U_-b4uwHldJiQV6NN8YpynAir64hmEndeNSkyXoVBtufyAOuO65W0gJF8Xlt-Hl0dfIMcsDXoU2LiKa14T_nvBHrr-lqyn1cyPFZbOAAgoZS9ab1HPM_m1X1E1-i6VWESaKMTGwD3eydzfUEXXQ3wMlO8bNxtdYJOYgsOBPgI8jMs4BnUAAOFyWA24hL3cOXmqUeF-a7J9mX8dR92MxSf4MUTZxgADAib5TVtQTx4eEXjyALwWEFz2sq7kp_WX8RmTjBKwgpEPgrZQEwdnm6cdhMg9PP37MTW/V_zp8oLH3iJGeqr9WcVCtMBwaxf6pc1z/9)
[P.S. We need your help to put an end to Big Abortion--sign our statement to stand against Planned Parenthood's harmful pro-abortion, pro-gender ideology agenda!](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/4fMW8Rm7aZ-3awMzFz3IlRkptKIrQkLjwy53AvtXwDXpXOhjNexSfVf8eDSfMpgVfNROs5OvkQwgB5LZJLt_gE-5T00LCTeH2Binf5TPSh1txR7Oznv6-3x7Azb80b1EISOiiQXIQS5c6vivjsP5F0AyNINF9aBQUeZ4gq_TaGvN3GqLD1jwA74IyWpYQ1CeZSPDurorDcijolZ-33ZzEF9wFRUCQ61eRHXsRntTOmt3JoX_wsuBl5Lv7-6bVqnDoS--Dc7T4UxVLRgF3RsZ5aFfoSTx5pIa9lKbPI321iNW4TqYdSkUEZvdX8l7Nntb_EbgexSyGuDQndBkZcadv6zVNP3QY2Qkxxqmsd4JiwCW4TmfI5oEdmuf15HJOKitJS0vYwKhLQXQkkDQgFuGx3TkQnITn69HVCVQZ9bibJBgulnH5AVJ34JI/eljjKE5FvGZgSmVi5t20ZV6DRaSr7OFD/9)
---
Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

**[This is the final stretch. Can you make a donation of any amount today to help us get Josh’s message out to voters in these last 3 weeks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108053791/546688355/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20250520_FR_VRDeadline_0_3MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmQ4MjQ2Ny1hOTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2oDvSMklX7mkO24zIkX7TzjfpnSfoz3tTwrUaBwGU7E=&emci=6cd82467-a935-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6fd82467-a935-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=37438246)** | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108053792/546688356/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20250520_FR_VRDeadline_0_3MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmQ4MjQ2Ny1hOTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2oDvSMklX7mkO24zIkX7TzjfpnSfoz3tTwrUaBwGU7E=&emci=6cd82467-a935-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6fd82467-a935-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=37438246)

– Team Gottheimer
|
* * *

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: They want to turn Michigan RED
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
The DeVos family represents how broken our political system is.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=324%2E181023%2E5tssPH)
Hey team — For _decades_ , the ultra-wealthy DeVos family has tried to buy influence and tip the scales in favor of Republicans in Michigan’s elections.
Which is why I’m not surprised, but definitely alarmed at their latest plan:
**A massive statewide operation to turn Michigan fully red in next year’s elections.**
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q22025.rGq0NW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250520_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=324%2E181023%2E5tssPH)
I need your help to fight back against the DeVos family, which is why I’m asking:
[**Will you rush in a contribution today to help power our grassroots campaign for governor? I need you to have my back, especially when we’re up against the ultra-wealthy DeVos family.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250520_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=324%2E181023%2E5tssPH)
[DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250520_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=324%2E181023%2E5tssPH)
---
The DeVos family represents how broken our political system is.
The voices and votes of everyday Michiganders are being drowned out by special interests and billionaires — that’s not right.
We’re seeing how the current Republican administration is catering to billionaires, not hard-working Americans. They’re slashing funding for Medicaid, public schools, and SNAP — all to give tax breaks to the wealthiest people in the country.
I’m running for governor to be a leader for _all_ Michigan families, not just those who can buy access and influence. I’ll _always_ stand up to the wealthy special interests trying to shape the government.
But I’m going to need your help. The DeVos family has already committed to spending _$5 million_ in this race for governor — and more is on the way.
[**Team, will you stand with me and make a contribution to my campaign for governor today? To beat the GOP and the DeVos family, I’m counting on a strong grassroots team to power this movement all the way to Lansing.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250520_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=324%2E181023%2E5tssPH)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Carolina, United We Dream
subject: Join the network of people who care for immigrants👉
body:
You have more power than you realize. | | | Hey Peter, can I let you in on a secret? **You have more power than you realize.** With ICE breaking into our schools, neighborhoods, and jobs to abduct the people we care for, you might’ve doubted our collective power to resist and protect the immigrants in our lives. **But throughout the country, friends, neighbors, and supporters of immigrants have been showing us that there are a million ways to care for our community. 🤝** From displaying supportive signs on our lawns to sharing crucial Know Your Rights information, whole communities have been coming together to give a clear message: Immigrants are here to stay! **Our Here to Stay Network has been the first to hear ways we can take action to fight alongside immigrants.** Our network consists of**** everyday people like you and me, determined to make our communities a safe and welcoming place for all. And, you have the power to make us stronger when you fight alongside us! 👉 **Join our Network to receive guidance on real ways you can step up in your daily life to protect immigrants around you.** **[Fight Alongside Us](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dC91rsipD286ESFr9EvsYLUJig4VkQHgcNi6qJi15c52U9iBRjCX93bzpp3GIoVGlD46gylthLuhU9-OeKBAdks_K0EX9JyqkrUIKF_wXwNIO1FtcGqi-OFojPxUi4gsvXRte4OtbaWfW76RONYqNzSin4tUWFN2mOFcz81KFHmn3xtToTQajEjl70MWD2TS_prPPrxmLxhJNU8dDDKd1sImQwVVD2F5VYaso-2_8Dw66Q2IQ82HDxEP1akyiZOIwVNP3XEjJj8s8hZh7pSh-2f2gVH-jOdFH9gpHgKDhAjIgP7in-xAXL9Q-SeICA3fnYRuMXdFRWvYRc-MlS8qmXj16_2Xj_du-och6gG9eat4Q/4gn/h0CyxDvuSRSKFRGb1HAtiw/h0/h001.I35Ewmro9AbVc3F6ABcYzQ-QuRByCaZ578z09xL-NsA)** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dC91rsipD286ESFr9EvsYLUJig4VkQHgcNi6qJi15c52U9iBRjCX93bzpp3GIoVGlC6c3zbBwnFUjyAzEY4Vilu8Sx2frlo_Ee0izo_gIPO0ZtZ9KUVNux7k5AGi_-SDzqivEHatTUUtyyot-prLWT5KNLN2O6VgyD6DqQa7MdPgYozCAAPaiZR24hRVDy9spQxgMTW1NbxVZCIW5-aA4iM7nymllLEvAnAdsUzyl5VkZqhSFDYF4iPyS6IIwBSmyTpcBF2Fo4OMWcRCNrVFkARvsPLLbnWcI3CNZjEYZjwinIzor78tiSLagnnc79R1LCsPiSckzCsUYT5ZXil-NDIMC9oxlBH5MMvfpQnG6GgLQ/4gn/h0CyxDvuSRSKFRGb1HAtiw/h1/h001.Npp6FVsNytd9XXDKTXHmWP97oZ-8Emnx_KoLRjaTZgs)
Immigrants have always powered our communities. Our immigrant parents, friends, and neighbors are the first to show up for us when we need them. Now, it’s our turn to look out for them. Meet the Here to Stay Network and the ways we’ve been fighting back to protect our communities from state-sanctioned abductions and kidnappings:
* **🗣️''I work in a health clinic, and I am actively learning about the needs of the immigrant community.** I’m advocating for my worksite to not let any ICE officers come through our door." -Pablo in California 🏥

* **🗣️"I’m working with a local artist to make and distribute informational zines,** and other zines in our community regarding the rights of undocumented people and how witnesses of an ICE arrest can help." - Monique in New Mexico 🎨

* **🗣️"I’m a faith leader in my community.** We will gather and organize to protect our neighbors." - Danielle in New York 🤝

* 🗣️**"****Community is what makes us great and will keep us safe**. None of us are free until all of us are free. I’ll always stand for and with immigrants and undocumented people because they’re part of my community." - Tomoko in Hawaii 🫂

What have you been doing to fight alongside immigrants? **[Let us know when you join our Here to Stay Network today!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dC91rsipD286ESFr9EvsYLUJig4VkQHgcNi6qJi15c52U9iBRjCX93bzpp3GIoVGlDCNSMIzcQ0YUdWVaFXedleo7VmH-KYEF9EkNV_7bp19p7rYyPeIYTuA3J_WuMHyghS641SOXSus0ENBfZgnE0OgGQkBxJfXF0uVtSMjZRc7iJi7_U5-14jIvQoSc9bcq07o_-kCQ6KMrgqF4Khq66tuYJmVeVGAFnZyyNrxq7Tfkxt8ZyOB82T0bdyt0MmcJAPWOQJR6vavQYtFPPHaDevlL3nuSy4YDcnORNoYFnwBhZvJ3MaK-7cG7bWkVriKIETBQRTxcapeQMqgi5paJWSsfK2vao_eHQUq_El5wlxEQ/4gn/h0CyxDvuSRSKFRGb1HAtiw/h2/h001.6aZE0IdZn6YgIcKau6QcMHvmfOdaYMJ-qTMYJkI-8jM) ** Or, if you’re like my friend Alejandra in Kansas, join the Here to Stay Network "to take the first step" to learn how to defend immigrant communities! We’ve got you covered. In power, Carolina and the United We Dream team

clean_body: You have more power than you realize. | | | Hey Peter, can I let you in on a secret? You have more power than you realize. With ICE breaking into our schools, neighborhoods, and jobs to abduct the people we care for, you might’ve doubted our collective power to resist and protect the immigrants in our lives. But throughout the country, friends, neighbors, and supporters of immigrants have been showing us that there are a million ways to care for our community. 🤝 From displaying supportive signs on our lawns to sharing crucial Know Your Rights information, whole communities have been coming together to give a clear message: Immigrants are here to stay! Our Here to Stay Network has been the first to hear ways we can take action to fight alongside immigrants. Our network consists of** everyday people like you and me, determined to make our communities a safe and welcoming place for all. And, you have the power to make us stronger when you fight alongside us! 👉 Join our Network to receive guidance on real ways you can step up in your daily life to protect immigrants around you. Immigrants have always powered our communities. Our immigrant parents, friends, and neighbors are the first to show up for us when we need them. Now, it’s our turn to look out for them. Meet the Here to Stay Network and the ways we’ve been fighting back to protect our communities from state-sanctioned abductions and kidnappings: 🗣️''I work in a health clinic, and I am actively learning about the needs of the immigrant community. I’m advocating for my worksite to not let any ICE officers come through our door." -Pablo in California 🏥 🗣️"I’m working with a local artist to make and distribute informational zines, and other zines in our community regarding the rights of undocumented people and how witnesses of an ICE arrest can help." - Monique in New Mexico 🎨 🗣️"I’m a faith leader in my community. We will gather and organize to protect our neighbors." - Danielle in New York 🤝 🗣️"**Community is what makes us great and will keep us safe. None of us are free until all of us are free. I’ll always stand for and with immigrants and undocumented people because they’re part of my community." - Tomoko in Hawaii 🫂 What have you been doing to fight alongside immigrants? Or, if you’re like my friend Alejandra in Kansas, join the Here to Stay Network "to take the first step" to learn how to defend immigrant communities! We’ve got you covered. In power, Carolina and the United We Dream team | Follow us on: | | | | |

| | Peter – It's the target far-right Republicans have been after for years: Big Bird, Elmo, Bert and Ernie. Trump's executive order would defund NPR and PBS – unilaterally cutting off all federal funding for the arts, news, and kids programming we grew up watching, our own kids watched, and now, our grandkids enjoy. Completely free and accessible to all and has been beloved by kids and parents since it debuted decades ago. **So let's be clear about why he's doing this: he wants to shut down reporting he doesn't like.** NPR and PBS are middle-of-the-road news agencies that report the facts with journalistic integrity. They're also one of the largest sources of _local_ news – something the mainstream media has been cutting back on for years – making this free service online, on television, and on the radio all the more important. [**But we can stand up and stop these authoritarian actions by winning back a strong majority in the House. Will you join me in that fight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108053944/546688631/-1599294071?refcode=2025-05-20-nprpbs&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=b80a6bb6-a935-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODBhNmJiNi1hOTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zh3qQXHUgVu-y5V3MQTwZkDfCWdVEwS01l_LKAdAe4U=) They're not cracking down on fake news or propaganda. Trump hates NPR and PBS because he can't control them and he can't profit from them. Public radio and public television are for everybody. [**Let's save NPR and PBS and put a stop to this destructive agenda. Trump's executive order would defund NPR and PBS – unilaterally cutting off all federal funding for the arts, news, and kids programming we grew up watching, our own kids watched, and now, our grandkids enjoy. Completely free and accessible to all and has been beloved by kids and parents since it debuted decades ago. So let's be clear about why he's doing this: he wants to shut down reporting he doesn't like. NPR and PBS are middle-of-the-road news agencies that report the facts with journalistic integrity. They're also one of the largest sources of local news – something the mainstream media has been cutting back on for years – making this free service online, on television, and on the radio all the more important. = They're not cracking down on fake news or propaganda. Trump hates NPR and PBS because he can't control them and he can't profit from them. Public radio and public television are for everybody. = Val | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Val Hoyle instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: This is a really serious problem
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
People have lost faith in our ability to look out for their basic needs, and deliver results that actually impact their life.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1642%2E791427%2EGJ6CQI)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250520-1-180&t=2&akid=1642%2E791427%2EGJ6CQI)
Friend — This is a really serious problem.
Despite the last four months of absolute chaos and harm under Donald Trump and the Republican party’s rule, approval ratings for the Democratic party have remained in the gutter. And this connects back to why we lost the Presidency last November.
The working class of America has lost faith in our party. People have lost faith in our ability to look out for their basic needs, and deliver results that actually impact their life.
So much so that many prefer the GOP: A pro-billionaire, anti-worker political movement that has worked for over 50 years to help big corporations and the ultra-rich at the expense of regular Americans and the rights and public services they rely on.
I think it’s better to face this problem head on and address it rather than ignore it and hope that voters will change their mind as Trump tears down our democracy.
Friend, the progressive movement that I have helped organize for my entire time in politics is one that is firmly rooted in lifting up the working class and all Americans.
We support unions. We support raising wages. We support everyone having the healthcare, housing, and education they need. We support cracking down on corporate price gouging and protecting consumers from scammers on Wall Street. And we support these ideas without hesitation or deference to billionaire donors who only want to make themselves even richer.
If we are going to start winning back voters and convincing them of our vision, we have to offer something completely different from the status quo, not more of the same.
We have to be proud of our bold, progressive (and yes, pragmatic) ideas, and speak directly to the working families in this country who are struggling to get by and see Trump as a way to desperately try something new.
**[If you agree, I am asking for your help. We have to win back a majority of Americans if we want to defeat the far-right. Make a contribution of any amount today and support my organizing work as we continue to build our movement towards victory.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250520-1-180&t=3&akid=1642%2E791427%2EGJ6CQI)

---

In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

name: LaMonica McIver
subject: I was charged by the Trump administration because I was doing my job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Peter, The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy. I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up. These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration’s overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers. **_**[We need your help. clean_body: | Peter, The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy. I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up. These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration’s overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to LaMonica McIver and Yassamin Ansari will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = This is far bigger than just me—the rule of law is at stake. Our democracy as we know it is under threat. = We're in this together, LaMonica Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: October 2001
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m just an ordinary guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things for our country now I am asking you to open this and read the first few paragraphs | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=31da8ff701404dbf9c34ecd8a631418a&_e=e5sZDK8Ph0o7mbW0_7v35TOBBSV_8zproRCC0X33LQlp6EF9w1EtMm94eRT5qpl71wa489Rb2IqD_ZBHDorhg9r_6ik2P5ZFMlUdkIe02uAc8MIW6-VpJVPA-B9vd43nHnAJQJ9vUtK03YrDscz32SMeptf7mZumIcha5f1L2aeKDmRUfhlZGN2ILy3t4QUBXLT2kurhjWieUJiHHFo_nWBmPHugNFnhUQ5YnG-dRlbn_K1SUivgjIH5CKUq82Hkguqbb1rXnd_Jy707ATK6BuV8SPlX6Xce-0MPZ9v9MTRDhH_kABbHUId806KB57crqsuXqnyX5qUm34fyMJDEmrfznmAj4iyCNr2sg5njD31QwdCJA06TkwKN9UMNQ3Jw8qIzV2NdojrJHf8okx7QvXaCq2mDdKacvOK56ahVHNa1vl1MDnu8utPCmGaVwP5h)

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and _**I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan.**_ I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, **is politically more radical than the former VP nominee**.
**_
_**_People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020._**_While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination._**

The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=31da8ff701404dbf9c34ecd8a631418a&_e=e5sZDK8Ph0o7mbW0_7v35TOBBSV_8zproRCC0X33LQlp6EF9w1EtMm94eRT5qpl71wa489Rb2IqD_ZBHDorhg9r_6ik2P5ZFMlUdkIe02uAc8MIW6-VpJVPA-B9vd43nHnAJQJ9vUtK03YrDscz32SMeptf7mZumIcha5f1L2aeKDmRUfhlZGN2ILy3t4QUBXLT2kurhjWieUJiHHFo_nWBmPHugNFnhUQ5YnG-dRlbn_K1SUivgjIH5CKUq82Hkguqbb1rXnd_Jy707ATK6BtDYAWiO7PvvWT-uwjR6h0yohjOiF1WEFucleSkYmHmi5TLWAWxEkLC_RE_LPyPxmzFEkv_EH1jS6fB4Qi-8ecBqwKD-xPpAECtSrANW5Zc2XGXvt8ASdhCtAu-lMHJYN--2U7s1g0xYHNzCd4Eh3d5kYIKy8UXbe8HAkDbGdRHx)

As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz.

I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;**I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life.**

I never imagined that I would run for high office, but _**everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies.**_ I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate.

**Something had to be done. **

With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state.

This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. _**And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield.**_

**[You don’t know me, and you have no real reason to make a financial contribution to my Senate campaign other than that I’m humbly asking you to do so.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=31da8ff701404dbf9c34ecd8a631418a&_e=e5sZDK8Ph0o7mbW0_7v35TOBBSV_8zproRCC0X33LQlp6EF9w1EtMm94eRT5qpl71wa489Rb2IqD_ZBHDorhg9r_6ik2P5ZFMlUdkIe02uAc8MIW6-VpJVPA-B9vd43nHnAJQJ9vUtK03YrDscz32SMeptf7mZumIcha5f1L2aeKDmRUfhlZGN2ILy3t4QUBXLT2kurhjWieUJiHHFo_nWBmPHugNFnhUQ5YnG-dRlbn_K1SUivgjIH5CKUq82Hkguqbb1rXnd_Jy707ATK6Bp47yeoKY4gajPw5TSiQcQlf05aP4yvACzwDBzYP2HwMf25TgFkxmRMeWE9CJ0ymheoloWAMacQgyhWZr1FPN6rWUAAkj99FCSRR-CdvPZ_QUJOxV-i0rPN2I3aydgykGQTFmSj4VkItjiQPCwGqWbiqs_BA0pQOyRXAmQvAvZta)**

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND WITH A GIFT OF $5 OR MORE**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=31da8ff701404dbf9c34ecd8a631418a&_e=e5sZDK8Ph0o7mbW0_7v35TOBBSV_8zproRCC0X33LQlp6EF9w1EtMm94eRT5qpl71wa489Rb2IqD_ZBHDorhg9r_6ik2P5ZFMlUdkIe02uAc8MIW6-VpJVPA-B9vd43nHnAJQJ9vUtK03YrDscz32SMeptf7mZumIcha5f1L2aeKDmRUfhlZGN2ILy3t4QUBXLT2kurhjWieUJiHHFo_nWBmPHugNFnhUQ5YnG-dRlbn_K1SUivgjIH5CKUq82Hkguqbb1rXnd_Jy707ATK6Bq42nQWAIaRpRQ5YN3z5vskkaHljMpCAw0rBwPqUhkEpHdS-mW1MNRnBmHA86vj4NNz3PExvWtk26aUp5YUOfS2VbsbbOlqeEqi8pf1gBPmc5dXjFBVu8lFHx02UsxorknKKngJKu5kEe5GROm5w3yvxeh_VPmyCqK01cAuPN-_p)
_**I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms.**_

Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=31da8ff701404dbf9c34ecd8a631418a&_e=e5sZDK8Ph0o7mbW0_7v35TOBBSV_8zproRCC0X33LQlp6EF9w1EtMm94eRT5qpl71wa489Rb2IqD_ZBHDorhg9r_6ik2P5ZFMlUdkIe02uAc8MIW6-VpJVPA-B9vd43nHnAJQJ9vUtK03YrDscz32SMeptf7mZumIcha5f1L2aeKDmRUfhlZGN2ILy3t4QUBXLT2kurhjWieUJiHHFo_nWBmPHugNFnhUQ5YnG-dRlbn_K1SUivgjIH5CKUq82Hkguqbb1rXnd_Jy707ATK6BgZwz6o28QooIHUQa70yr2Udh-GyzWxceJtL_gzaYQYj8hQfiRJn_9sIQtYjUgZtwYTC17jqM8LAohInmhBuM0W-FPzDQMGitgvzpzJDDlKCfOmHbs-gCbSFJ5pQrmMp1kKok5NKq1DGUa683Ab6I0rXlrItg3GArl-8NzDw2ED-)

Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values.

I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree.

[**CHIP IN TO SEND A NAVY SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=31da8ff701404dbf9c34ecd8a631418a&_e=e5sZDK8Ph0o7mbW0_7v35TOBBSV_8zproRCC0X33LQlp6EF9w1EtMm94eRT5qpl71wa489Rb2IqD_ZBHDorhg9r_6ik2P5ZFMlUdkIe02uAc8MIW6-VpJVPA-B9vd43nHnAJQJ9vUtK03YrDscz32SMeptf7mZumIcha5f1L2aeKDmRUfhlZGN2ILy3t4QUBXLT2kurhjWieUJiHHFo_nWBmPHugNFnhUQ5YnG-dRlbn_K1SUivgjIH5CKUq82Hkguqbb1rXnd_Jy707ATK6Bh26D5QFvKrFIShWopKgTRviylNZ2K9MwwDhjRW5dfhyaukH4q3EiH5fe8GVO8mXrweekBmx6Q_PD66sCpq1aIWk873GNgDfY602H-QWe3wEo6ExyXjIg5icBkLD1zBrBI7IpGxaj9PMDutFGOlFVJqB3KuvJtD1qeF6cBCTAAtm)
So when people tell me this will be one of the most challenging things I’ll ever endure, I smile and nod.

The simple truth is that I believe that my purpose in this life is to serve others, and _**[I’m hopeful that if you don’t donate today, you’ll allow me to earn your support in the coming months.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=31da8ff701404dbf9c34ecd8a631418a&_e=e5sZDK8Ph0o7mbW0_7v35TOBBSV_8zproRCC0X33LQlp6EF9w1EtMm94eRT5qpl71wa489Rb2IqD_ZBHDorhg9r_6ik2P5ZFMlUdkIe02uAc8MIW6-VpJVPA-B9vd43nHnAJQJ9vUtK03YrDscz32SMeptf7mZumIcha5f1L2aeKDmRUfhlZGN2ILy3t4QUBXLT2kurhjWieUJiHHFo_nWBmPHugNFnhUQ5YnG-dRlbn_K1SUivgjIH5CKUq82Hkguqbb1rXnd_Jy707ATK6BmTmDQdz9qRo7FjTtuj-fud2zAsMBDf_pSU1kFqaLRSsI8QecW2cH2u7hYXOJpg0HFr-ipawEIMCh3mOzcIl97dX10DzNAprnt1LkWlOKah1cQjEV5nLz4NsG4J2O5KQ9b5hH0jwLtFxevcFtvoxG5Lc5NtH_evtq8ybBQmdq3Ct) **_

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=31da8ff701404dbf9c34ecd8a631418a&_e=e5sZDK8Ph0o7mbW0_7v35TOBBSV_8zproRCC0X33LQlp6EF9w1EtMm94eRT5qpl71wa489Rb2IqD_ZBHDorhg9r_6ik2P5ZFMlUdkIe02uAc8MIW6-VpJVPA-B9vd43nHnAJQJ9vUtK03YrDscz32SMeptf7mZumIcha5f1L2aeKDmRUfhlZGN2ILy3t4QUBXLT2kurhjWieUJiHHFo_nWBmPHugNFnhUQ5YnG-dRlbn_K1SUivgjIH5CKUq82Hkguqbb1rXnd_Jy707ATK6Buxvo_K9M7LKtmDICllrqGbQ2jHO-PEX_pTXGL6ptLZ0lixQ3dAEj0mBV96l8BTuLvzaEctlmM75b_qeT55JCq7ItN7Z2eSgsZ5EMaIEArMaJ7XN8lE4T4iwLxfO03u1O8TJ_wJKNFpt40EvituQKC1_xw9tSU5mHLdqE3BbZHKF)

I’m just a regular guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things who wants to make my mom proud, serve my country, and do good by the people I meet.
