clean_body: I’m just an ordinary guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things for our country now I am asking you to open this and read the first few paragraphs | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan. I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into. I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, is politically more radical than the former VP nominee. People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020.While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination. The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home. As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz. I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life. I never imagined that I would run for high office, but everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies. I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate. Something had to be done. With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state. This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield. I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms. Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate. - Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values. I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree. So when people tell me this will be one of the most challenging things I’ll ever endure, I smile and nod. The simple truth is that I believe that my purpose in this life is to serve others, and I’m just a regular guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things who wants to make my mom proud, serve my country, and do good by the people I meet. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._

name: Melissa Evans
subject: My husband Derrick never came home last night.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Evans for WV 50 MOUNTAINEER DR PRICHARD, WV 25555
body:
I'm worried sick. Can you respond ASAP?
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e163013/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvSDdXNkMza0EyVA/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MjA/LbmNsNnY3dTkwUQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNNbDZ1WmtyYzVSWHdscw/gaCzQtQ/s3r561cd776)
| | | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
This is Melissa Evans. My husband Derrick **NEVER** came home last night. **_I'm worried sick, Friend..._** _All of Washington D.C. is out to get him_. He’s running for U.S. Senate, but not as a “normal” politician. **Derrick was one of Biden’s political prisoners. I took a picture of his prison ID card just to show you:** ****
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
[ **SUPPORT MY HUSBAND'S CAMPAIGN** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
The Biden FBI entrapped him on January 6th and dragged him through a _rigged, partisan trial_. _**Derrick called it what it was — a witch hunt.**_ **For 100 days, I slept alone. The kids were without their father.** So when Derrick didn’t come home last night, it brought back familiar feelings. **But this time, it’s different.** Because today, Derrick is a **FREE MAN** thanks to the pardon he received from President Trump.
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
---
[ **HELP DERRICK WIN HIS ELECTION** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
_And the reason he didn’t come home last night?_ **_Because he was out late fighting for YOU, Friend_.** I mean it.__ Derrick isn’t treating his Senate campaign like a hobby or a stunt. **He’s 100% all-in.** He spends his days meeting voters. His afternoons recording his political podcast. And his nights traveling across West Virginia to _take his America First message directly to the people_. But here’s the reality: **None of this comes cheap — and right now, Derrick has almost no time to fundraise.** And trust me, the LAST thing he wants to do is go to D.C. and schmooze lobbyists and rich donors. **Truth is, he never will.** Derrick is fighting for the people of West Virginia — and for hard-working Americans all across this country. **Not for Washington insiders. Not for cocktail parties and backroom deals.** _He believes politics is at its purest when it's funded by the people_. **So I’ll end with this:** **Whether it’s $10, $20, or $30 — Derrick is relying on red-blooded Americans like YOU to win this race.** He’s up against a massive political machine that HATES everything he represents. **The D.C. elite do NOT want a former January 6th prisoner crashing their party — let alone winning a seat in the U.S. Senate.** While his opponent rakes in millions from a handful of wealthy insiders, _Derrick is counting on thousands of patriots like you to fight back and WIN_. **Will you chip in $20 — or your best gift — right now to support my husband?** **Derrick barely sleeps**. He’s never been more fired up to fight for our country. Your support would mean the world to him — and to our entire family. Thank you,
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
Melissa Evans Wife of Derrick Evans
---
[ **SUPPORT DERRICK'S CAMPAIGN** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
[ **SEND DERRICK TO THE U.S. SENATE** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
| | Paid for by Evans for WV 50 MOUNTAINEER DR PRICHARD, WV 25555
---
| |
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily.**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Laura Loomer
subject: I Stopped a Phony TV Doctor from Embarrassing Trump!
body:
I exposed Dr. Janette Nesheiwat, Trump's pick for Surgeon General, as a pro-vaccine globalist with a medical degree from a Caribbean school she hyped as elite.
| If this is irrelevant to you, please click **[unsubscribe here](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Funsubscribe%2FwJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so%2FjNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg%2F892763PFB892U3HU9KOZx763h5GqRw/1/01000196ef18099a-20e4e523-44fe-4b73-8d79-799e1e89fd83-000000/G3z2U3rpiz-PDQWCntHQ-r07V5E=427)** to be removed.
* * *

| [****](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FbCs3WucdE6qXGm2ZYRFKdA%2F892763PFB892U3HU9KOZx763h5GqRw/1/01000196ef18099a-20e4e523-44fe-4b73-8d79-799e1e89fd83-000000/sl7kQHU2sQxmo-uf2CYn4Gz1tgo=427) [****](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FbCs3WucdE6qXGm2ZYRFKdA%2F892763PFB892U3HU9KOZx763h5GqRw/2/01000196ef18099a-20e4e523-44fe-4b73-8d79-799e1e89fd83-000000/WovTPWCQIA7YRkS9H7nHcBV-pWo=427) Dear Patriot,

**DC is a swamp of self-serving snakes --politicians, profiteers, and fame-**chasers who'd sell out President Trump for a pat on the head from the elite.. These swamp dwellers don't give a damn about America.

They're motivated by greed, power, and their next TV hit.

**I 'm Laura Loomer, and I'm here to drag them into the light and ensure Trump is surrounded by warriors who fight for YOU, not their egos.**

Last month, I exposed Dr. Janette Nesheiwat, Trump's pick for Surgeon General, as a pro-vaccine globalist with a medical degree from a Caribbean school she hyped as elite.

[**Please help me keep going by donating to support my work.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FbCs3WucdE6qXGm2ZYRFKdA%2F892763PFB892U3HU9KOZx763h5GqRw/3/01000196ef18099a-20e4e523-44fe-4b73-8d79-799e1e89fd83-000000/uz4cfOLKr4Eywr_5fc5wblB0TSo=427)

She wasn't a patriot--she was a Big Pharma darling, ready to push **propaganda for profit** while being deceptive about her medical credentials.

As a result of my investigation, **President Trump heard me and yanked her nomination** , saving us from an unqualified US Surgeon General.

[**I have so much work to do and need your help to keep up the fight.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FbCs3WucdE6qXGm2ZYRFKdA%2F892763PFB892U3HU9KOZx763h5GqRw/4/01000196ef18099a-20e4e523-44fe-4b73-8d79-799e1e89fd83-000000/Exc51WSU_rl5YLT-awYXyFMHFcs=427)

**President Trump needs the best people --patriots who will be loyal to the America First agenda rather than fame.**

The Swamp is thick with these traitors, and with your support, **I 'm wading through it to protect Trump's agenda.**

My work isn't cheap. I'm funding my travel--flights to DC, hotels, and databases to track the corrupt. The establishment wants me to be broke and silent, but I answer to you, not them. [**Your donations keep me free to fight.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FbCs3WucdE6qXGm2ZYRFKdA%2F892763PFB892U3HU9KOZx763h5GqRw/5/01000196ef18099a-20e4e523-44fe-4b73-8d79-799e1e89fd83-000000/aFzeZ2NF8r8SRoyNuk2vISXxFxw=427)

[**Please chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help me continue exposing the vetting crisis in DC.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FbCs3WucdE6qXGm2ZYRFKdA%2F892763PFB892U3HU9KOZx763h5GqRw/6/01000196ef18099a-20e4e523-44fe-4b73-8d79-799e1e89fd83-000000/mm6wp-SUcMrcfRRFQAWxkxOaOOo=427)

Thank you so much for all that you do.

With Vigilance, Laura Loomer

This indictment, announced by U.S. Attorney Alina Habba, is [...] There’s a point in politics where losing gracefully becomes the wiser option. Hillary Clinton blew past that exit a long time ago. Her recent remarks dismissing the possibility of a Republican woman ever becoming president—by labeling nearly all of them as “handmaidens to the patriarchy”—weren’t just bitter. They were stunningly out of touch, insulting, and [...] The revelation of former President Joe Biden’s aggressive prostate cancer diagnosis has triggered not only widespread concern but also a growing chorus of medical skepticism—and outright political suspicion. With a Gleason score of 9 and bone metastasis, Biden’s illness is as severe as it gets. But what’s drawing even more attention than the diagnosis itself [...] P.O. | | Earlier this month, Rep. LaMonica McIver joined her colleagues to carry out an inspection of Delaney Hall, a facility in her district where ICE detainees are being held. Like so many of us, she was deeply concerned by reports of inhumane conditions and potential civil rights violations. Now, just weeks later, Trump's Department of Justice has filed charges against her. The decision by the US Attorney to charge Rep. LaMonica McIver has nothing to do with enforcing the law and everything to do with this administration's attempt to intimidate those who dare speak against them or expose the truth. It's about protecting our democracy from those who seek to dismantle it through fear, retaliation, and abuse of power. We can't let that happen, not now, not ever. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
Kamala wants a coronation| | |
---

---
| | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5d69fc58f55249e1ae2ed94de057f4f4&_e=bIj-N20dVHK2HTumlWfKT2yNTxpY3XU_xM3sGjR0mltlAOuCA_J9ZIEFILkTovuhL0D-nhVSY1yksw-UjqniDMhGqLc2eJ51x1Jb-lajRgpiSJFIliCzljXoSeD71INmZmvnwnIp4OhMO2n4oJ4oJ8J4_rQY_gMG8vNZu-hXioDx047WNE2cJy7UbyGU-pg1iIf8vjozcQXINyYGc7Fxn2cgMrGZlA7nwqSt6_lDHYPwnzqh_W5nC2pUeAiTKFyLE5Yy06rEXRKQeciNK-hTia-hday-nynSC5zeoiqHCHgC65LpzQ2KoN3nxJ8TNh_Glj3e7I3YiwMiPLdmz7NE5rlMfkEYT1wpBtewTkObdJ1VzEimr0jHZQX1hhBthmXikqDGYov61Llb9qwc-cLGBN1CfFkGQXZvD84Y4YMY6EA%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend, In November of 2024, the American people rejected the radicalism of the Democrats and saved our nation from four years of Kamala Harris.But now, Californians must take up the gauntlet—because Kamala is getting ready to run for Governor of California.She just kicked off her “comeback” tour with a speech to a room full of Democrat elites in San Francisco. And while she was cracking jokes and spewing her usual word salad nonsense, 35% of Californians are struggling just to afford the basics—**food, rent, medicine.** Kamala didn’t say a single word about that.Not one word about working families...
Not one plan to fix the mess her party created...
And not even a hint of humility... Just more preening, more posturing, and more political theater from someone who’s been a disaster in every job she has had.Let’s be clear: this isn’t just her comeback tour. It’s a coronation plan. The Democrat machine wants to hand Kamala the Governorship.**Not on my watch.** I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running for Governor of California to bring back _freedom, opportunity, and common sense_ —to **Make California Golden Again**.[**Join my campaign today!**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5d69fc58f55249e1ae2ed94de057f4f4&_e=bIj-N20dVHK2HTumlWfKT2yNTxpY3XU_xM3sGjR0mltlAOuCA_J9ZIEFILkTovuhL0D-nhVSY1yksw-UjqniDMhGqLc2eJ51x1Jb-lajRgpiSJFIliCzljXoSeD71INmZmvnwnIp4OhMO2n4oJ4oJ8J4_rQY_gMG8vNZu-hXioDx047WNE2cJy7UbyGU-pg1iIf8vjozcQXINyYGc7Fxn2cgMrGZlA7nwqSt6_lDHYPwnzqh_W5nC2pUeAiTKFyLE5Yy06rEXRKQeciNK-hTicqpjvXSVeWPGdQ3V41U2wh9ijrunH48NEQOcyGDKvrRmhiumarvu6I-RdOuA_uCK0Qs9FkeYq1_KQX27YoBpA6qgFfQ3zrp2_WTzdYgX-GtmGtBgFNMJGvGBGTR-cUItDGCCSVqOdXZ-he6C-btu1c%3D) It does not have to be like this. Californians do not have to be the victims of failed Democrat policies any longer.California can still be the greatest state in the country. I truly believe that with all my heart. We are the home of innovation, creativity, and hard work. But radical democrats like Gavin Newsom, Kamala Harris and their elite allies have turned our state into a cautionary tale for the rest of America.
---
* Crime is up.
* Homelessness is exploding.
* Public schools are failing.
* Housing is unaffordable.
* Businesses and families are fleeing.

---
And Kamala? She wants more of the same. **Kamala Harris failed as a presidential candidate. She failed as Vice President. And she would be catastrophic as Governor.** But make no mistake—Kamala believes she can walk right into the Governor’s mansion. The elites are rallying around her. They think they can buy this race. They don’t believe someone like me—an outsider, a problem-solver, someone who speaks truth to power—can beat their broken machine.**[Let’s prove them wrong.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5d69fc58f55249e1ae2ed94de057f4f4&_e=bIj-N20dVHK2HTumlWfKT2yNTxpY3XU_xM3sGjR0mltlAOuCA_J9ZIEFILkTovuhL0D-nhVSY1yksw-UjqniDMhGqLc2eJ51x1Jb-lajRgpiSJFIliCzljXoSeD71INmZmvnwnIp4OhMO2n4oJ4oJ8J4_rQY_gMG8vNZu-hXioDx047WNE2cJy7UbyGU-pg1iIf8vjozcQXINyYGc7Fxn2cgMrGZlA7nwqSt6_lDHYPwnzqh_W5nC2pUeAiTKFyLE5Yy06rEXRKQeciNK-hTiUe4HycAyH0ZuyEAbwsEwunctGmHmxWSGfvWB0DiT33o7roTUeJjQOPGPKKn24SoaiEQ5DOlLJcd_oD2fieMMMnVdtTsWht7u6b3tMBeD6Ju-X8XvqIlkp7LwPqpg1xrOvN1_KAjpRRVycsCPuCdlL4%3D)** This race is going to come down to a clear choice: **_Fifteen more years of one-party rule from failed Democrats who wrecked this state_**
__**OR**__
** _A new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California golden again._** So I’m calling on every proud Californian who wants to turn things around: **[Will you chip in $25, $50, $100 or more to help me stop Kamala and Make California Golden Again?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5d69fc58f55249e1ae2ed94de057f4f4&_e=bIj-N20dVHK2HTumlWfKT2yNTxpY3XU_xM3sGjR0mltlAOuCA_J9ZIEFILkTovuhL0D-nhVSY1yksw-UjqniDMhGqLc2eJ51x1Jb-lajRgpiSJFIliCzljXoSeD71INmZmvnwnIp4OhMO2n4oJ4oJ8J4_rQY_gMG8vNZu-hXioDx047WNE2cJy7UbyGU-pg1iIf8vjozcQXINyYGc7Fxn2cgMrGZlA7nwqSt6_lDHYPwnzqh_W5nC2pUeAiTKFyLE5Yy06rEXRKQeciNK-hTiTj2r7vHTH-5AF1o2LXxJRvqoXdNn0OD0BnkxsYTj7S-dApZrc-511FWJPdibhUKIISfqxUBsT_b9DtSYHw1BXEO2fPG9PC10ChXwWh3VxnldeDCe88n0LDSw5QfZ9XKma0g2pLPNXh3cjeuoRFrcCw%3D) **We don’t need another elitist who talks in circles and dodges accountability. We need real leadership. We need to talk about the real issues. We need to take our state back.Join me—and let’s get to work.
---
**Steve Hilton** Candidate for Governor of California
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5d69fc58f55249e1ae2ed94de057f4f4&_e=bIj-N20dVHK2HTumlWfKT2yNTxpY3XU_xM3sGjR0mltlAOuCA_J9ZIEFILkTovuhL0D-nhVSY1yksw-UjqniDMhGqLc2eJ51x1Jb-lajRgpiSJFIliCzljXoSeD71INmZmvnwnIp4OhMO2n4oJ4oJ8J4_rQY_gMG8vNZu-hXioDx047WNE2cJy7UbyGU-pg1iIf8vjozcQXINyYGc7Fxn2cgMrGZlA7nwqSt6_lDHYPwnzqh_W5nC2pUeAiTKFyLPwKTv2kYJWFL-xui0AzM0ULzZwIFelN8dLW-WmXVt37OPywuBtpYEb2p9FPxNViVbua619dPVJuQ0auj9OkrBzY0LvtnIPFzIoarK7mktYmYr1BTlVsMjjmJ9GIBr2fYRShIsSr_s2F2QX9Es_RpK5_zKGihzO3abCGX0Yapyi4JPx7e9o1F1Sa8iI5mRpCn)
---
P.S. Kamala Harris doesn’t want a serious debate—because her ideas are the ideas that have led to this calamity. If you’re ready to fight back, I need you on this team. **[Chip in today and let’s end the one-party rule that’s destroying our beautiful Golden State.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5d69fc58f55249e1ae2ed94de057f4f4&_e=bIj-N20dVHK2HTumlWfKT2yNTxpY3XU_xM3sGjR0mltlAOuCA_J9ZIEFILkTovuhL0D-nhVSY1yksw-UjqniDMhGqLc2eJ51x1Jb-lajRgpiSJFIliCzljXoSeD71INmZmvnwnIp4OhMO2n4oJ4oJ8J4_rQY_gMG8vNZu-hXioDx047WNE2cJy7UbyGU-pg1iIf8vjozcQXINyYGc7Fxn2cgMrGZlA7nwqSt6_lDHYPwnzqh_W5nC2pUeAiTKFyLE5Yy06rEXRKQeciNK-hTiT6siFjyPRFINfQ7cmQlKUT0BKAOf2sg8ykSzqbN6dHUBx4AFju4XoBf8F89rGiea4dE6HAjxxv5ENcfH_2typ_ZI6hf4clf8sW2DlgljftLzoqUyBrFclP7OsG4cDlEVMCqcCIyT8uvKsyrRbrMgCA%3D)**

subject: Devil’s bargain
body:
I have three simple words for you today. They’re going to sound familiar (you may even think I’m a broken record)...

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/j4Ik-P4gcIoATlO8qPB5F0CEmUzgeUow8Go78Y4oofQGjSMVkWTfNNXwd-N8GjbrLbHi6c3rGQGonyUIkKjkp-WPdyyQiSYgWSzFbWZvDcOvsT6m6b7a-HqLFqgS7rfV0cRF9iWys20SPwiFHSvwS7eHO_KZhZwYVkJoZPxobKbuYirI06JCjdOn/zRlv8PlK6rdZiU-XV5c-nEJoqaHPW_Mi/9)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/gv9gd7aXwlhZjVSwZ8HFmOkUuLYMjPNg-oFf74O6S2HNjetsIpei6XQromDQ9B65T9xv6az7t4kQzbOTqXjUrzgu7qvwAbOu3o-F6L5QjfNFL1nqw_NYeI2FoHHWuURXWMx1KvZpzULFulQpIs1ufeptct40BlgYnkqpvoXfGvdQ9bieId-DQP1rZ0pQFv1O1yx9Czi7RZfA4OsZ98cstu-7GLVC70oy_yNBhsa0xNoT_jUNga1t0wZVYjhx17bninMCQf88f88XNKMmC-UKVlxSuTpN_WosBWQavukcYt9arIfisob-opNvOC7Kca3zkGw4ZhUf8Uv83gpYXVoocVEmmpv_YokPFP6Tjy3O6OuIVyOA7EgGg6WqgEIg9IxS6KtKJQAE_KX_14iCSFvyCa11wrxPWHVuq3WhCLykazqUGy66GX0K9iF2exakGzyOAE159dolcKrRCsxwjSOWL1wYy1Ti_D9ZQu7ElVHIh4mqVjESg_Q/QQXR3Z6IP4Gdtl31dMh8dmprTfK06tgb/9) Dear Friend, I have three simple words for you today. They're going to sound familiar (you may even think I'm a broken record)...

Not. One. PENNY!

This is how much funding we receive from the government. Not even indirectly in the form of student loans or grants. Zero dollars, zip, zilch, nada. No taxpayer funding of any kind--to protect our principled independence.

But we're nearly alone in our refusal...

Did you hear that Columbia University came close to losing $400,000,000 in federal taxpayer funding?

I think you'll agree that that's a crazy amount of American taxpayer dollars funneled to a university famous lately for promoting riots, protests, and anti-American ideologies.

**Thanks to you, we 're different. We can stick to our principles. It's YOUR generosity to the College that helps us REJECT this devil's bargain...and stay proudly independent!**

This independence means we can fight back against far-Left indoctrination by reaching and teaching millions of Americans nationwide in the principles and practices of good citizenship.

This is the same kind of education, by the way, that our students--the best and brightest, our future leaders--receive here on campus.

And as a new era in America begins, I hope you'll renew your commitment on behalf of liberty.

You can do that by joining our [_**Liberty & Learning Society**_](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/KDNUGtG-9Pl367uNZJ1ZIGQcgLN2njU6Ua0QOnuOBc9zaQ_Z6iLeGRnCNNAK13XEz0gfOGp4kRA7bAE7Ng2l2cIqPlm6OXhYVTGrVdRa0biYCqbsLuIMrWk4z4tPHd-T73kEpNvN8lW5R-wc6ycOgPfzUKqiFLuK6Q_-3sdz4JlnDDY-rrn6Y3UNFZsg703fLLJIEmMENmIXYfiCiz3KxAUNRUiBVLIKEH5UuR6pEZp-c2BQ_waRgvgN2nxorqulQ6sV5C22fPMRqw53BSO-7ClPBJSkLhYzy5T3p6m7UaYQ68DQd7fSD2P422DHvfj-yC7QMFjoofFmMbw_E2XKxYQDPi0oQl-3QZBEBUo6n9NTX0KMKALen1Kq75PXtTVI20QcMtNFvfCnCi50haTAuvoIJ_1i32SXLpBOZiutUUC8CG33TvsmjX2Yhg5IiOw4KWmuMYXjIjmsqzGZDSOXFvAETuzW1kSA1HVQRQSE6Ll-ifmGxeM/2BwNBQ7S3bYkzCOSgSBHQjjAxIj1m1W2/9). Our exclusive monthly giving society is an important way you can revive and preserve liberty. When you join, you'll be reaching and teaching millions of Americans about our constitutional principles every day of the year.

And as a special offer, if you join the **_Liberty & Learning Society_ TODAY** with a generous donation of $15 a month or more, you will receive a FREE leather-bound copy of _The U.S. Constitution: A Reader_ --the same book our students use in their required U.S. Constitution class.

Our _**Liberty & Learning Society**_ members collectively give a little over $800,000 monthly, but 2025 will be a critical year for America. **That 's why we have set an ambitious goal to raise $1,000,000 a month in the coming year--far less than Columbia's $400,000,000 of your tax dollars.**

Everything we do--from the private loans, grants, and scholarships to the completely free online courses offered to millions--relies on the generosity of tens of thousands of faithful monthly donors who understand how much independence is worth.

**Together, we can do so much.**

The prospects for our country are so much brighter than they were just a few months ago. If you, me, and the rest of our _**Liberty & Learning Society**_ members seize this opportunity, we can save liberty over the next couple of years and the long term.

**You can join the _Liberty & Learning Society_ and claim your free leather-bound copy of _The U.S. Constitution: A Reader_ by clicking the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/join-the-liberty-learning-society-2025-not-one-penny-p**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/O6qJFFbWAAG4XkVA0lDbjt06kIlvPhRxmSj0mxFWR9ebjtQD7sRm35Py3ch2rtt6VLhO4jQvDE6v_2ZaEwgu--FSQ7uhRCAFbJ2oUcaQ7R9zj_d9hoUV8VFfZUy2Z5XHK8XwIIrOZSZXsXs-FgxY7JqcrwRXAfY83T6yk9y8z7c9diTPh0MmKjn1W1gZEh4hlIWFXdKiJfVa0X6Pl-FVY18yeLEGpylvxj48fob-1Zbp11lAiDK9qWRof43ENgW-nzZjHfS4z82IUXinHUWZi64sYSSNBY0DCdAaDQowtHNMRfeXU1Y_1O5qOBz_PqM2t2Z6xtlgtGfDdgHgNsITjeCIS8MD3ejmwGyTR4CK5RUF9fDCn2T5cL-T-m_m1cH18XZVr7sUNnWPY4ML0mjTT_ZONaU7hsNWNwB3NL88atoIE4SkdYVYQ2w7tbhVcPUOJ1JvzoBaJCblmmhLUbMmrMKM6MSG26X7yqhqYcePi91x5-h38dI/0At81_n4mulUo08rTFf0C46_WqjW4bv0/9)

One last point before I go...

Even with a friendly administration in office, we will continue to refuse taxpayer dollars. This is a principled stance we will ALWAYS take no matter who is in the White House.

But we need the help of our monthly donors to remain independent. Will you think about joining? It's easy to sign up. And if you need to cancel, that's easy too--so there's no risk. I hope you'll consider this.

Regardless of your choice, thanks for being a Hillsdale friend and supporter. I look forward to hearing from you soon!

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Not. One. PENNY!

When so many elite colleges and universities gorge themselves on taxpayer dollars ($400,000,000!), **we 've set an ambitious goal to raise $1,000,000 in monthly gifts through our _Liberty & Learning Society_ this year**. You will help us remain independent from taxpayer dollars, therefore free to educate young Americans on our founding principles of liberty.

Together, we can do so much! SPECIAL OFFER: If you join _**Liberty & Learning Society**_ with a generous gift of **$15 a month or more** , you will receive a FREE leather-bound copy of _The U.S. Constitution: A Reader_. That's the same book our students use in their required Constitution course here on campus.

Most importantly, you will help educate millions of Americans on behalf of liberty through _Imprimis_ , our FREE online courses and podcasts, our K-12 initiatives, and all of our other educational outreach.

**You can join today by clicking the secure link below:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/join-the-liberty-learning-society-2025-not-one-penny-p](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/HyYVymA3Rqzg4J69laSt7rcCS4wX8CYV-ojoZLoWHMpRlUsTOsiTwnoTwDJAHvM7s7tkrnLufMgeo_qJ9NKIP5tiYRmDG2RHOwja68lKM8ufrsNnMvKhCeAw0M9ul9WDI-MNMbHwZPsaC1tjJXIPlmu__sdz_nca1PfwxlhrM0nAvSP1OTh-RLCZmrxVfxigo3wBZpGzrXwvvQFobSgmFfeUUK4tcFk6dQ4u8v1zLnWqQJs-titVFhfau8KvNqGzkDTcdNtnbq30q5FbOgcO6DgMAJNzhoDsCekUpGWBf-LblPqU-UPDAUOzgyEH8trX8YubOf-G1s1XuaeDRYFMq8Oh0kxtzJurouVztcD-AFozQrD1dF6CL977u3PRbRbFHAmGkO9_dU5TB95KyaQOF_vJHpYaRc2Q6f0tV3rX8212mHo5rc1Omy5CkPWEPQryNLVEd4pcAx_kP846Nnmy-MAOFrFMK8yaR7Kc3cgdSKetCLXU1DM/a8n6Md6NkhMzQNfwpbwE54TVpNQB_0sQ/9)** | [Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/dVXEuSk_F7kVm3qYsvwfbrSYjWTMjrR-ZvHf5H0sArdrTglrC_okiqdXblKxOabMMMT717VJtG6iyspBnCMc0onj2tPCGQYd_2F_iGtyNac_TMrRX3WtnaM-YNIfhgjwWLcqz38yLt4nRHEYPbSAZL7Mu3VTeZOFBG33SFonsdK09pKog7GMwdZpM0xIAOGS3hqJEhLpR4l9FvzWXakSrYyr_oQO_GJhEw/r1-d5sCv95LsLURjkNtcavVuBz2_ygAC/9) [Unsubscribe from all communications.](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/j4Ik-P4gcIoATlO8qPB5F0CEmUzgeUow8Go78Y4oofQGjSMVkWTfNNXwd-N8GjbrLbHi6c3rGQGonyUIkKjkp-WPdyyQiSYgWSzFbWZvDcOvsT6m6b7a-HqLFqgS7rfV0cRF9iWys20SPwiFHSvwS7eHO_KZhZwYVkJoZPxobKbuYirI06JCjdOn/zRlv8PlK6rdZiU-XV5c-nEJoqaHPW_Mi/9)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Last night in Garland
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Last night in Garland I met with over 1,000 people for a town hall:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250520.50_jq9&refcode=ema20250520-240120&t=1001&akid=240120%2E444211%2EDYMxPU ]A picture of over 1,000 people sitting in a ballroom with Beto
O'Rourke, who is in the center holding a microphone.

A 17-year old girl asked how to get engaged in politics and what she can
do now to make a difference before she’s able to vote in 2026. Someone
else stood up to say how disappointed they are in how the Democratic Party
leadership in Washington, DC speaks to people and suggested that Democrats
should put Trump and Republicans on their back heels by using the laws
that they are passing against them.

Another woman asked what our strategy is for not just registering folks to
vote but to actually get them to show up to cast a ballot—in every
election. One person asked what the Democratic Party is going to do to
support trans folks because as of late, it feels like some in the Party
are abandoning them and other targeted groups in America.

It’s really powerful to listen to each other, to have these conversations,
and to learn from what we’re hearing and seeing. It’s the only way we
build the large, broad coalition necessary to stop Trump and deliver
something far better for this country.

At the town halls I’ve been hosting throughout Texas, there’s only one
rule: be good to each other. Folks can ask questions or make comments that
disagree with my positions or those of anyone else there. We don’t check
party affiliation at the door. Whether someone voted for Trump or Harris
or didn’t vote, all are welcome.

Many signed up last night to volunteer with Powered by People, others
volunteered for some of the nascent campaigns that are beginning to form
in North Texas. But whether it's doing this important volunteer work, or
even just talking to your friends and neighbors, classmates and colleagues
about what’s happening in the country right now, we’ve got to make sure
everyone is aware there is no act too small to make a difference. These
town halls encourage listening and they encourage action—it’s what it’s
going to take to come through.

I’m staying on the road—meeting folks face-to-face, listening to their
concerns, and holding town halls in every part of the state, no matter how
Red or Blue the county. Because we can’t afford to write anyone off. And
we sure as hell can’t afford to sit this moment out.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250520.50_jq9&refcode=ema20250520-240120&t=1002&akid=240120%2E444211%2EDYMxPU ]If you’re able, please donate $3 today. I don’t take a
salary from Powered by People, but everything else—putting gas in the
tank, renting venues, making sure we can actually meet people where they
are—costs money. If this work matters to you, I hope you’ll chip in.

Stay strong, stay hopeful—and let’s keep pushing forward together,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=240120%2E444211%2EDYMxPU

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..EE_9H7bVatEgdJlu7STb41qCtL1PoUziCmSQlyvtEv4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164029287)
Today I [Kahlil Greene](https://open.substack.com/users/69762750-kahlil-greene?utm_source=mentions) for a discussion on Substack live! Be sure to give Kahlil a subscription. We discussed Malcolm X (who turned 100 yesterday), the history of enslaved Africans and the fact that up to 30% of them were Muslim, resilience of enslaved people to fight back against white supremacy, and how we can combat racism today. Be sure to tune in and leave your comments and questions below!

The Moms for America Podcast was honored to attend the White House celebration of President Trump's first 100 days in office. In
this episode, Moms for America Vice President and podcast host Debbie Kraulidis spoke with Ron Vitiello, a Senior Advisor serving
with US Customs and Border Protection. Debbie also sat down with Deputy Press Secretary Anna Kelly to talk about the energy and
transparency of Trump 2.0. Like, subscribe and share.

clean_body: This week, we're sharing more updates and perspective from the White House celebration of President Trump's first 100 days in office. Here's what we saw... If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] May 20, 2025 • Newsletter First 100 Days from the White House - Part 2 Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] The Moms for America Podcast was honored to attend the White House celebration of President Trump's first 100 days in office. In this episode, Moms for America Vice President and podcast host Debbie Kraulidis spoke with Ron Vitiello, a Senior Advisor serving with US Customs and Border Protection. Debbie also sat down with Deputy Press Secretary Anna Kelly to talk about the energy and transparency of Trump 2.0. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] Top 10 Winners and Losers in the First 100 Days of Trump's New Term We're continuing our look at the historic first 100 days of the Trump administration 2.0. This time, we're focused on the top ten winners and losers that have emerged as the Golden Era takes shape. You may not be surprised who earned the dubious distinction of landing on our list of losers; however, we think you'll be glad to know who tops our winners list for 2025! Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. ## Supreme Court Sides With Laurel Libby, Women’s Sports Advocate
The Supreme Court ruled in favor of a Maine lawmaker who was censured for defending women’s sports from male intrusion. Maine State Rep. Laurel Libby, a Republican, filed a federal lawsuit against Maine House Speaker Ryan Fecteau for censuring her after she sounded the alarm on a biological male student beating his female competitors at the Maine State Class [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/apTovfuuM5Ql4TRU8vmWyUSlEeqDQ5qLKvFy-_IHWW1NweIyeXcD8z4l5mR8L_Yw_AFq9_xtSEhtk2k49YB0F_YGsFDpr2RtPdBX4hIDfgT0WQ48qDSEzUhvCSjXhXCUt3FPfKukfr4bplzccYdq4Che9eIyUb2ngCLhl8CpBIJHzEvN1eVADRcfEQh73fqAK1URllIuYL9sHD8MEyyIbyciZd-IVlq3t5KojUEHkIxcEVAx95gjbA97zT7s8n43sO7PvMc45GC8_kfsbpTRTGuMyepRZACWqmGqUCA73si5UNB-XHKBOUCvfk1KXagcOMzpnxDG9aZPFppWpT7Fj56-fK_ljSjK/p2Kb6kXQX196_2YgifLZlRDxcV9YV-Y6/9)

## Supreme Court unanimously rejects narrow approach to deadly force by police
During a routine traffic stop near Houston in 2016, a police officer killed Ashtian Barnes by blindly firing two shots into his car after jumping onto the doorsill as Barnes began to drive away. Last year, the U.S. Court of Appeals for the 5th Circuit ruled that the shooting was justified by the threat that the [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/p1CqVFgsRbnOiJ0nNPea62qDQNwccs6F_4_cDR39-C0J48mbpT42nFZeSnmAPiV5hg4la6oyhhge65NQ_5OqpJYYA-GVe_f-_1n7h-E_EDS50KEj03XYJKmpwcc6B_gCbRt8PW1mPugWQo9u3u4YNuio4EZaqQ7S_IuHuGt-sW6mlWyQwcQgcOzPWxpOY9WxxKPYlX0uCUMmb630oLjSMiME4PPXVDcDkMHMN8hH3-XqVqkpBoCfR1r7Wj9azzph7KGjCpLHGDZxBKp8e5l1P_B6LP6Vu-5JLfK6VDtFWo3Iu_oyIztdNc9HavEuwpsKcbgYLme4dLgwC-FkSIKQKprWp4Xj9_WWDOzDWQqs-StQNHL6bND1/ArMJkSvmwtxQ5JQ1BcLWzDI5mfhMxFvT/9)

## ‘Nasty surprise!’ Pensioners face tax shock due to frozen thresholds
Pensioners across the UK are being "dragged" into paying tax due to frozen thresholds and rising state pensions, according to a finance expert. Shimeon Lee, policy analyst at the TaxPayers' Alliance, told GB News that elderly Britons are facing a "nasty surprise" if they were not expecting to be paying taxes. | |

# [Price Controls Alone Are Not the Long-Term Solution to Lowering Drug and Device Prices ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=164029930&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MDI5OTMwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDc3NzA1OTMsImV4cCI6MTc1MDM2MjU5MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.kfFxTae4ds-xTXSf1OCVdp-LaMed8jQ1BY1lcn8TG4M)
### Competition and Less Regulation Are The Answer
| | [Dr. Michael Goldstein](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct)
---
| May 20
---
| [](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=164029930&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MDI5OTMwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0Nzc3MDU5MywiZXhwIjoxNzUwMzYyNTkzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTQ1NDg1MyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.TOIHHqo0fE32SuUxeaTtvUQvQuJit_L-QaDlHybGmug&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=164029930&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0MDI5OTMwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDc3NzA1OTMsImV4cCI6MTc1MDM2MjU5MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.kfFxTae4ds-xTXSf1OCVdp-LaMed8jQ1BY1lcn8TG4M&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/drmichaelgoldstein4ct/p/price-controls-alone-are-not-the?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

**As President Trump vows to lower prescription drugs while making the rest of the world pay its fair share - this is the beginning of the issue to solve this healthcare cost crisis.[See Executive Order Fact Sheet](https://substack.com/redirect/8f51d162-a260-4723-9b37-7032a403c449?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Pledge your support](https://substack..53n0Up8yH9az3L3mO3HSSYTIJwDewVRzEzhRlChqDis?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164029930)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/36dbb19b-04de-4e59-b542-031c83bd4ad2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
medical device and money
As a long time practicing physician, _**I am concerned about the high prices of medications, especially those containing inexpensive ingredients.**_ These exorbitant prices place an unfair burden to patients who are dependent on medications for both acute and chronic conditions.
Such prices should not occur in a free market economy, however, healthcare and the pharmaceutical industry are not free market industries.
Gone are the days when small entrepreneurs can make it in the pharmaceutical industry. T**he over-regulation of the healthcare industry, in the name of delivering safe products, have resulted in anticompetitive effects.**
The average capitalized pre-launch R&D new drug costs vary widely; they range from $161 million to $4.54 billion (2019 US$). Anti-cancer drugs are the highest (between $944 million and $4.54 billion)
_**The barriers to entry are the upfront capital at risk to cover the costs of R &D, the high failure rate of prospective drugs and the lengthy FDA regulatory approval process of both the drug and the manufacturing process.**_
It is not uncommon to see drugs and devices come to market five years sooner in Europe than in the US. These delays deprive Americans of the use of sometimes life changing drugs, especially in cancer and other terminal illnesses.
**An excellent example of how our FDA regulatory system delays the introduction of American medical technology and procedures is LASIK.**
In the early 1980's IBM scientists developed an Excimer Laser to etch computer chips.
In 1983 Stephen Trokel MD and Rangaswamy Srinivasani PHD showed that the Excimer Laser could reshape corneal tissue in animal eyes without causing significant tissue damage.
In 1986 Drs. Charles Munneryn and Stephen Trokel formed VISX to design and manufacture Excimer Lasers to correct nearsightedness and farsightedness.
VISX went through a long FDA approval process, merged with other companies and settled lawsuits with others. By 1989, the company was exporting their lasers to Europe where PRK and LASIK first started to be performed.
In 1989 Dr. Gholem Peyman was granted a US Patent for LASIK.
In the early 1990's LASIK was being performed in Europe but not until 1995 was PRK approved by the FDA and 1999 LASIK was approved by the FDA.
The excimer laser was developed in the US, the VISK machine that delivered the laser to treat patients was also developed in the US. Yet, LASIK surgery was first performed in Europe a decade before it could be performed in the US. **VISX suffered financial difficulties because of the long FDA approval process.**
In the end, our FDA regulatory process took almost a decade longer than approval in Europe. A**mericans were denied access to this technology for almost a decade and in the end LASIK is more expensive to perform in the US.**
The LASIK story is the classical story of how a slow and expensive FDA regulatory process delays the introduction of new technology and drugs in the US; **t** _**his results in increased prices and deprives patients of innovations that can sometimes be life changing.**_
_**A major restructuring of the FDA approval process will lower drug and device prices while still making it profitable for companies to develop new devices and drugs.**_
**Lowering drug prices by executive order without changing the fundamental problems is a start but it is not the long term solution to the problem.**
_**To lower drug costs, we need to streamline our drug approval process from a cost benefit perspective, use technology including AI to facilitate drug development, and use more sophisticated data analysis to streamline the clinical trial process.**_
**Thank you for your continued support and please reach out for assistance. Please subscribe and spread the word as we need your support to grow this message.**
Dr. Michael Goldstein
_The father-son team continues on_ so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT and this country together in a meaningful way.

name: Jared Golden
subject: It’s official: I’m running for re-election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
The path to a Democratic majority runs through Maine.
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb30998fa-9063-4c44-bead-891bbc74e0df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a4ba603-4800-4798-a72a-917ae9d6bbe0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, Over the past several months, many of you have asked about my political future. I’ve made my decision and today I’m excited to share some big news: I’m officially running for re-election in Maine’s 2nd Congressional District! I believe the best way to restore balance in Washington is for Democrats to take back the House of Representatives — and that starts right here in Maine. [Can I count on you to split a donation between me and Blue Amp Action to power our campaign to victory?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T605e2573-0cc5-44f9-82c4-1a2fd9a25d72/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| The path to a Democratic majority runs directly through Maine. I’m committed to making sure no one like Paul LePage blusters his way into Congress. While Republicans in Washington are pushing to dismantle healthcare, rig the tax code for the wealthy, and roll back fundamental rights, I’m fighting for what matters: affordable healthcare, workers’ rights, reproductive freedom, and Maine’s proud heritage industries. The stakes couldn’t be higher. This race will be competitive and expensive — but we’ve proven before that we can win here, and I know we can do it again. [Will you split a donation between me and Blue Amp Action to help us defeat Paul LePage and restore our system of checks and balances in Congress?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3fca3bef-4fcb-44d0-baeb-98b759ceb296/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T84bb00c7-909b-4eb6-98ab-b7888cd6e8a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: General John King
subject: Soldier and a lawman
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
I’ve served in the most violent regions of the world and the most dangerous streets in America. I’m not afraid to take on the D.C. Swamp. The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL |
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d9ce879deec845429fd34b103a7925ed&_e=l8s7NonHzkJeFp40hOxyrF5HczKUDy6gEXP-l2soA0JxYesynpFkSoc20vDcpaVcbNUWyAt20Av4h01O9-4pkdg37yUzJIIQmWUJ3p0_CWGw7BGE5CtX0e-nQJsJGEzQI4tJtExSDWwzysz2Ttw3CBOoSmnSf3xbaDrc_cwjHAfa9xkCReDfv2Hcqk7RSHMlc1QffpKCpvq1GoyUdcCD_jjHzUEVz1emeiGr9fmo3ncKYN_eHHK3dogcGKq6ZgVm6f_RWpzCWHjP0Xcb155_pcxXYIZTyC-9sI6S1SD6qjyhxpxXsAkujqs5WSZ_EpjM90mL0qX-3q2H6auDNBpCc5ynTtknsm6NkaaK1SLLB-m0cxIRUjwpv_f0ipr91MosfeiOMVo123SDPeiO7GLvIA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

**I enlisted in the U.S. Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general.** I deployed and led troops around the world, including Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and at our southern border during President Trump’s first term.

**I joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop and became Doraville’s Chief of Police.** I locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and was shot and stabbed in the line of duty.

**I’m proud to support President Trump.** I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state.

Honor. Integrity. Service. America First. That’s what our country needs right now, but Democrat Senator Jon Ossoff is totally AWOL.

[**My name is John King, solving problems is what I do, and I’m answering the call to run for U.S. Senate in Georgia to defeat Jon Ossoff and give President Trump the reinforcements he needs to Make America Great Again.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d9ce879deec845429fd34b103a7925ed&_e=l8s7NonHzkJeFp40hOxyrF5HczKUDy6gEXP-l2soA0JxYesynpFkSoc20vDcpaVcbNUWyAt20Av4h01O9-4pkdg37yUzJIIQmWUJ3p0_CWGw7BGE5CtX0e-nQJsJGEzQI4tJtExSDWwzysz2Ttw3CBOoSmnSf3xbaDrc_cwjHAfa9xkCReDfv2Hcqk7RSHMlc1QffpKCpvq1GoyUdcCD_jjHzUEVz1emeiGr9fmo3ncKYN_eHHK3dogcGKq6ZgVm89pIMP9an4cwwmOfZ_RpzdtAAEXvUKIVuThNqVbvnEBpnXtMMC2YKbF38v0dWEizhYjOFY1vMfiUMebWeHm-R6yHNqoX6fpkuzzcPV3FVIasvdbuxZdYAXmg-gvCGKRxhcH-lX3G_so7fP5yOIsLFQ%3D%3D)

**And now he says he wants to impeach President Trump.**

_Ossoff is California’s third senator, not Georgia’s senior senator._

| | | | | Peter,
It’s time to take action!
A dangerous bill is being pushed in Salem, and it directly targets our community in Goshen.
[House Bill 3971](https://harbickfororegon.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8e88706e1a1ec52e2c474b852&id=e2fd999d54&e=a4392ea25d) would override local zoning laws to allow Lane County to build a recycling plant for garbage and hazardous materials on sensitive wetland property that FLOODS.
Adding insult to injury, this bill will actually lead to HIGHER garbage fees for Lane County residents.
This isn’t just bad policy. It’s an environmental stewardship disaster, with little public notice and community input.
**I need your help speaking out against this bad legislation, just as I am.**
[**Click to submit your testimony now and help us stop this bill in its tracks**](https://harbickfororegon.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8e88706e1a1ec52e2c474b852&id=3cc7fac90b&e=a4392ea25d)**!**
---
| [STOP HB 3971!](https://harbickfororegon.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8e88706e1a1ec52e2c474b852&id=2520e2fe0f&e=a4392ea25d)
---
| (Click the button and then click "Submit Testimony" to send in your written comments as soon as possible.)
**The bill will receive a committee hearing tomorrow morning.** Submit your opposition to this bill now to be sure the committee sees local oppositon!
Let’s stand together for Goshen, for Lane County, and for Oregon.
– Rep. Darin Harbick
---
|

Dan Goldman shows how you deal with Marge Greene when she filibusters and lies non-stop. You don't give in, you fight back and you Wreck Her:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a97b2340-6684-4adf-80ef-0cd70fc7e123?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Aaaand...The dilapidated Jabberwocky himself, who's freaking out as Republicans start speaking out against him on Qatar and potential Medicaid cuts!
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2a79105c-73ac-4884-87d1-1d4c5d938754?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Who can forget the journal-_lust for every last dollar_ , Jake Tapper, who knows to look away from current threats to democracy. Why pay attention to _that --BORING!--_when you can make bucks attacking a former Democratic President?
[](https://substack.com/redirect/224bbf95-ba6c-4f20-bc61-a62dd6d531ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**OK, this one 's fully political.** Bruce Springsteen, if you haven't seen it, calls Trump & crew as a "corrupt, incompetent and treasonous," for which a loser who always dreamt of being loved by elites, lost it and threatened The Boss. **Listen to Bruce 's words:**

---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108059552/546705080/-1404205816?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_TAN_NO_20250520_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTA0ODkxYy1iNzM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ez_g81z4N4VisbtvUH0r0931fwwFbiFwx1ecxAred6A=) Unelected, unaccountable and out of control billionaires are buying power and influence in Trump’s Washington, Peter. **What kind of America are we trying to create?** Housing costs are too high.
Grocery costs are too high.
Insurance costs are too high.
Childcare costs are too high.
Utility costs are too high.
**America is too expensive, Peter.** It is **not** acceptable — in the wealthiest country in the history of the world — for countless families to be forced to live paycheck to paycheck. As Trump's Billionaire-First agenda takes shape and his wealthy benefactors claim exclusive access to our democracy, Democrats are the only ones committed to lowering costs for hardworking taxpayers. **Here's my question for you, Peter:** Are we going to allow Republicans to spend the next four years building a country of the billionaires, by the billionaires and for the billionaires? **Or are we going to stand together, build a strong foundation to fight back against the greed and corruption of extreme MAGA Republicans and the billionaire class?** **[Democrats have already decided, Peter: We will not sell out working people, families and seniors to give the ultra-wealthy a tax handout. We can't secure a more affordable future by ourselves. We need your support. clean_body: | = = Unelected, unaccountable and out of control billionaires are buying power and influence in Trump’s Washington, Peter. What kind of America are we trying to create? Housing costs are too high. Grocery costs are too high. Insurance costs are too high. Childcare costs are too high. Utility costs are too high. America is too expensive, Peter. It is not acceptable — in the wealthiest country in the history of the world — for countless families to be forced to live paycheck to paycheck. As Trump's Billionaire-First agenda takes shape and his wealthy benefactors claim exclusive access to our democracy, Democrats are the only ones committed to lowering costs for hardworking taxpayers. Here's my question for you, Peter: Are we going to allow Republicans to spend the next four years building a country of the billionaires, by the billionaires and for the billionaires? Or are we going to stand together, build a strong foundation to fight back against the greed and corruption of extreme MAGA Republicans and the billionaire class? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Fair Shot PAC and DCCC will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Fair Shot PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States | mailto:info@fairshotpac.org | Paid for by Fair Shot PAC

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: CHAOS in the Texas GOP...
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?refcode=050925_4 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?refcode=050925_4]
Republicans are already tearing each other apart over this Senate seat, and we are LOVING it... because while they fight each other, we're putting together a plan to WIN.
Cornyn. Paxton. Maybe someone worse. It doesn’t matter who wins their internal power grab — we’re preparing to beat all of them.
That means we need to be ready to help Texas Democrats:
✅ Identify key voter drop-off zones from 2022
✅ Expand rural outreach and Spanish-language media
✅ Train local candidates to run down-ballot
✅ Build rapid-response infrastructure to counter GOP disinfo
✅ Fill their warchest NOW so they don’t get outspent early in the gameWe’ve seen what happens when Democrats start late. We’re not doing that again.
Will you chip in $10 today to help us fund this plan from the ground up? This is how we flip the Senate seat. This is how we win Texas. And this is how we stop MAGA from steamrolling our future. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?refcode=050925_4]

Make no mistake: This isn’t just about Texas. This is about the future of the Senate. The future of our economy. The future of our democracy.
Trump and Paxton want to burn it all down. We can stop them — if we start fighting back today . [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?refcode=050925_4]

body:
Yes, especially when it’s used to fight Trump’s agenda.

|
---
Hey Peter,

We’re up against GOP megadonors, misinformation, and Trump’s Project 2025 Agenda. We have an initial advantage, but we’ll lose it fast if we don’t outwork Republicans. **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108059868/546706099/1717332614?amount=5&refcode=DOTL_20250520_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmNzk1YmQyLWI3MzUtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BE8JK_YqtVQV3YbM1Rq5PVLoQGHep1s8kKgm5wW-uOE=)**_But our movement is powered by everyday people like you – not billionaires._ And when you chip in, even just **$5** , you’re helping lead this fight.

**That’s the power of grassroots giving. That’s the power of you. ****[We’re asking you to believe in this movement with just $5. body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108059890/546706147/2109746102?refcode=250520_MFC_Johnson_Vulnerable&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODQyNjc4YS1iNzM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tHH0k6vUJg_zyov8zpaU1lttRzEMTne_Dnd6zepltC0=) Friends, There’s something Lindsey Graham doesn’t want you to know; his Senate seat is vulnerable. After years of prioritizing his own political career and choosing to cozy up to power time and time again, Lindsey has only grown more out of touch with the everyday people of South Carolina. And as a result, he’s no longer the best option for everyday South Carolinians. **That puts his seat at risk.** While Lindsey Graham has been in DC for the last 3 decades, I’ve been building things right here in South Carolina. From factory floors to boardrooms, I know first hand what it means to roll up my sleeves and actually create things that will help South Carolina. For too long, we’ve stood by as Lindsey continues to put politics over people. I’m running for office to put a stop to the 30+ years of political incompetence that South Carolina has been forced to live with. To build this campaign the right way, we need all the help we can get. [**In our first weeks in operation, we’re asking you to join our campaign as a Founding Donor by making a contribution of $15 or more -- split evenly with Seth Moulton. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Join Me On Daystar Tomorrow
body:
Tomorrow, I will be joining Daystar TV for their Ministry Now segment which will air live at 12pm EST and then re-air at 9pm EST & 1am EST. I will al
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21544469.11603.1.d11553c6dea0f6ca3a53f3ff0560266b) |
---
Tomorrow, I will be joining **Daystar TV** for their **Ministry Now** segment which will air live at _12pm EST_ and then re-air at _9pm EST_ & _1am EST_. I will also be on **Joni's Table Talk** program which will air later in June. I am really looking forward to this and am _en route_ to Dallas, TX now. Tune in because this program will **BLESS YOU**! Watch here **Daystar** here: [https://daystar.com/live](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21544469.11604.1.00cfc6d692704d76817b7fc115893811) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21544469.11605.1.05192928c3e702d43780e1b9ad3c3229)
---
Check out this **2 minute video** real quick of what is coming to Tulsa: [https://youtube.com/live/AVu-bsalsbE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21544469.11606.1.0f5d8eb026ce9be047a37f5f514c0995) One thing _I can verify_ is that being in ministry is sometimes difficult. In fact, the **New York Times** produced a survey about Pastors that indicate somewhere around **1500 leave the ministry** each month in America and _"57% of Pastors would leave ministry if they thought there was somewhere else to go."_ Pastors and Ministry Leaders are always being a blessing to their congregations and communities but sometimes they themsleves are _under appreciated_. Therefore, on June 5 at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21544469.11607.1.caa37815d5e60ff7f54076a2d1dbdc78) we will be holding **A NIGHT OF BLESSING** specifically for Pastors and Ministry Leaders. **Tim Tebow** will encourage, **Colton Dixon** will sing, the **food** will be good and **gifts** will be given away. **Dinner is at the Mar-a-lago of Tulsa!** This is a **PRIVATE + FREE** event for Pastors and Ministry Leaders. **However, I have 3 asks:** _First_ , **Share this with your Pastor**! Pastors and Ministry Leaders can RSVP here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1665203](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21544469.11608.1.3b4ee4af75257e989b950cf867ef9cc7) _Second_ , If you are a business owner **consider sponsoring the event**. Sponsors will help cover the costs to be a blessing to the Pastors that will be in attendance. Or if you would like to bless these pastors you can do so by visiting: [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21544469.11609.1.be37309d5e2899cdd98628c3e20afcc4) To sponsor this event visit [BUSINESS SPONSOR](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21544469.11610.1.2b8f6a6e0542a4633ad2c3c5824abab0) or email me at **jlahmeyer@sheridan.church** _Third_ , **Pray for this night**. There might be a Pastor on the verge of calling it quits that just needs a nudge of encouragement to stay in the game. Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ RSVP: NIGHT OF BLESSING ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21544469.11611.1.1d7be264af8f91af325a32c3c1a06d12)

## The Reviews Are In!
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21544469.11612.1.cb15d19285a5b3f4c5e400b69972aaf1)
---
Last week was interesting... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21544469.11613.1.ca9218f49ddcc0e24c9f08eff0a9f573) was released for pre-orders. **I have been blown away by the response!** Many have actually started reading the [eBook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21544469.11614.1.208d68d0aca1a915f7ceeace50c5a73b) before the hard copy arrives in the mail and the reviews have been _INCREDIBLE_! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** plus the **downloadable eBook** for tablets and phones as well as **theme song** as a bundled package here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21544469.11615.1.2f30bc7c92bc1de23c8b3627c042644c)_ A **BIG** shipment of books arrive this week for me to sign and then they will be sent out. I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21544469.11616.1.3b1d638ba3183ed05765568315a4e1ff) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

---

name: Ayanna Pressley
subject: We welcomed Rümeysa home
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250520-1360-foote&t=1001&akid=1360%2E342411%2EYxDiKX ]Squad Victory Fund

Last week, after tireless advocacy, we welcomed home Rümeysa Öztürk who
was unjustly detained for simply exercising her fundamental First
Amendment rights.

[1]A selfie of Rümeysa Öztürk and Ayanna Pressley, both smiling into the
camera.

For simply authoring an op-ed, she was met with the full force of Donald
Trump’s authoritarian project — silenced, detained and punished.

Rümeysa should never have been abducted and ripped away from her community
in Somerville in the first place.

She should never have had her visa revoked.

She should never have been transported almost 2,000 miles away to an ICE
facility in rural Louisiana and subjected to squalid, inhumane conditions.

She should never have suffered multiple asthma attacks and feared for her
life so far away from home.

Rümeysa’s experience was not just an act of cruelty. It was a deliberate,
coordinated attempt to intimidate, to instill fear, and to send a chilling
message to anyone who dares to speak out against injustice.

I’ve said it before, Donald Trump is a dictator. A dictator seeks to
silence dissenting voices. He wants a citizenry that is ignorant and
uninformed, a citizenry that is indifferent to the suffering of a
neighbor, a citizenry that is inactive.

We’re sending a message of our own to this White House: your efforts to
silence us, to crush dissent, and to undermine our fundamental rights are
being rejected.

This fight is not over. Rümeysa is released on bail, but her deportation
proceedings continue.

So while we take stock of this important victory, made possible because of
public outcry and the thousands of people who joined us in Congress, the
courts, and in community, we are clear-eyed about the work that remains.

To everyone who has stood with Rümeysa, who has spoken out, who has joined
in this fight — in Congress, in the courts and in community — thank you.

We would not be here today if it weren’t for you. Our work is not done,
but we are stronger together.

Ayanna

clean_body: [ ]Squad Victory Fund Last week, after tireless advocacy, we welcomed home Rümeysa Öztürk who was unjustly detained for simply exercising her fundamental First Amendment rights. [1]A selfie of Rümeysa Öztürk and Ayanna Pressley, both smiling into the camera. For simply authoring an op-ed, she was met with the full force of Donald Trump’s authoritarian project — silenced, detained and punished. Rümeysa should never have been abducted and ripped away from her community in Somerville in the first place. She should never have had her visa revoked. She should never have been transported almost 2,000 miles away to an ICE facility in rural Louisiana and subjected to squalid, inhumane conditions. She should never have suffered multiple asthma attacks and feared for her life so far away from home. Rümeysa’s experience was not just an act of cruelty. It was a deliberate, coordinated attempt to intimidate, to instill fear, and to send a chilling message to anyone who dares to speak out against injustice. I’ve said it before, Donald Trump is a dictator. A dictator seeks to silence dissenting voices. He wants a citizenry that is ignorant and uninformed, a citizenry that is indifferent to the suffering of a neighbor, a citizenry that is inactive. We’re sending a message of our own to this White House: your efforts to silence us, to crush dissent, and to undermine our fundamental rights are being rejected. This fight is not over. Rümeysa is released on bail, but her deportation proceedings continue. So while we take stock of this important victory, made possible because of public outcry and the thousands of people who joined us in Congress, the courts, and in community, we are clear-eyed about the work that remains. To everyone who has stood with Rümeysa, who has spoken out, who has joined in this fight — in Congress, in the courts and in community — thank you. We would not be here today if it weren’t for you. Our work is not done, but we are stronger together. Ayanna

We're fighting back by recruiting, training, and electing pro-choice champions — and we need your insight! | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108060236/546707419/93694709?refcode=WUENE547_2025520_PillsSurvey_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056193&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTg3YmIzMi1iOTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4B5M7DICXMwUZ8cWJwNI_O-RKQfyd0NkhSb8CnYDSSE=&emci=5587bb32-b935-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5a87bb32-b935-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5177934)
---
Peter,

Here's the latest: GOP think tanks have released a ridiculous, completely unscientific junk "report" that they're hoping will help them ban medication abortion. **And RFK Jr. is taking the bait.** He ordered a review on mifepristone; a blatantly political move meant to sow confusion and disinformation about a safe, effective way drug used to access abortion care.

We're collecting feedback to help shape the next phase of our work in meeting this dangerous moment in anti-choice pseudo-science, and your answers will do more than guide EMILYs List. They'll help inform the strategies of the Democratic pro-choice women running for office in 2025 and beyond!

We are recruiting candidates who can help shape the national conversation around Democratic values — and then we're giving those candidates as much support as early in their campaigns as possible.
[**This is your chance to help shape the strategy of our team, Peter. Please complete the survey by 11:59 p.m. tonight to make sure your voice is heard in this critical moment:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108060237/546707420/93694709?refcode=WUENE547_2025520_PillsSurvey_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056193&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTg3YmIzMi1iOTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4B5M7DICXMwUZ8cWJwNI_O-RKQfyd0NkhSb8CnYDSSE=&emci=5587bb32-b935-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5a87bb32-b935-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5177934)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108060238/546707422/93694709?refcode=WUENE547_2025520_PillsSurvey_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056193&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTg3YmIzMi1iOTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4B5M7DICXMwUZ8cWJwNI_O-RKQfyd0NkhSb8CnYDSSE=&emci=5587bb32-b935-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5a87bb32-b935-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5177934)

clean_body: This is your chance to help shape Democratic strategy, Peter | !!️ Republicans are pushing for a national medication abortion ban. We're fighting back by recruiting, training, and electing pro-choice champions — and we need your insight! | Peter, Here's the latest: GOP think tanks have released a ridiculous, completely unscientific junk "report" that they're hoping will help them ban medication abortion. And RFK Jr. is taking the bait. He ordered a review on mifepristone; a blatantly political move meant to sow confusion and disinformation about a safe, effective way drug used to access abortion care. We're collecting feedback to help shape the next phase of our work in meeting this dangerous moment in anti-choice pseudo-science, and your answers will do more than guide EMILYs List. They'll help inform the strategies of the Democratic pro-choice women running for office in 2025 and beyond! We are recruiting candidates who can help shape the national conversation around Democratic values — and then we're giving those candidates as much support as early in their campaigns as possible. Thank you for your input, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Team WFP
subject: A billionaire backed down. You did that.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, After spending hundreds of millions trying to buy elections for far-right candidates over the past year, **Elon Musk is now publicly backing down: 1 ** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9smZO_cPoyg6ygSttuYIcKJDdcZ5bMW88GOWtVgqgLL6-qeC_xsUEul0CeLoSwdZl7FG2pjsG11TBcDemJKiQ9DBGee4cM2gwNU6zHC-Ekjn9yOg9dSf7wqE_kXNIddE9xgM9yyrFoe2J7Fj7r5HioIudllZu7DSRlu_Cjxzxw_adRsJjNTrl1vIvFPy8d4TVXTmD2rPdtlUmN8YDyxrFnNaBvX4Ly1aP3esiNIHEXUJizDqzBW0FdXx3N6YV7l1NrG6U6NQQgKJRFaQsMiiGmEX3WnBwziSPGIaZqkKwS3Dv22qGC7iZC1yQU1cZWcuQQBez6mb90V1D_Lnz1x0qKgLQJ9X7_BUv0wV1V-M0ExTU-2j5xzpFI6f0dIwrs9lfkwdKUJNZM5BO--iDBh-PDuyFIYMpqOmMNRfR-pqUTjE/4gn/3BYX9UXTRui6mXefsfe54w/h0/h001.Zk3PjwbvmTFBiRiiOqpW8FXQ3xWKcdMHbfRu0pjJFoA) Translation? **Grassroots organizing humbled the richest man in the world.** Back in April, Elon suffered a humiliating defeat in Wisconsin after dropping $21 million to try and flip the Wisconsin Supreme Court. But thanks to grassroots supporters like you, Peter, we helped prevent Elon’s attempts to buy the election and elected Susan Crawford by a decisive 10 point victory.2 **Elon Musk thought he could bend our democracy with his billions. You helped force him to back down.** And that’s not just a win for working people — it’s a _warning_ to every billionaire trying to buy power behind the scenes. But let’s be clear: while Elon might be stepping back (at least for now), the billionaire class isn’t going anywhere. They’re still spending big on voter suppression, right-wing judges, and tax cuts for the ultra-rich — all at the expense of our schools, our healthcare, and our future. [**Help us keep up the fight against Elon and the billionaires trying to buy our elections with a contribution to the Working Families Party today:**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9smZO_cPoyg6ygSttuYIcKJDdcZ5bMW88GOWtVgqgLL6-qeC_xsUEul0CeLoSwdZl64Nrrz-6GA4JXPc9dyCwxI0qH3S9dR5zEPsGc2DZKe3cYqviRC6Wri-Nhw6pjbyw4u39zxngxu7h92caHo-roCcJc5rb9OE06fL8GPpR4jlRd7t1cKP38cPMXE9ZoO7oijWORgQfTXSmahsm0jEXOyEzb6tC0M1eqFZO_Yj5-6I24jSPdk8G_pYBT25b0pAQ4m0SOyzHtlKefafsV1ZrSMhyDJ2L7IzJK7Xvl_NKlU_FBka3knJqFUWoPR7YtQORaazP6qiIGuaVWjmWZ8H_QvYqrAdXWpuyz9Ob4FBOrip7zv0Jk7sdmY1swj4IXRR51Ar11n6cT8GPW4jg7p5gO43VL6t6-YpbojOrB84ww0w/4gn/3BYX9UXTRui6mXefsfe54w/h1/h001.vlShhTtm3KPNnTcp5VOQvbUEAQhpms306VW-DRdVgJk) **[Donate $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9smZO_cPoyg6ygSttuYIcKJDdcZ5bMW88GOWtVgqgLL7EalzRJf7YdlajbxWkIANhE2KM_wp-5VEHTXd5ZpPtF93Bo0cZi3ZEFFIZ7qGgPblGc3aDEOcff0OfmDv2Z2YkVmmwPOkYvXAm_zRAlF0RjIOxUExat07W10tAoNV3KmMOenKdyt8r-wo07XKehkT7EHT-ajVV30LLH0XHnHcLx9ajeaF3E7EU8G-S_3lwsxZzl4NNW01FKmhkJWfNIPV1YpHGLIphoO6Ep9IyarlIzoFxycYGC9U1aDT_Uaoq1sQ0a-NAqYCL20qcvJekSiQLD4tYHrUi8Qx1Xot3hnCfNkIwj_TyQz0gSqnjveQASthyaA03ppjYS0b26AL-J7-dnpx97AI_PUlRI7wt6TXl8cAj1ot4KaB797HcFohUAoM/4gn/3BYX9UXTRui6mXefsfe54w/h2/h001.dQm04xtS9MEmzYg1mOV0cED7Olo1VyAUazGcd-yqAEw)** At the Working Families Party, we build power with the people. That’s why we’ve set a goal of recruiting 1,000 working class candidates to run for office up and down the ballot this cycle. And that’s how we are going to keep winning — not with billionaires and corporate donors, but with strategy, hustle, and a commitment to organizing community after community. Let’s keep winning together — and embarrassing billionaires while we’re at it. [**Help us keep up the fight against Elon and the billionaires trying to buy our elections with a contribution to the Working Families Party today:**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9smZO_cPoyg6ygSttuYIcKJDdcZ5bMW88GOWtVgqgLL6-qeC_xsUEul0CeLoSwdZl8Cqv1c_97N7m2AJkPipDmUUG0PY4Pg1Q891nQWa-jwm4LykMd4ACmq3bGQV_Epx5rvePKsot8vRCPY79eb9Bx-CimPT7-YuB-faKuaCcz6byHCQysZAiwW5Oav13CjFmyFiYNTqzzBVZ-kgeM51YON1mCujIA_86_60CzzLRUY0KPBkvnHu4Yfbm9ZOt3kcHrpxQ9rk9FAshBJnru5SHMGZ4YAmb47ntt96ZStyDHAP6MTEjOYbiwrCBqmBf5sUC08-n8JkrYJLvxWZ2_2ufyqfnM8fBdvRZ8q501RfKgDnwNkfvFG9d0rueEo1wuETQO1nyYJfwWmGqj5J2UJw6tznxGhY8zxms-30-rgeLVVI/4gn/3BYX9UXTRui6mXefsfe54w/h3/h001.3xDhWcmWSMUeO8AbNDcix5EpL0xqjxY8YJ3MjSJV7ds) **[Donate $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9smZO_cPoyg6ygSttuYIcKJDdcZ5bMW88GOWtVgqgLL7EalzRJf7YdlajbxWkIANhL2qafsLq-hFcWrO1GED0DYnR_FJLWsVId4-mi8SSu8nRyvukt_LbDebDXMFg3odX3CYW5O3CxzR450DwSuhrG5a0c8Cjar16-e9UQgutru3UWMCXkwI5XBByHQwdQnJXZVHwP3EiqiatIi1K65U7yHVIudyEXBKqOapWGtd6zz1jAlTUxjIijNeCHhro7nEq4kuc-7ZiDrAR4suoh72-aHJYiGQ0HbuXI61GXyKcXWfTC6Tq5b8qLeCq_uXHoQYP2pafMjtZ6UdayG9vpWGFRVn7sjb_CGrNkQxCMY8Ef8wdbvWppEM4m1dtMuu1owOabPahZbTNHCT6RKSshxkzulbzkVt2zLIXelZWXtgx7Qc/4gn/3BYX9UXTRui6mXefsfe54w/h4/h001.vIbLTH8vdonLK8fR9GKJL18ySPizRmWvC5oEZOiYO7M)** Thanks for being part of this movement. clean_body: | | | Peter, After spending hundreds of millions trying to buy elections for far-right candidates over the past year, Elon Musk is now publicly backing down: 1 Translation? Grassroots organizing humbled the richest man in the world. Back in April, Elon suffered a humiliating defeat in Wisconsin after dropping $21 million to try and flip the Wisconsin Supreme Court. But thanks to grassroots supporters like you, Peter, we helped prevent Elon’s attempts to buy the election and elected Susan Crawford by a decisive 10 point victory.2 Elon Musk thought he could bend our democracy with his billions. You helped force him to back down. And that’s not just a win for working people — it’s a warning to every billionaire trying to buy power behind the scenes. But let’s be clear: while Elon might be stepping back (at least for now), the billionaire class isn’t going anywhere. They’re still spending big on voter suppression, right-wing judges, and tax cuts for the ultra-rich — all at the expense of our schools, our healthcare, and our future. At the Working Families Party, we build power with the people. That’s why we’ve set a goal of recruiting 1,000 working class candidates to run for office up and down the ballot this cycle. And that’s how we are going to keep winning — not with billionaires and corporate donors, but with strategy, hustle, and a commitment to organizing community after community. Let’s keep winning together — and embarrassing billionaires while we’re at it. Thanks for being part of this movement. Let’s keep it pushing. In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. , Politico, May 20, 2025 2\. , AP, April 2, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
