Virginia Democrats in Congress are trying to stop it. **Rep. Jennifer McClellan (VA-4)**_didn’t sleep for 36 hours_ as she fought through a 25-hour Energy and Commerce Committee hearing on this bill, which would impose needless work requirements on people already fighting to survive.
Trump and his Republican allies want to force Virginians to jump through hoops just to stay insured — or worse, _kick them off coverage entirely._ If they succeed, hospitals will absorb the cost, emergency rooms will overflow, and taxpayers will be left footing the bill.
**This is Republican governance, Derek:** Working people left behind without a second thought. We can’t have that in Virginia — and we’re fighting around the clock to elect strong, Democratic leadership this year. [_**But we need your help. Please, rush a donation of $15 to help us defend Medicaid and elect Democrats who will protect our care.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108060535/546708588/-699519367?&refcode=E13357-20250520-Medicaid-SL-HealthCare&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjA2ZjVmMC1iYTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=udrP1bMFpGB2ypbLHH-eUDO19SCvqBa0Tk3hv1RVRNk=)

clean_body: Real Virginians will suffer if Republicans get their way. | Derek, While we slept last week, House Republicans advanced a bill that could rip health care away from over 260,000 of our neighbors right here in Virginia. They’re calling it a “big, beautiful bill.” But let’s be real: this is a $625 billion attack on Medicaid, and it’s nothing short of cruel. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = Virginia Democrats in Congress are trying to stop it. Rep. Jennifer McClellan (VA-4)didn’t sleep for 36 hours as she fought through a 25-hour Energy and Commerce Committee hearing on this bill, which would impose needless work requirements on people already fighting to survive. Trump and his Republican allies want to force Virginians to jump through hoops just to stay insured — or worse, kick them off coverage entirely. If they succeed, hospitals will absorb the cost, emergency rooms will overflow, and taxpayers will be left footing the bill. This is Republican governance, Derek: Working people left behind without a second thought. We can’t have that in Virginia — and we’re fighting around the clock to elect strong, Democratic leadership this year. = ************=************ This isn’t just about budgets. It’s about lives, dignity, and who we are as a Commonwealth. Thank you, – Virginia Democrats [content goes here] Forwarded this email? body:
These charges from the Trump administration are baseless
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108060559/546708672/-1197175708?refcode=partner_ms_dh_em_gwenmoore&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTYxNGEyZi1iYjM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=00aodlKRLsMXRt1weF-mLc5VhJTGvUsRpuvzudDWu_4=)
Peter,
The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first — and it's a flashing red light for our democracy.
I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It's clear: **Trump and his administration don't want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up.**
These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration's overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers.
[We need your help. I'm asking you to split a donation between me and Gwen Moore so we have the resources to win this battle for our democracy. The crime? Conducting her congressional oversight duties at an ICE facility in New Jersey. | The Trump administration wants to see if they can get away with arresting their political enemies and with MAGA control of White House and Congress, the only thing preventing all out mass arrest of politicians and US citizens are our courts... Which is why MAGA is working around the clock to replace or arrest (see case of Judge Dugan in WI) every judge willing to stand up to them. Now they are moving to remove Dem PA Supreme Court justices in the upcoming 2025 PA elections. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We cannot allow our courts to fall. body:
Deb’s not in this race to cozy up to special interests and billionaires like those running the Trump administration.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2074%2E400544%2EIoHmuv)
Deb’s not in this race to cozy up to special interests and billionaires like those running the Trump administration.
She’s in this fight to change the game for New Mexico and make the system work for everyday families. And that philosophy is reflected in the numbers:
**$37**
_average online donation_ **81,000+**
_grassroots donations_

When you pitch in to Deb’s campaign, you’re fueling a shared mission to make New Mexico a better place for working families.
Donald Trump and our Republican opponent are trying hard to flip New Mexico red, but if we stand up together, we can overcome their money and make sure Deb wins next November.
**[So, if you’re with Deb in the fight for a government that works for all of us, will you make your first grassroots donation of $5 or whatever you can today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250520_1_stats?amount=5&refcode=em20250520-2074&refcode2=2074_400544_IoHmuv&akid=2074%2E400544%2EIoHmuv)**

_Hey team, Jared here. I wanted to make sure you heard that my friend Haley Stevens is running for Senate._ [**Will you read her message and then chip in whatever you can between our campaigns?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108060735/546709437/1049433393?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.20_StevensSplit_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWZkNGIwMy1iYzM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RxXYKmrpzAwVgom37bW3cwMFDshV4mejr5SHEa6c9aA=) [CHIP IN →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108060736/546709438/1049433393?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.20_StevensSplit_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWZkNGIwMy1iYzM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RxXYKmrpzAwVgom37bW3cwMFDshV4mejr5SHEa6c9aA=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108060737/546709439/1049433393?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.20_StevensSplit_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWZkNGIwMy1iYzM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RxXYKmrpzAwVgom37bW3cwMFDshV4mejr5SHEa6c9aA=) Folks – see that little girl in the photo? That’s me! Way before I had the honor of serving Michiganders in Congress and launching this battleground campaign to be Michigan’s next U.S. senator. I was about 12 or 13 years old there. But don’t be fooled by school picture day _(and my trendy beaded necklace)_. Growing up as the daughter of small business owners – Mom and Dad had their own landscaping business – I was always around a lot of dirt, grease, grime, and heavy machinery. **I wouldn’t have had it any other way.** My parents taught me the value of hard work – a value that binds all of us in Michigan together. After all, we’re the state that built America. The state that built the middle class. In fact, do you know what one of my favorite memories is from growing up? When I got the keys to my first car, a used Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. That car represented the newfound freedom of teenage years. **But it was more to me than just that – it also meant I had a piece of Michigan.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108060738/546709440/1049433393?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.20_StevensSplit_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWZkNGIwMy1iYzM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RxXYKmrpzAwVgom37bW3cwMFDshV4mejr5SHEa6c9aA=) I love Michigan. I love the people here. And I love that I’ve been able to fight for my state in Congress. But as I’ve traveled our state recently, it’s clear that the people I love are afraid. They’re afraid because of the chaos and uncertainty that Donald Trump and Elon Musk are inflicting upon our nation. All across our state, I hear concerns about rising costs, fear of uncertainty in our auto industry, and worries about the future of Social Security and Medicare. And you better believe people are outright disturbed by Trump’s attacks on our democracy and personal freedoms. **This fear, uncertainty, and chaos – all of it is _unacceptable._** That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. I’m ready to fight for the people I love and help block Trump’s dangerous agenda. clean_body: Trump’s reckless tariffs triggered one of the biggest man-made economic disasters of the modern era. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click | = Hey team, Jared here. I wanted to make sure you heard that my friend Haley Stevens is running for Senate. = = = Folks – see that little girl in the photo? That’s me! Way before I had the honor of serving Michiganders in Congress and launching this battleground campaign to be Michigan’s next U.S. senator. I was about 12 or 13 years old there. But don’t be fooled by school picture day (and my trendy beaded necklace). Growing up as the daughter of small business owners – Mom and Dad had their own landscaping business – I was always around a lot of dirt, grease, grime, and heavy machinery. I wouldn’t have had it any other way. My parents taught me the value of hard work – a value that binds all of us in Michigan together. After all, we’re the state that built America. The state that built the middle class. In fact, do you know what one of my favorite memories is from growing up? When I got the keys to my first car, a used Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. That car represented the newfound freedom of teenage years. But it was more to me than just that – it also meant I had a piece of Michigan. = I love Michigan. I love the people here. And I love that I’ve been able to fight for my state in Congress. But as I’ve traveled our state recently, it’s clear that the people I love are afraid. They’re afraid because of the chaos and uncertainty that Donald Trump and Elon Musk are inflicting upon our nation. All across our state, I hear concerns about rising costs, fear of uncertainty in our auto industry, and worries about the future of Social Security and Medicare. And you better believe people are outright disturbed by Trump’s attacks on our democracy and personal freedoms. This fear, uncertainty, and chaos – all of it is unacceptable. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. I’m ready to fight for the people I love and help block Trump’s dangerous agenda. But the path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan – and this battleground race is already being called a “toss up” by elections experts. Folks, I need your support to come out of the gate strong and win in Michigan. = = Thank you, Haley Stevens | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. Box 8784, Coral Springs, FL 33065 www.jaredforflorida.com/ = = to receive fewer emails. Click here to .

name: Elissa Slotkin for Senate
subject: Stop us if you’ve heard this before
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Michigan's U.S. Senate race against Mike Rogers is going to be one of the closest and most expensive races of the next election.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2282%2E135344%2EV1y4Sl)

Stop us if you have heard this before:
Michigan's U.S. Senate race against Mike Rogers is going to be one of the closest and most expensive races of the next election.
It was true in Elissa's campaign in 2024, and it will be true of whoever wins the Democratic nomination in 2026.
Here is the truth – direct and honest:
There is a competitive Democratic primary happening for this seat right now. One in which the eventual nominee could spend most of their resources just to win the nomination.
That means they could be starting a general election off with empty coffers while Mike Rogers will likely get to stash away his resources, all while outside spending groups are supporting him with ads.
That is why Elissa is asking you to make a donation to the Michigan Senate Democratic Nominee Fund. Your donation will make resources available to the nominee the day after the primary -- quite literally when they need it most.
As we watch this race get more and more expensive by the day, Elissa thought it was important to ask:
[**Please make a contribution to the Michigan Senate Democratic Nominee Fund today. Help ensure our Democratic nominee has the resources they need to win when they need them most.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dnf.qOCvoH&refcode=em250520-1&t=2&akid=2282%2E135344%2EV1y4Sl)

That means they could be starting a general election off with empty coffers while Mike Rogers will likely get to stash away his resources, all while outside spending groups are supporting him with ads. That is why Elissa is asking you to make a donation to the Michigan Senate Democratic Nominee Fund. Your donation will make resources available to the nominee the day after the primary -- quite literally when they need it most. ## Hello PolitiBrawlers,
Rubio kicked some serious Democrat butt in congress today!
We broke down 2 of his most savage highlight moments for you, clashing with senators Tim Kaine and Chris Van Hollen in fierce screaming matches. **[Watch both clips below:](https://substack.com/redirect/96bc2b30-e58f-4cf7-9ca7-247d9a7fdb4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
Secretary of State Marco Rubio **[clashed with Sen. Tim Kaine](https://substack.com/redirect/0fa9d655-3aa7-47da-987e-fbe0ea4e59f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over Democrat pushback to the Trump administration's acceptance of white South Africa refugees into the United States.
Rubio confronted the Democrat by saying the quiet part out loud: "You don't like the fact that they're white!!"
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/0fa9d655-3aa7-47da-987e-fbe0ea4e59f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0fa9d655-3aa7-47da-987e-fbe0ea4e59f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Kaine echoed the view of many Democrats, that there is no genocide or legitimate reason otherwise for the United States to accept South African refugees and argued that refugee status should be given out in an "even-handed way."
"Their farms are being burned down and they are being killed! I think **[that's a pretty good justification for wanting to come!"](https://substack.com/redirect/0fa9d655-3aa7-47da-987e-fbe0ea4e59f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Rubio clapped back at Kaine.
Kaine suggested the Trump administration was showing preferential treatment based on race to the largely white South African refugees being admitted. He fired back at Rubio, "Statutory phrase says 'you are entitled to entrance as a refugee if you demonstrate a well-justified fear of persecution,' so can you have a different standard based on the color of someone's skin?!"
**["Well I'm not then one arguing that,](https://substack.com/redirect/0fa9d655-3aa7-47da-987e-fbe0ea4e59f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** apparently you are, because you don't like the fact that they're white!" Rubio returned fire.
Watch the chaotic hearing here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/0fa9d655-3aa7-47da-987e-fbe0ea4e59f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **It 's clear: Left wing Senators TERRIFIED of what RFK Jr. could reveal**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/30540a07-1885-463c-b185-2c4a7c3c9880?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
Did you see it? RFK Jr. was insulted, smeared, and pushed to the brink by left wing senators in a special senate hearing.
Why? Because he could be getting too close to exposing a **[critical truth](https://substack.com/redirect/30540a07-1885-463c-b185-2c4a7c3c9880?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that could cost Big Pharma billions.
The assault was on full display and the corruption was clear for the public to see.
But what are they so afraid of?
**[This video](https://substack.com/redirect/30540a07-1885-463c-b185-2c4a7c3c9880?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** reveals full details on the life-changing secret RFK Jr. could be set to reveal.
It could save your life or the life of a loved one, but it's more apparent than ever. The government and Big Pharma will stop at nothing to prevent you from seeing this.
While this information is still accessible online, get the full details in **[this video](https://substack.com/redirect/30540a07-1885-463c-b185-2c4a7c3c9880?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.

P.S. RFK Jr. more than held his own this time, but will he be able to reveal Big Pharma's biggest secret? We're not waiting around to find out. **[The full details are released right here](https://substack.com/redirect/30540a07-1885-463c-b185-2c4a7c3c9880?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
* * *
# **Marco Rubio wipes the smile right off smug Democrats face with perfect comeback**
Marco Rubio utterly **[humiliated disgraced Democrat Sen. Chris Van Hollen](https://substack.com/redirect/96bc2b30-e58f-4cf7-9ca7-247d9a7fdb4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during today's hearing, assuring him that he is glad politicians like him disapprove of his actions as Secretary of State.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/96bc2b30-e58f-4cf7-9ca7-247d9a7fdb4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/96bc2b30-e58f-4cf7-9ca7-247d9a7fdb4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I have to tell you directly and personally that I regret voting for you for Secretary of State, Van Hollen told Rubio.
"First of all, your regret for voting for me confirms I'm doing a good job," Rubio shot back coldly. **["Based on what I know about your record..."](https://substack.com/redirect/96bc2b30-e58f-4cf7-9ca7-247d9a7fdb4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"That's just a flippant statement Mr Secretary!" Van Hollen responded.
"In the case of El Salvador, we deported gang members, including the one that you had a margarita with!" Rubio again roasted Van Hollen for his performative visit to El Salvador to meet with Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a deported ilelgal immigrant and suspected MS-13 gang member.

### PolitiBrawl Weekly Column: Julio Rosas
# **BLM outdoes itself with horrific case of man allegedly killing retired Ohio deputy**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/aea650ec-40b4-4872-bda6-963d90cf52ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
While the Black Lives Matter movement no longer holds the power it once had nearly five years ago, that does not mean the tribal thinking over incidents making national headlines, that BLM encouraged, has gone away.
We saw that tribal thinking over the Austin Metcalf case, where Karmelo Anthony allegedly killed Metcalf over a seat and people poured in the donations for Anthony's defense. We saw it more recently after Democratic members of Congress **[brawled with ICE agents](https://substack.com/redirect/28124b50-1725-4843-87a8-2bd4c563273a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after Newark's mayor was arrested for trespassing, as I explained in a video here.
But perhaps the worst example this month is the case of retired Hamilton County sheriff's deputy Larry Henderson being allegedly killed by Rodney Hinton Jr. in a targeted attack.
Henderson was directing traffic for the University of Cincinnati's commencement ceremony when Hinton reportedly **[drove his car into Henderson](https://substack.com/redirect/363c357d-0fd4-4358-981d-2e089a8b0523?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , apparently in an act of revenge for the death of his son, Ryan Hinton, who was shot and killed by Cincinnati police the day before when he was caught in a stolen SUV and took off running, while armed with a gun...
[Read Full Story](https://substack.com/redirect/aea650ec-40b4-4872-bda6-963d90cf52ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

body:
Across the country, families are paying more for child care than they do for college tuition. In fact, for two kids in center-based care, the cost is now more than the average rent in all 50 states.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108061084/546710432/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-05-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2I2NGVmOS1iYzM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=trSQcr52ZmSoerjxSbNbJnDmVsw92W1DD2Q8ShGqF2E=)
---
| Peter,

Across the country, families are paying more for child care than they do for college tuition. In fact, for two kids in center-based care, **the cost is now more than the average rent in all 50 states.**

That’s not just unfair—it’s unsustainable.

That’s why I introduced the **Child and Dependent Care Tax Credit Enhancement Act** , a bill that would increase the maximum child care credit by nearly **400%** —from $1,050 to $4,000 for one child, and from $2,100 to $8,000 for two or more kids. It would also expand eligibility to more low- and middle-income families, make the credit refundable, and ensure it keeps up with inflation.

We can’t keep asking working parents to choose between paying their bills and paying for care.
---

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: For Donald Trump, America's national security is for sale
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108061360/546711647/623074613?refcode=jtk1404-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGQ2YzEyNmEtYmQzNS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ru5pkSH1Q-_wc2AMk51EYZsjhQ1uT0e-CJurFtWxGZo=&emci=7da1cd56-9835-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0d6c126a-bd35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9329426)
---
Friend,

Donald Trump has long masqueraded as some expert businessman with a talent for making deals. On his recent tour through the Middle East, he boldly proclaimed and took credit for "$2 trillion" worth of investments in the United States from the likes of Saudi Arabia, the United Arab Emirates, and Qatar.

But a closer examination from The Washington Post, among others, revealed Trump's math to be "fuzzy" and inclusive of contracts that happened before his return to the White House.

On this same trip, the so-called dealmaker announced the end of all sanctions on Syria, following the country's toppling of the longtime dictatorial Assad regime by a rebel group whose commander is now president.

This came without seeking any leverage on radical terrorists that still operate within Syria, including the Islamic State; with only an encouragement from Trump for Syria to normalize relations with Israel; and without consulting Congress. Any and all leverage when it comes to Syria, and security throughout the Middle East, has been squandered by Trump, who asked for nothing in return for lifting sanctions.
It's less than surprising, when the main purpose of Trump's tour through the Middle East was to ratchet up wealth for himself and his billionaire supporters. After all, consider whom he invited to accompany him. Skilled diplomats or experienced negotiators who have a deep understanding of the region’s history and relationships, and will keep our national security and interests at heart? No. _His_ delegation was 30+ CEO’s of major corporations who will benefit directly from these deals: Elon Musk. Sam Altman of OpenAI. IBM’s Arvind Krishna. Amazon’s Andy Jassy. Kelly Ortberg, CEO of Boeing. Jensen Huang, CEO of Nvidia. Dara Khosrowshahi, CEO of Uber. And Palantir’s Alex Karp. Just to name a few.
For instance, Saudi Arabia's $20 billion investment in U.S. AI technology is certain to make the wealthiest man, Elon Musk, even wealthier. The reality is that Musk has clearly been using his DOGE efforts as a masquerade to collect government data on the American people – he has failed flamboyantly in his claim to save taxpayers’ dollars or improve government efficiency. But, the evidence reveals that that was never really his goal. Instead, with Trump’s blessing, he and his mini-minions have created a glaring privacy and security threat for American citizens, only enhanced further now by these close ties to and investment from foreign actors.

Whether it's to enrich his largest donor or himself, it is clear that Trump has put America's national security up for sale.
The long and short of it is this: Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and the whole lot of them – they are in this not to govern in a way that improves the lives of Americans but to mine our government for profit. To enrich themselves to unprecedented levels. **I will do everything in my power to hold them accountable and stop Trump from turning our democracy into a would-be oligarchy, with him at the top, crowned as king.**

Thank you for being with me in this fight.

Dick
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108061362/546711649/302433741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1404-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGQ2YzEyNmEtYmQzNS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ru5pkSH1Q-_wc2AMk51EYZsjhQ1uT0e-CJurFtWxGZo=)
---

clean_body: This bullying tactic is politically motivated, and Rep. McIver will not back down. | = | Did you see this, Peter? = Last week, Emerge alum U.S. Rep. LaMonica McIver (NJ-10) was doing her job as a member of Congress to lawfully conduct oversight at an ICE detention facility in her home state. ICE refused to let the Congresswoman into the facility and repeatedly shoved her to prevent her from entering. As if that wasn’t bad enough, Trump’s DOJ just issued charges against the Congresswoman. This bullying tactic is politically motivated, and Rep. McIver will not back down. | Together in power, Team Emerge * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 450 Washington, DC 20036 United States | = =

name: LaMonica McIver
subject: The Trump administration is going after me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250520-1?refcode=em20250520-2018&refcode2=2018_21716_Lla8IJ&akid=2018%2E21716%2ELla8IJ)
The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy.
I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up.
These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration’s overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers.
[**We need your help. I’m asking you to split a donation between me and Congresswoman Sarah McBride so we have the resources to win this battle for our democracy. We need 500 more grassroots donations before our deadline at midnight to make sure Republicans know we won’t be intimidated.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250520-1?refcode=em20250520-2018&refcode2=2018_21716_Lla8IJ&akid=2018%2E21716%2ELla8IJ)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250520-1?refcode=em20250520-2018&refcode2=2018_21716_Lla8IJ&akid=2018%2E21716%2ELla8IJ)**
This is far bigger than just me—the rule of law is at stake. Our democracy as we know it is under threat.
[**To ensure everyone who dares to speak truth to power is safe from political persecution, we must make as much noise and as big an impact as possible. Split a donation between me and Congresswoman Sarah McBride and share this with your friends.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250520-1?refcode=em20250520-2018&refcode2=2018_21716_Lla8IJ&akid=2018%2E21716%2ELla8IJ)
We're in this together,
LaMonica

name: GOP Medicaid Cuts Update via Care in Action
subject: DAYS to stop Republicans slashing Medicaid
body:
Tell lawmakers: cutting Medicaid will decide our votes next November.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108061792/546713021/664783965?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-lobby-day-medicaid-advocacy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmI0YmFjZS1iZDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abhfqDxMJoKp4dnzBOIhBItOXfXGrfH54R2n0vSfb3o=&emci=f5cfc1bb-b435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4fb4bace-bd35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
Any day now Mike Johnson and his Republican Majority will vote on their cruel plan to cut $700 BILLION from Medicaid on the House floor. **It is no exaggeration to say people will die if these GOP cuts to Medicaid go ahead.**
But, here’s the thing: just a few lawmakers can stop the bill in its tracks, and **vulnerable House Republicans are terrified of the political consequences** at the next election.
With potentially just hours left, we need to leave lawmakers in no doubt that a vote to cut Medicaid will decide our votes next November.
**The Care in Action team is on the ground in D.C. TODAY pressuring members of Congress in-person.** [**You can amplify this powerful in-person pressure by adding your voice to generate messages and calls from across the country RIGHT NOW telling House members to vote NO on cutting Medicaid!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108061793/546713022/520464714?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-lobby-day-medicaid-advocacy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmI0YmFjZS1iZDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abhfqDxMJoKp4dnzBOIhBItOXfXGrfH54R2n0vSfb3o=&emci=f5cfc1bb-b435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4fb4bace-bd35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
[ADD YOUR VOICE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108061794/546713023/520464714?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-lobby-day-medicaid-advocacy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmI0YmFjZS1iZDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abhfqDxMJoKp4dnzBOIhBItOXfXGrfH54R2n0vSfb3o=&emci=f5cfc1bb-b435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4fb4bace-bd35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
The consequences of cuts will be catastrophic, ripping coverage away from at least 8.6 million people, severing the only lifeline to healthcare for millions and the livelihoods of countless care workers. For many of us, **Medicaid is our _only_ access to essential treatments, medication, and preventative care.**
Widespread outcry has created a split among Republican House members, with some even admitting this bill risks "plunging our most vulnerable into crisis”. But, as House leadership and the White House pile on the pressure to pass President Trump’s “big, beautiful bill”, it’s **going to take ALL of us speaking out to sustain enough pressure to stop it.**
Our voices have power – but only if we act urgently, together. **Congressional offices tally every email and call received from constituents.** When thousands of us speak out in unison, lawmakers feel immense pressure to protect care workers and their families – and those in tight races know there’ll be political consequences if they don’t listen.
[**Can you send an urgent message telling Congress to vote NO on the GOP’s harmful reconciliation bill? The Care in Action team is on the Hill as we speak and every message and call will amplify the impact of our meetings on the ground.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108061795/546713024/520464714?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-lobby-day-medicaid-advocacy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmI0YmFjZS1iZDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abhfqDxMJoKp4dnzBOIhBItOXfXGrfH54R2n0vSfb3o=&emci=f5cfc1bb-b435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4fb4bace-bd35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
[ADD YOUR VOICE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108061796/546713025/520464714?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=may-2025-lobby-day-medicaid-advocacy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmI0YmFjZS1iZDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abhfqDxMJoKp4dnzBOIhBItOXfXGrfH54R2n0vSfb3o=&emci=f5cfc1bb-b435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4fb4bace-bd35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
As always, thanks for all you do,
The Care in Action Team

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Trump’s “big, beautiful” lie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=i%2FqEXveG9wwzBUYc0r2y%2B2NAebnBKpqvWUkjPdMXdNCQJTenGsSiLCkc251gSwbX%2Bn5bVr5tqHNOJKFyLNon5lVy7VimtUTE%2BkIkjPaM8PWiZhsREE9KLKR7WYT9DA17SdKQ0ZEgbMKh3934j1LoCx1WDmVqF3C1oz0sMay0wXu0T4MGGEUQkSzuvJJU%2Fef41dh8Po0371xCZGwo0eprSJU29mCNdWUGMMo4Q6tM3oIY54AjE%2Ba9bgUjaLU%2BNMLVIjbUXYS%2FPjdyddYd2LaDc2qjC2W10kh5FpVsmIJPrf9HZqaQl7v66X2zYcayj%2F4BsCB8NAdtdxm08RueWzYdBRZwl7Zm%2F0eQIl26n0HP%2Fu%2F8cutMfKW%2F4%2FsmtDqbZczO5%2B16XEHbZR3qM4v3SEEZeK6nnhHuoK35c7Gh%2BLwnH3o%3D)
---
| |
---
It's Gabe. House Republicans just advanced their latest budget proposal — and **it’s cruel**. The Republican proposal slashes SNAP — the program that puts food on the table for working families, children, and seniors across the country. Donald Trump’s “big, beautiful” bill? **It’s just another big lie**. I won’t sit back and be silent about these cuts — because I’m not just ashamed, I’m angry. Angry that Republicans are trying to take food off the tables of the working families in New Mexico. These cuts won’t just hurt families in cities and towns — they’ll hit our rural communities hardest, including the farmers who supply our local food systems. These cuts would devastate our communities just to fund more tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. If we’re going to stop this kind of cruelty, we have to flip the House in 2026 — **and holding NM-02 is the only way to get it done**. [Together, we can stop the damage MAGA Republicans, Trump and Elon are doing — but we need a strong campaign to win. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It's Gabe. House Republicans just advanced their latest budget proposal — and it’s cruel. The Republican proposal slashes SNAP — the program that puts food on the table for working families, children, and seniors across the country. Donald Trump’s “big, beautiful” bill? It’s just another big lie. I won’t sit back and be silent about these cuts — because I’m not just ashamed, I’m angry. Angry that Republicans are trying to take food off the tables of the working families in New Mexico. These cuts won’t just hurt families in cities and towns — they’ll hit our rural communities hardest, including the farmers who supply our local food systems. These cuts would devastate our communities just to fund more tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. If we’re going to stop this kind of cruelty, we have to flip the House in 2026 — and holding NM-02 is the only way to get it done. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = — Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108062307/546714903/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4NmYyODFkLWJmMzUtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aIZo5vGkHXn5iIZCfibck-EWaz0dfaGosSKvrQapiw0=&emci=8fbeb9ee-a435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=386f281d-bf35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)

Peter, We can’t secure fair maps around the country without ensuring a fair count in the census. But the census is under a multi-pronged attack, and it’s a three-alarm fire: **1\. Hours into Donald Trump’s second term, he repealed an order that affirmed how everyone in the country should be counted in the U. S. Census.** Trump’s action on the census could lead to a blatant attempt to undercount communities with higher populations of immigrants and undocumented people. **2\. Republican state attorneys general also sued to stop the 2030 Census from counting all U.S. residents.** And the federal judge presiding over this case is a Trump appointee with a track record for upholding gerrymandered maps. **3\. In recent months, massive Census Bureau data files that are normally publicly available disappeared from the website.** Some of those files have come back online, but this raises concerns about the integrity of this critical data now and going forward. **We’re fighting back.** Our mapping and analytics team is working hard to compile records of past census data so we can closely watch for any changes. And we know we can defend the census because the fair maps movement has protected it before — stopping Trump from adding a citizenship question in his first term. [**Our democracy is on the line. Can you please donate $30 or whatever makes sense to prevent Trump and anti-democracy extremists from rigging the system in their favor? This is a three-alarm fire, and every single contribution will go a long way to help ensure we can stop them in their tracks.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108062309/546714905/469381256?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ComingForCensusNOR_email_20250520-NDRC-Tier1-ComingForCensusNOR_ctrl&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250520-NDRC-Tier1-ComingForCensusNOR_ctrl&utm_campaign=ComingForCensusNOR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4NmYyODFkLWJmMzUtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aIZo5vGkHXn5iIZCfibck-EWaz0dfaGosSKvrQapiw0=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: brutal update [via FFR]
subject: re: horrific Social Security update
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23076%2E4449941%2EdtXYf6) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23076%2E4449941%2EdtXYf6) It's with a heavy heart that we write to you today.

Donald Trump is threatening to CUT Social Security because of Elon Musk: | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61388?t=3&akid=23076%2E4449941%2EdtXYf6) | [**Breaking from _Rolling Stone:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61388?t=4&akid=23076%2E4449941%2EdtXYf6)

[**" Trump Admin Threatens to Stop Social Security If DOGE Can't Have Personal Data"**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61388?t=5&akid=23076%2E4449941%2EdtXYf6)
---|---
But, the deadline to sign our petition to SAVE Social Security from Trump and Musk's tyranny came and went... **_but we never saw your signature._**

**Too much is at stake for America 's seniors who have paid into Social Security their entire lives if the GOP slashes this crucial program, so we're reactivating our petition until the end of the day to give you a chance to sign it.**

It will only be open for another 12 hours.
[**_Please do not squander this opportunity! Just sign your name:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61388?t=6&akid=23076%2E4449941%2EdtXYf6)
[SAVE SOCIAL SECURITY: SIGN NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61388?t=7&akid=23076%2E4449941%2EdtXYf6)
---
_Fight for Reform_

\---- FORWARDED MESSAGE ----
[**DISGUSTING: Elon Musk Calls Social Security "The Biggest Ponzi Scheme Of All Time"**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61388?t=8&akid=23076%2E4449941%2EdtXYf6)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61388?t=9&akid=23076%2E4449941%2EdtXYf6)
The MAGA billionaire's latest attack on Social Security is appalling.

And remember: Elon Musk's DOGE could really cut Social Security!!

**That 's why Congress HAS to protect Social Security and safeguard it from Elon and MAGA Republican destruction!!**

[**Be one of the emergency 6O,OOO signatures we need today to demand Congress save Social Security ->**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61389?t=10&akid=23076%2E4449941%2EdtXYf6)
[SAVE SOCIAL SECURITY: SIGN NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61388?t=11&akid=23076%2E4449941%2EdtXYf6)
---
Elon Musk said the social safety net that benefits 68 million Americans is a pyramid scheme and repeated claims that millions of dead Americans are receiving Social Security payouts.

**WE KNOW** this is just not true!

**WE KNOW** that Social Security benefits are essential to Americans' livelihoods.

**WE KNOW** millions of folks would be living out on the streets without their Social Security.

**AND WE KNOW** that Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and his fake DOGE agency are looking for **ANY** reason to gut and privatize Social Security.

Bernie Sanders was right all along:

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108062615/546715905/753003349?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjQ3Mzk1MC1jMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NzMLPClaxCNEFVPtOo9RNI2Aq4ylAFf_4iCUgEm4XRk=)
Here’s something that I believe, friend:

Organizing can’t just happen during election years — the fight for working people is every single day.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108062616/546715906/753003349?refcode=em-5.20.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjQ3Mzk1MC1jMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NzMLPClaxCNEFVPtOo9RNI2Aq4ylAFf_4iCUgEm4XRk=)
_Knocking doors with union members and volunteers!_
Back in Washington, I’m pushing to protect Medicaid for people with disabilities, reduce the skyrocketing cost of living for working families, and call out the reckless policies from the Trump Administration.

That’s one piece of the puzzle. The other is staying active on the ground in IL-13 where I’m meeting with everyone – whether they support my campaign or not, it’s critical to show that I’m fighting for them.

Now more than ever, we need to stay active, stay united, and keep pushing for real change.

**[You can support our upcoming efforts with $3, or any amount you’re comfortable with, to fund our organizing efforts. From snacks for volunteers knocking on doors, to planting yard signs, and passing out campaign literature – your support makes it possible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108062617/546715907/753003349?refcode=em-5.20.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjQ3Mzk1MC1jMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NzMLPClaxCNEFVPtOo9RNI2Aq4ylAFf_4iCUgEm4XRk=)**

The path to winning a Democratic Senate majority in 2026 just became even steeper
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108062631/546715925/-2078928068?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_NewsHook_250520_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTRjODA1Ni1jMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H6q-MMQwPCvIe3yrNGjCmuTLijMsyXPvMFVtRcqpPTc=) Team, the 2026 Senate map just got more brutal for Democrats.

**To flip the Senate blue, we not only need to defend all the Senate seats we currently hold, but we need to net four seats, too—like Jon Husted’s here in Ohio.**

But after three incumbent Democratic Senators retired, that task just became even more difficult.

[**If that’s all you need to hear, pitch in right now to help us defeat Husted next year so Democrats can take back the Senate >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108062632/546715926/-2078928068?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_NewsHook_250520_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTRjODA1Ni1jMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H6q-MMQwPCvIe3yrNGjCmuTLijMsyXPvMFVtRcqpPTc=)

Look, we’re not reaching out with this news today to scare you. We’re doing it to prepare this team for the fight ahead, especially for the tidal wave of GOP money that is going to flood Ohio.

Elon Musk spent $288 million to help his Republican allies in the last election, and he’s already been spending big again this year. There’s no doubt he’ll set his sights squarely on Ohio to reelect Trump loyalist Husted... and enlist MAGA megadonors to help him, too.

**Now here’s the good news: we’ve seen this playbook before, and we know that if we prepare early, we can _win_.**

name: LaMonica McIver
subject: The Trump administration is going after me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
| The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy.

My colleagues Bonnie Watson Coleman, Rob Menendez and I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is our job and our lawful right as members of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up.

These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration’s overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers.

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: My story is not so different
body:
Peter, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Peter,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c05de3b436da43cd8853b0c52ecf0871&_e=kMWVBT_5D7WXh5abPH9_OLwOVctoImuCIuxlUSSiiXAIucKMjG_9WKgmXJy8cdYA63leqip4JmYsOsq1eFAH1tJXuQqLWlf2_Tz-6zRVR4i1LCDATyUsK0F5xm3_CBAIoA4GHLnrfg6SHsSczheaj7mFzgyZKaeApISfxzUT6BTWoxe4AVtbWC5O0d6KxtRAq7iGl4fnGLzrPleBSniIBR99DDrOdsfz3-Ee1ZxJkoZ5rXRCmGn6kAm58l4NiOkMjCzxjhRYBR3TjmGQBdo_vfyDNtuGoNOKq4yIBofKHywUHwVKdDkMgBiKCnZlkwdwtYOfY2KP66b2Uml2R7vjzonV_IsUiQtvCh_lBaqmbFuqKY6rIyFvfsJgUKjg_OoyNT2VhjrCSvvhLm1bN45fag%3D%3D)
**I had to grow up fast, Peter,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c05de3b436da43cd8853b0c52ecf0871&_e=kMWVBT_5D7WXh5abPH9_OLwOVctoImuCIuxlUSSiiXAIucKMjG_9WKgmXJy8cdYA63leqip4JmYsOsq1eFAH1tJXuQqLWlf2_Tz-6zRVR4i1LCDATyUsK0F5xm3_CBAIoA4GHLnrfg6SHsSczheaj7mFzgyZKaeApISfxzUT6BTWoxe4AVtbWC5O0d6KxtRAq7iGl4fnGLzrPleBSniIBR99DDrOdsfz3-Ee1ZxJkoYIEqaCASdE6eoMDI-V8k0vGHpppb_ZeKJdeuMoaxrSfYOx4zA2LYL_bloS8qLn7b5pgwVllUv5gT5RpF8qfoHh8lfpq7zfuzNdn6Fs8R0_tVfDSIb-lUZDT2oWjmoO9T3egIfhDqikp8lGAgh1LLON2KEx5EWynI7GREuI6-uitA%3D%3D)
Peter, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Peter, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c05de3b436da43cd8853b0c52ecf0871&_e=kMWVBT_5D7WXh5abPH9_OLwOVctoImuCIuxlUSSiiXAIucKMjG_9WKgmXJy8cdYA63leqip4JmYsOsq1eFAH1tJXuQqLWlf2_Tz-6zRVR4i1LCDATyUsK0F5xm3_CBAIoA4GHLnrfg6SHsSczheaj7mFzgyZKaeApISfxzUT6BTWoxe4AVtbWC5O0d6KxtRAq7iGl4fnGLzrPleBSniIBR99DDrOdsfz3-Ee1ZxJkoaa8A7syRZ2O-u4_7NkRHHUqcLvoOS7wqSAH1t7AXDGH7md8uAD4lf3xg2dtDsNyns0RI8yZCHt9jGVV2fpd2stn8p3vfQhTNywTAq6uFjCG184E6JVbBIrP6wYoVibUIr1GbT0L2kkDoYM0jGAxKg9udmml11Kao80z0YU9kFRaw%3D%3D)**

| [** CONTRIBUTE HERE **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c05de3b436da43cd8853b0c52ecf0871&_e=kMWVBT_5D7WXh5abPH9_OLwOVctoImuCIuxlUSSiiXAIucKMjG_9WKgmXJy8cdYA63leqip4JmYsOsq1eFAH1tJXuQqLWlf2_Tz-6zRVR4i1LCDATyUsK0F5xm3_CBAIoA4GHLnrfg6SHsSczheaj7mFzgyZKaeApISfxzUT6BTWoxe4AVtbWC5O0d6KxtRAq7iGl4fnGLzrPleBSniIBR99DDrOdsfz3-Ee1ZxJkobvxp5LosAO-ZokuqT7ZlsJFGosbmUW4XnK9IbWT0fxBC6GztiLllGVa-YhMFZCWmxFtVrBHckciQTciNk05o-ldSUujcLidG5wupLbAvHLMbeUHkMNJyJHZmv9NnTxOlKlnYAv0Wfa4518cuxWVAGSNNkM6mJU3fZtmShru4xxIA%3D%3D)
---

If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message.

clean_body: Peter, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. | Peter, I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses. I had to grow up fast, Peter,and I learned many life lessons at an early age. After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq. Peter, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility. But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need. It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on. We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from. Peter, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families. | If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message. Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have. Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. name: Katie Porter
subject: 680k+ raised by our GOP opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
quick info on the situation
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39740%2E3422442%2EqdUclt)
Derek,
Our Republican opponent, Steve Hilton, announced his candidacy less than a month ago, but **he’s already raised _at least_ $680,000 from donations of $5,000 or more.**
In California races candidates are required to almost immediately report any donation of $5,000 or more, and so unfortunately, we’re seeing in real time that Steve is picking up momentum. He’s a former Fox News host who is tight with wealthy conservative donors, so we know he has the ability to raise serious money.
California’s contribution limits are some of the highest in the country at **$39,200 per person per election.** So while Steve is collecting these massive checks, we need to make up the difference with grassroots donors.
I don’t take any money from corporate PACs, lobbyists, or Big Oil, Big Bank, and Big Pharma CEOs. I’m counting on you to power this campaign. **[Can you give $5 right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250520_1_ak?refcode=em20250520-39740&amount=5&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39740_3422442_qdUclt&akid=39740%2E3422442%2EqdUclt)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250520_1_ak?refcode=em20250520-39740&refcode2=39740_3422442_qdUclt&akid=39740%2E3422442%2EqdUclt)
Many thanks,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250520-39740&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39740_3422442_qdUclt&akid=39740%2E3422442%2EqdUclt)**

name: Jen Kiggans
subject: I guess that’s all she wrote…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
Maybe my hopes were just too high.

| | | Peter,

I guess that's all she wrote.

_**Maybe my hopes were just too high.**_ I was counting on a huge response from my last email, but I've come up short.

We can't continue to conduct the team as usual if we aren't able to raise what we need to keep the lights on.

I'm Jen Kiggans. I'm not sure you've heard of me, but this email is a heartfelt & humble request for your help.
---
| | [ **STAND WITH JEN ** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-Ow)
---
| | Look, I'm not like a lot of folks who send you these emails-- I served our nation in the Navy and then became an Adult-Geriatric Primary Care Nurse Practitioner. I'm a Mom who decided to run for office because I couldn't just watch while the Dems destroyed the country.

This is a huge leap of faith. _The Radical Left has**attacked me** , **vandalized** my office, **lied about me** on TV ads, and made me their **#1 target**._
---
| | [ **STAND WITH JEN ** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
| | National Democrats spent MILLIONS last year to try and crush me & every Republican out there, so we must start preparing now for all future attacks.

_Believe me, I**HATE** asking - but here it goes..._

**[Can I humbly ask if you'll help me by chipping in just a few bucks today?](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)**
---
| | [ **CHIP IN A FEW BUCKS** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._okoHU9zUqjEDQIsw)
---
| | [**You've read this far - can you give me a chance?**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-gfLsm73Hi7F3JHE8A)

I couldn't do any of this without your kindness & generosity.

Jen Kiggans
---
| | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._T-P-oP7eqCrRiwVoxA)
---
| |
---
| | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-IcJKZCxasH5-Pg)
---
I would not be where I am today without the help of my incredible and faithful supporters like you. Because of your support, I can keep fighting to make our country stronger.

Together we will get our country back on the right track and secure America's success!
---
[ SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
| |
---
| | Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
---

Trump’s whole presidency began with bribery and corruption: meme coins and crypto to fleece normal people and move money in the dark.
Now, an exclusive dinner and tour of the White House was offered for top holders of $TRUMP, causing the coin to surge:
At the same time, Trump is raking in huge amounts of money for his campaign from corporations and wealthy donors — he’s projected to raise $500 million by June.
This is what oligarchy feels like. Not someday. **Right now.**

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: I want to share something I’ll never forget.
body:
|
#
Friend, I want to share something I’ll never forget. When I volunteered to visit homebound seniors across mid-Michigan for Meals on Wheels deliveries, many of them asked me to put their weekend meal in the refrigerator. And more times than I can count, I’d open the fridge and realize: that one meal was _the only thing_ inside. Hunger touches the lives of far too many of our neighbors. And in the Midwest, where we believe in practicality and common sense, when people are hungry – we feed them. **But this week, House Republicans are trying to move forward with a budget bill that would slash food assistance programs like SNAP by upwards of $300 billion.** Even worse, they’re spreading misinformation to justify it and trying to use religion as a shield – ignoring the facts:
* The fraud rate in SNAP is less than 1%.
* Able-bodied adults are already required to work to receive benefits.
* And the average benefit is just _six dollars_ a day.

Let me say that again: six dollars. That’s what some in Washington want to take away from families – including children – so they can keep tax breaks for billionaires and loopholes for big corporations. **[I won’t sit quietly while extremists in Congress invoke the name of Jesus Christ to take food away from hungry kids. clean_body: | Friend, I want to share something I’ll never forget. When I volunteered to visit homebound seniors across mid-Michigan for Meals on Wheels deliveries, many of them asked me to put their weekend meal in the refrigerator. And more times than I can count, I’d open the fridge and realize: that one meal was the only thing inside. Hunger touches the lives of far too many of our neighbors. And in the Midwest, where we believe in practicality and common sense, when people are hungry – we feed them. But this week, House Republicans are trying to move forward with a budget bill that would slash food assistance programs like SNAP by upwards of $300 billion. Even worse, they’re spreading misinformation to justify it and trying to use religion as a shield – ignoring the facts: The fraud rate in SNAP is less than 1%. Able-bodied adults are already required to work to receive benefits. And the average benefit is just six dollars a day. Let me say that again: six dollars. That’s what some in Washington want to take away from families – including children – so they can keep tax breaks for billionaires and loopholes for big corporations. ** | | Thank you, Kristen | = | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Gaslighter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2552%2E4032634%2Er0opj4)
---
Donald Trump is gaslighting us all. Republicans are planning a middle-of-the-night vote tonight on their budget plan. Their plan that would give trillions of dollars in tax breaks to billionaires all by slashing Medicaid, food assistance, and educational programs. Mind you, this is Republicans’ second draft of this bill. The first one didn’t pass because, to them, it didn't cut health care for ENOUGH people. Ahead of the vote, Donald Trump was asked today if he could guarantee that voters will not lose health insurance under this bill. His response was: _“Oh, they won't lose health insurance.”_ **He’s lying.** Independent analysts say 14 MILLION PEOPLE will lose their health insurance under this bill — all to subsidize Jeff Bezos' next $500 million yacht. They’re using lies and late-night votes to try to avoid accountability for this fact. But we see right through them — and we’re not going to let up. **With the time we have before tonight’s vote, now is the time to turn up the pressure. Now is the time to make as much noise as we can and confirm that every representative will defend Medicaid funding tonight.** [**Click here to find out how to call your representative and urge them to vote NO on any cuts to Medicaid. Our team has provided an easy script for you to follow — and every voice will make a difference right now.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/call/ew-em-medicaid-calls/?source=EMZ25X_CAL_E_20250520_V1S1&t=8&akid=2552%2E4032634%2Er0opj4) | [**CALL NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/call/ew-em-medicaid-calls/?source=EMZ25X_CAL_E_20250520_V1S1&t=9&akid=2552%2E4032634%2Er0opj4)

Elizabeth

body:
RFK's shoddy and dangerous conspiracies could cost more women their healthcare. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108063512/546719238/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTU5NTI0MS1jNDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WeFeIfotSypVJbpiTNOSJs_xP6VnYx9obfU4XC4WkYA=&emci=e24c0b24-9735-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e9595241-c435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Let’s be clear: **Mifepristone, the main medication used for abortion, is safe.**

But that isn't stopping HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. from leading the charge to try and label mifepristone—which has been effective and FDA-approved for over 20 years—as "dangerous."

_And the “evidence” he’s using?_

**A report that wasn’t peer-reviewed, wasn’t published in any medical journal, and was put out by a far-right think tank connected to Trump’s Project 2025 playbook.** It claims to find 22 times more serious complications from mifepristone than the FDA’s own data—a number that no credible doctor, scientist, or public health expert agrees with...including Kim.

This isn’t science, it’s politics dressed up as research. And it’s part of a broader, dangerous attempt to undermine and chip away at abortion access and take health decisions out of the hands of women and their doctors. Kim has called out RFK before for pushing junk science and conspiracy theories, and she's not going to stop calling him on his bu**s**t any time soon.

[**If you stand with Kim and believe that healthcare decisions should be based on facts—not fake studies or extremist agendas—chip in $5 today, to help us keep fighting back against the nonsense clean_body: RFK's shoddy and dangerous conspiracies could cost more women their healthcare. Peter, Let’s be clear: Mifepristone, the main medication used for abortion, is safe. But that isn't stopping HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. from leading the charge to try and label mifepristone—which has been effective and FDA-approved for over 20 years—as "dangerous." And the “evidence” he’s using? A report that wasn’t peer-reviewed, wasn’t published in any medical journal, and was put out by a far-right think tank connected to Trump’s Project 2025 playbook. It claims to find 22 times more serious complications from mifepristone than the FDA’s own data—a number that no credible doctor, scientist, or public health expert agrees with...including Kim. This isn’t science, it’s politics dressed up as research. And it’s part of a broader, dangerous attempt to undermine and chip away at abortion access and take health decisions out of the hands of women and their doctors. Kim has called out RFK before for pushing junk science and conspiracy theories, and she's not going to stop calling him on his bust any time soon. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | | | Peter — Donald Trump is reportedly planning to accept a lavish private jet from the government of Qatar — a move many are calling a clear bribe. Here’s the kicker: for this jet to be securely used as Air Force One, it would take years to retrofit and could cost up to $1 BILLION — paid for by YOU, the taxpayers. Meanwhile, Trump and his MAGA allies like Elon Musk are slashing vital programs millions rely on, from food assistance to health care to the Child Tax Credit. Trump is once again putting his personal wealth and ego ahead of American democracy and national security — and if the past is prologue, he’ll stick us with the bill. Peter, tell me why in a country where _this_ is our reality: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108063706/546719763/-432768185?contactdata=jVy4okVxrhcgYpwxibFxNdpkoClB3wYti13TAgzS4u7ff1dKQmvd2vEIfPnZsbdkxgc9xGtiNnNheEJgSaalkDuU3D1okIpu8Hz0eOkp5hNriRJkgLONhTR3PWtSFBSCD/0nmGsbTj1u2e2lmnrGC9PBxmYYs3oEA77Dl3YVOrc=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250520_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjUyMTVmYi1jNDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-uG_jlANjeVSGtdchmBelXWMu_GI38lPXZ07cm5it2M=&emci=8b3902f3-c435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=765215fb-c435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=43402272) _CBS News_ Our President is proposing we spend our resources _on this:_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108063707/546719764/-432768185?contactdata=jVy4okVxrhcgYpwxibFxNdpkoClB3wYti13TAgzS4u7ff1dKQmvd2vEIfPnZsbdkxgc9xGtiNnNheEJgSaalkDuU3D1okIpu8Hz0eOkp5hNriRJkgLONhTR3PWtSFBSCD/0nmGsbTj1u2e2lmnrGC9PBxmYYs3oEA77Dl3YVOrc=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250520_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjUyMTVmYi1jNDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-uG_jlANjeVSGtdchmBelXWMu_GI38lPXZ07cm5it2M=&emci=8b3902f3-c435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=765215fb-c435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=43402272) _The Washington Post_ **That’s right.** While American families are stuck bearing the brunt of Trump’s tariffs and billionaire-first budget, he wants to spend _tens of millions of dollars_ on self-congratulatory military events that only serve to stoke his ego. This is beyond out-of-touch. Using taxpayer dollars to bankroll needless military spending is something I’ve always stood against. I’ve consistently voted against bloated Pentagon budgets because schools, housing, and essential programs people depend on continue to go underfunded. This frivolous spending isn’t just an insult to working families who can barely make ends meet. It evokes a time when fascist dictators paraded through the streets, lauding themselves as heroes while their people starved. Peter, I will always support service members, but this $45 million military parade isn’t about them — it’s about Trump’s ego. **[It’s time we address the urgent needs of working families. Please, add your name to my petition to join me in saying NO to Trump’s $45 million military parade:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108063708/546719765/-432768185?contactdata=jVy4okVxrhcgYpwxibFxNdpkoClB3wYti13TAgzS4u7ff1dKQmvd2vEIfPnZsbdkxgc9xGtiNnNheEJgSaalkDuU3D1okIpu8Hz0eOkp5hNriRJkgLONhTR3PWtSFBSCD/0nmGsbTj1u2e2lmnrGC9PBxmYYs3oEA77Dl3YVOrc=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250520_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjUyMTVmYi1jNDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-uG_jlANjeVSGtdchmBelXWMu_GI38lPXZ07cm5it2M=&emci=8b3902f3-c435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=765215fb-c435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=43402272)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108063709/546719766/-432768185?contactdata=jVy4okVxrhcgYpwxibFxNdpkoClB3wYti13TAgzS4u7ff1dKQmvd2vEIfPnZsbdkxgc9xGtiNnNheEJgSaalkDuU3D1okIpu8Hz0eOkp5hNriRJkgLONhTR3PWtSFBSCD/0nmGsbTj1u2e2lmnrGC9PBxmYYs3oEA77Dl3YVOrc=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250520_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjUyMTVmYi1jNDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-uG_jlANjeVSGtdchmBelXWMu_GI38lPXZ07cm5it2M=&emci=8b3902f3-c435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=765215fb-c435-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=43402272)

Becca

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Donald Trump just Criminally Charged my Friend and Democratic Colleague
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108063793/546720223/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzI5YjA1Ni1jNTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GW_UegKPR3jQtZqvPkqN6fNTDhV8PAngDZRP-BTBWNw=)
Friend,
You might remember a few months ago, Trump’s Justice Department threatened me for speaking out against Elon Musk. Well, now the Trump administration just issued its first criminal charges against a Democatic Member of Congress, my friend and colleague LaMonica McIver of New Jersey, who was just doing her job.
Congresswoman McIver was conducting oversight at an ICE facility in her district, and trying to hold this Administration accountable. Now, she’s bern targeted and charged with a criminal offense - for performing oversight. These charges are purely political and they’re a flashing red light for our democracy.
We all must stand up to an Administration that weaponizes law enforcement to politically persecute its opponents—before it's too late.
[We're sounding the alarm and asking you to split a donation between Rep. LaMonica McIver and myself, so she can fight these charges and we can be ready for whatever the Trump Administration does next.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108063794/546720224/1486707010?refcode2=f329b056-c535-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&refcode=em052025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzI5YjA1Ni1jNTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GW_UegKPR3jQtZqvPkqN6fNTDhV8PAngDZRP-BTBWNw=)

[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108063795/546720225/1486707010?refcode2=f329b056-c535-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&refcode=em052025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzI5YjA1Ni1jNTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GW_UegKPR3jQtZqvPkqN6fNTDhV8PAngDZRP-BTBWNw=)

After Trump’s Justice Department sent me a letter threatening legal action for hurting Elon’s feelings, we knew this was just the beginning. Now, they are actually going to ARREST a Democratic Congresswoman for exercising her legal oversight authority on an Ice Detention Center.
Just as you stood with me when I was threatened, I hope you will stand with LaMonica. She is an incredible new Member of Congress who is doing the good work for us in Newark, New Jersey, and we have to make sure she is supported against these outrageous attacks and has the necessary funding to fight back in court.
[To ensure LaMonica and everyone else who dares to speak truth to power is safe from political persecution, we must be equipped with the tools to win any legal battle we face. Please split a donation between LaMonica and myself, and share this with as many of your friends as possible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108063796/546720226/1486707010?refcode2=f329b056-c535-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&refcode=em052025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzI5YjA1Ni1jNTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GW_UegKPR3jQtZqvPkqN6fNTDhV8PAngDZRP-BTBWNw=)
We won’t back down,
Robert

The 2024 election and beyond has left the Democratic party in shambles. The ideas, the messaging, the people have become toxic. Well, today, my friend and co-host of The Morning Meeting, Dan Turrentine, is going to walk us through the Democratic party like no one else can. We are going to cover Biden, Harris and Walz, now that they have made appearances after the election. Does Kamala Harris or Tim Walz have a future in the Democratic party? When it comes to new leadership, new messaging and a new vision for Democrats, who is going to rise up? The DNC is rife with turmoil and Chairman Ken Martin is missing the mark on messaging. Who will be the frontrunner for president as we look forward to 2028? Do well known Governors like Gretchen Whitmer, JB Pritzker or Gavin Newsom stand a chance? Will AOC battle Chuck Schumer for a seat in the Senate? Or will a celebrity swoop in and take everyone's thunder? Dan Turrentine is going to break it all down for us as we look to 2026 midterms in the House and the Senate and the 2028 run for president.
Featuring:
**Dan Turrentine**
Co Host | The Morning Meeting
