subject: Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
| | | Patriot, When I served as an Apache pilot in the U.S. Army, my co-pilots were everything to me.

Neither of us could achieve our missions alone, and our unwavering trust in each other helped us get the job done and DEFEND America.

I may be out of the pilot’s seat, but now, I need a co-pilot for our new mission: defending our values and keeping the American Dream alive for the next generation.

**I’m asking you today:**[ **will you be my co-pilot on this new mission?**](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=74031f48b1934bc88366182a13870c55&_e=LRcbadUG0qkMkVAxBergFR5Yue2L4JGEKJ_va4TKCRTnF1V26Eou6zCqYyaxc5Il6DHYMjZ2Ke443ZKsXFHgReYDZYJVpdNCIgwawlWTl34PjCUh6iKVAmeIgzaKLzXncULl3wy7jXnaPnOcKFXITOJQb29f930XRgUniKSXYI_zm6-aDdAaeZDUt9VdHWLzaKjRG9yycJcqZWfgDW_AzDlIHHSokyr9lRQ2IbShBvUt6Ly-WSzt2OKGCLa27Ba4kLkVTmfpSt4iEynRKnLOLg%3D%3D)

name: Cori Bush
subject: My heart aches for St. Louis.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.politivistaction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com]
Peter,
St. Louis is hurting.
On Friday, one of the worst storms in St. Louis’ history tore through our communities. A devastating tornado—the first in our city to claim lives since 1959—left heartbreak in its wake.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/action-st-louis?refcode=x_250520_tornadorelief_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/action-st-louis?refcode=x_250520_tornadorelief_act]
Reports have shown that at least seven of our neighbors were killed, dozens were injured, and more than 5,000 buildings were damaged. As of Tuesday, tens of thousands of people and businesses remain without power.
My heart aches for our city.
If you or a loved one has been impacted, please visit the Action St. Louis [https://actionstl.org/tornado] website for resource information.
My team at Politivist Action PAC and I are on the ground, delivering supplies, checking on families, and doing everything we can to bring comfort and care to those who’ve lost so much.
We’re asking you to stand with us.
Every dollar you give will go directly toward relief efforts , helping families with food, water, diapers, emergency housing, and more. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/action-st-louis?refcode=x_250520_tornadorelief_act]
DONATE TO RELIEF EFFORTS NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/action-st-louis?refcode=x_250520_tornadorelief_act]
St. Louis, we are strong. We will make it through this—together.
In solidarity,
Cori Bush
https://www.politivistaction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com] Politivist Action PAC is committed to driving social change by electing leaders who stand for peace, justice, and human rights. We build diverse, intergenerational movements to confront extremism, defend democracy, and promote racial, economic, and social justice. By rejecting corporate influence and fighting to eliminate big money in politics, we proudly support grassroots candidates who champion dignity and equality for all.

[] DONATE TO RELIEF EFFORTS NOW [] St. Louis, we are strong. We will make it through this—together. In solidarity, Cori Bush [] Politivist Action PAC is committed to driving social change by electing leaders who stand for peace, justice, and human rights. We build diverse, intergenerational movements to confront extremism, defend democracy, and promote racial, economic, and social justice. By rejecting corporate influence and fighting to eliminate big money in politics, we proudly support grassroots candidates who champion dignity and equality for all. If you want to support our efforts, consider chipping in today >> [] DONATE TODAY [] DONATE MONTHLY [] PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC Politivist Action PAC PO Box 33079 Washington, DC 20033 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Josh Waddell
subject: a $550 million investment in Hoosiers!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
This is exciting news, Fellow Republican | | | [](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/xmOG-kiJ64dq9veT6ttct5rXUNLL5nJ2Jumorgk8RgdeJEx36L3y8giW259Qcy3FWBntW-tbuKqpvqWqwNAxtcec4cZNL5gWlH67SjabUJ0i9eO8JQkNAFG_LrILq2kpnwLKRuLacUtu40EpclamV-DkjO4-WHtzFFICKErkca6bsoyV8-Mm7i-XXUaThGToCApE4Fo5jGIWN7Ap3vbBi3qWycxcy0uu7BVD9g3nL6OKAzmmwzLk_hPc3THGwe1qor7aRBdeq7oK76HIDapT6fsrE_MjhMeQnsuJXu6L9nyxBxKIcUFbTwLwrzGYc3zQMFEyOag9AaUWTN85PhwjG-4I_ghrm96yQ946bdy_qDUPUFu71uUXtkUTHJGI_SuW/bFwIZlF5y8bJVPD205cPpeBit5He_n2e/9)
---
Fellow Republican, Gov. Braun and conservative leaders are _**delivering real results**_ for Hoosiers.

Just this week, Roche Diagnostics announced a massive **$550 MILLION investment** to expand its Indianapolis manufacturing hub, creating hundreds of new jobs and solidifying Indiana’s place as a national leader in health care innovation.

That’s not a coincidence. **That’s conservative leadership at work.**
---
[ _**KEEP THE WINS COMING**_ ](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/mtadYGRDt64_kdifYGy_fKmVVt4XoZxf2Ndipa1nmjAeNXqGqcMJ-Js4Ua3ayNpdJJxUklellfBDPWUlzmAoTX2SS9JyYJiuv2BI-EEUodjpJNUhTv5zwvKdj4L5nMsuZukQInRDrWadhlJEeRRrUDN19rjRkhxwUgy1WcZPO6MAFPUGEFHCFu2_OFWJRyXQPXTjis_HMMLvppsS8gJSBLwM3Cy9mJPejgSKuLzjegxyC5ll7lHKQBULx5IZ-mUfqudGID2MIzEhwSR7u8SeAQet2sEbjH4-VpVGfAqCF3UrizFbshiEpBSPMh-xtPEuk3GWKnx8EJOBSFRQ5pQ_yzFuTer1By2crwy9Ix4xJ5Wnk4kTTsK0PjQ72NiS9B2V/SFj9C6csGHFadpTYcmAkv7zlp0LiOUzS/9)
---
Under Gov. Braun, Indiana is cutting red tape, lowering taxes, and welcoming businesses that want to invest in Hoosiers, but let’s be clear: **Democrats want to tear it all down.**

They’re scheming to _hike taxes, crush energy independence, and replace free enterprise with federal dependency._ _If they win in 2026, they won’t hesitate to undo every single gain we’ve made._
---
[ _**FIGHT FOR HOOSIER VALUES**_ ](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/6HWh4sIT8SWnyawnQkQ4sq6aTxvr5hvy9qBLc0KRqCR_uswB82BE0BJ-fYjtAi8XPiO2u1OD0-2M5PY_HpudbJBLebOP_Yf3Thlj_MecrwM2dtKyzxarnEoA4u9MQKehG0CQl8p3MVHNhrbyG8p7NbOQuB3sNhIL2fZ60yHgsJZ487ZZ4DhOtG-acDGScIc5_qGT6d5T_FDg8Mvtgsrb4EMFnKaw7TY-Hr6_kgMKg1i12dC9suC3mpu9ejPRkFsUtE7fZsYJ87d0AVhaWANkI_LBYcLkojvkwYFD7PG4TgXR3QHTfwpKG_g2-69Q-OtGGqcUVzcZ4aaIDtg2hAVL8CvszOKVsqQdvVJBZhEDi9QC5sEMnKGKpzVPF4_9JiU8/RGoiYxEoj6AsLc_4o2POHthnfxjFfQCh/9)
---
This $550 million investment win shows what’s possible when conservatives lead. But we can’t protect Gov. Braun’s agenda without the grassroots muscle to fight back.

__**[Will you chip in today – whether it’s $5 or $50 – to defend Indiana’s pro-growth, pro-freedom future?](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/1zHYnK7C9L2zj61n8J2Wvp3fpMnwENuu2NLkh92B8DBUBQvt9YwyxMd-0noLvSQ4WfbZVZ-5QTpCo61vpBpjAiMmebGL9gyuO9Jm3R8ygaJVPqiEZhmb-rX_w9qxSEkNFjjxlmM6CAZXRId1RRXeU2IEs1XhUYwVmb1GbL5giT7tfpw-e3VXaybJhUnUtz6DFwvP5PTea01Z4sypeJWVPplrK2cGFigRqhVekuJS1eCGjr3PBsO-2CsjQcCG7uO7ww9k2dzsb8CV_yOiKi45Sz5MIWKafMRwNq0-TksFHHjCd-ZKoYGxA0Vb4BwcsrPMZwf-a9AedAn4lU-5WH_qd2tHIRvVFM0-oDNC5o-4yNtdv_nlUQxbNVEc1hAUy7z_/fDhZ6oJ-X090cTR2ULsOlbKrZ955zaUs/9)**__

clean_body: | Peter, we’ll get right to it: = Here are three quick reasons why: 1. Donald Trump and his administration are attempting to destroy our democracy and cut critical government services, like Medicaid. But Tina is standing strong, and she will never stop fighting for Oregonians. 2. Tina is laser-focused on making progress on the most important issues facing Oregon, and it’s a full-time job. She’s not paying attention to fundraising — but we are. It’s up to our team to hit all of our goals so we don’t lose any ground this month. 3. This campaign is funded by people chipping in whatever, whenever they can, not wealthy billionaires. name: Chris Taylor for Justice
subject: Breaking news: Judge Chris Taylor is running for a seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
This race isn’t just about two different judges — it’s about two very different visions for Wisconsin’s future.
Breaking news: **Judge Chris Taylor is running for the Wisconsin Supreme Court.**

[**_Before we say more, can you split $10 between this campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand? We’re counting on grassroots support to win._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108064983/546724369/740009309?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.20_Chris-Taylor-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTQ0NzE0ZS1jODM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g_sV6A5spGDDqvU7yfG8DC6nERHKjq4lX_6qHjNvSzI=)

Chris has spent her entire career fighting for our freedoms. As a lawyer, public servant, and now as a judge, she’s never backed down from a tough fight.

**Today, Chris is stepping up once again — because our rights, our democracy, and our courts are under attack.**

Our opponent, Rebecca Bradley, embodies the division and extremism threatening everything we care about.

Bradley has sided time and again with right-wing special interests, opposing reproductive freedom, undermining workers’ rights, and threatening our democracy. She has turned her back on Wisconsinites.

This race isn’t just about two different judges. It’s about two very different visions for Wisconsin’s future and the importance of a fair and impartial Wisconsin Supreme Court.

If we’re going to compete with the right-wing money machine, we need a massive show of grassroots strength.

**During the last Wisconsin Supreme Court election, Elon Musk spent over _$20 million_ trying to buy a seat on our Supreme Court.**

If Elon Musk and other right-wing special interests get involved again, we need to be ready for everything they’ll throw at us. That’s why we’re asking:

_[**_Can you become a founding donor by splitting a donation of $10 between our campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand now?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108064984/546724370/740009309?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.20_Chris-Taylor-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTQ0NzE0ZS1jODM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g_sV6A5spGDDqvU7yfG8DC6nERHKjq4lX_6qHjNvSzI=)_ | | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108064985/546724371/740009309?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.20_Chris-Taylor-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTQ0NzE0ZS1jODM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g_sV6A5spGDDqvU7yfG8DC6nERHKjq4lX_6qHjNvSzI=)

clean_body: This race isn’t just about two different judges — it’s about two very different visions for Wisconsin’s future. Breaking news: Judge Chris Taylor is running for the Wisconsin Supreme Court. = Chris has spent her entire career fighting for our freedoms. As a lawyer, public servant, and now as a judge, she’s never backed down from a tough fight. Today, Chris is stepping up once again — because our rights, our democracy, and our courts are under attack. Our opponent, Rebecca Bradley, embodies the division and extremism threatening everything we care about. Bradley has sided time and again with right-wing special interests, opposing reproductive freedom, undermining workers’ rights, and threatening our democracy. She has turned her back on Wisconsinites. This race isn’t just about two different judges. It’s about two very different visions for Wisconsin’s future and the importance of a fair and impartial Wisconsin Supreme Court. If we’re going to compete with the right-wing money machine, we need a massive show of grassroots strength. During the last Wisconsin Supreme Court election, Elon Musk spent over $20 million trying to buy a seat on our Supreme Court. If Elon Musk and other right-wing special interests get involved again, we need to be ready for everything they’ll throw at us. That’s why we’re asking: = | | = Thank you, Team Taylor * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Team Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: John James lied
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
|
#
---
Hi team, John James promised he wouldn’t cut Medicaid. He said it clearly and publicly. He lied. He voted for a Republican plan that would rip health care away from more than 10 million Americans. He voted against capping insulin prices. Against protecting health care for children with cancer. Against ensuring coverage for pregnant and postpartum women. Against providing home-based care for seniors and people with disabilities. Against defending substance use treatment. Against Medicaid funding for states. Against Planned Parenthood. **Time and again, James has shown exactly who he stands with — the wealthy donors and extremist Republicans who want to gut Medicaid so they can give tax breaks to billionaires.** Fight Like Hell PAC is focused on supporting candidates who will actually fight for working families, and won’t back down when Medicaid and affordable health care are on the line. **[If you’re with us, chip in now. clean_body: | Hi team, John James promised he wouldn’t cut Medicaid. He said it clearly and publicly. He lied. He voted for a Republican plan that would rip health care away from more than 10 million Americans. He voted against capping insulin prices. Against protecting health care for children with cancer. Against ensuring coverage for pregnant and postpartum women. Against providing home-based care for seniors and people with disabilities. Against defending substance use treatment. Against Medicaid funding for states. Against Planned Parenthood. Time and again, James has shown exactly who he stands with — the wealthy donors and extremist Republicans who want to gut Medicaid so they can give tax breaks to billionaires. Fight Like Hell PAC is focused on supporting candidates who will actually fight for working families, and won’t back down when Medicaid and affordable health care are on the line. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. They are using all their resources to flip the VA House this November. But we know the truth: If Republicans gain power in Virginia, they will stop at nothing to attack abortion rights, limit voting access, and loosen gun laws – pushing Trump’s Project 2025 through the legislature. So we must fight back. **We’re counting on grassroots donations to power our candidates across the finish line and give state Dems the resources they need to go toe-to-toe with extreme MAGA Republicans.** [Can we count on you to rush $3 to win competitive races in states like Virginia and beyond? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDT1TWpz2EbdEndyX3T6ox9WCqeGGnT4d4zbL4ItShpaJRbHkzDi_EGarU8QK9P0kvTs15_VGy5QJmVhFZn4wCabeQ8EAiMFv9OGCqhttwobE8rYCpj9zWnwkbl3CZB2Jvedqf8yNN_zeUeEVR8w2SiQVb8zm3CphA0r2dAEv2KyWYWyjFuGmv3rpzpbj2pHRVKM8SB_Tp1xsBXv63cn-mDQrMKBKxtplRWP9G73ocFC8UG4GFRd71PraZ9dKWdUafa9cHnR85ModFJhAX5MWx9fj_YzJA0i5Z9u08iKRTxfKQ0rW8uCq3-FRjxlLzCVCl74-vEn2Bxi_-F20hiF9pMF7h-iwpaa_fy82LN9Nj0is/4gn/whVWpD2kQbu7i_D2C4LAmg/h1/h001.YCA4oAMMvnEb5NYjHOKkSVncS1Vqz45ylHDd6shmvOs) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-may25?refcode=052025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-may25?refcode=052025]
Friend,
We need to win back our majority in the Minnesota House. Republicans continue to put the interests of the wealthy and powerful few ahead of the rest of Minnesota. DFLers are working alongside Minnesotans to build a future where everyone can get ahead, but we need to win back our majority to make that truly happen. That’s why I need your help, friend.
We need to raise $5,000 by the end of this week. If we’re going to win, we need to run the strongest campaign yet. That means hiring people early, paying our staff competitive wages, and investing in new strategies. Friend, will you donate $10, $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can to make that happen? name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Speaking out against Trump’s reckless tariffs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, there’s no question in my mind that Donald Trump’s tariffs are a bad idea. They’re bad for consumers. Bad for our economy. Bad for all of us.
Let’s be clear about what this tariff operation boils down to: This is a tax hike that harms hardworking families across the country. So, at a moment when families are already struggling with high costs, Trump’s reckless tariffs have sent costs _skyrocketing_ even further across the board.
Trump’s dangerous mismanagement of our economy is hurting workers, crushing small businesses, and bringing our country to the brink of a recession.
**That’s why I’m speaking out – loudly and clearly – against Trump’s tariffs, and I’m hoping you’ll join me in the fight by signing my new petition.**
[**So please, will you add your name right away to join me in condemning the Trump Tariff Tax Hike?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108065421/546726160/-1115369484?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk5523-su-seg2&refcode=jtk5523-su-seg2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzY4MzRmYi1jOTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=caB_yOvffzecf2yuZr2VbVO1fQUGp9tx-iRSjltx_Kg=&emci=a6ffb454-5732-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=736834fb-c935-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1586379)

name: Team Rosen
subject: Cuts at HHS are having life-and-death consequences
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Add your name to take a stand against RFK Jr.'s cuts to HHS!
| | |
---
Friend: Last week, Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. told Congress, “I don’t think people should be taking advice, medical advice, from me.”
**But right now, RFK Jr. is laying off tens of thousands of health experts who ARE capable of giving medical advice – while his anti-vaccine disinformation and conspiracy theories are having serious _life-and-death_ consequences.**
**[Will you add your name to our petition now to take a stand against RFK Jr.’s cuts to the Department of Health and Human Services?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108065453/546726225/490768296?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=37087&ask=5&code=jtk5531-su-nd&refcode=jtk5531-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDY4MzRmYi1jOTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p8eTSdKF7bfB1lDP4ApOK9ceoEHCemlQdWtKMAPSlTM=&emci=9467d32a-8035-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=706834fb-c935-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=3800590)**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108065454/546726226/490768296?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=37087&ask=5&code=jtk5531-su-nd&refcode=jtk5531-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDY4MzRmYi1jOTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p8eTSdKF7bfB1lDP4ApOK9ceoEHCemlQdWtKMAPSlTM=&emci=9467d32a-8035-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=706834fb-c935-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=3800590)

|

Since he became our nation’s chief health official, RFK Jr. has cut a quarter of the HHS workforce – about 20,000 staff.
Now, our country is struggling to respond to an unusual measles outbreak that has killed two unvaccinated children and an adult – while causing more than 1,000 people across 30 states to get sick.

And despite acknowledging that the measles vaccine is effective, RFK Jr. is promoting alternative treatments like cod liver oil – a remedy that has caused some children to get even _sicker_.
If there's one thing we agree with RFK Jr. on, it's that _people should not be taking his medical advice._ But our country will continue to suffer from his extreme, unfounded ideas and careless decisions if we allow further cuts at HHS.
**That’s why we’re looking for 1,000 supporters to sign our urgent petition to help us stop RFK Jr.’s reckless cuts. Our deadline is at midnight, and we still need your signature, friend.**
[**Please, sign our petition now to take a stand against RFK Jr.’s cuts to the Department of Health and Human Services that are putting our nation’s health at risk!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108065455/546726227/490768296?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=37087&ask=5&code=jtk5531-su-nd&refcode=jtk5531-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDY4MzRmYi1jOTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p8eTSdKF7bfB1lDP4ApOK9ceoEHCemlQdWtKMAPSlTM=&emci=9467d32a-8035-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=706834fb-c935-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=3800590)

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Palm Springs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/79097/images/YA%20-%20Congress%20-%20Logo%20-%20Primary%201%20%5BRGB%5D_Full_Color_Coral.png]
Peter — An attack on our reproductive rights anywhere is a threat to all of us.

This weekend, a fertility clinic in Palm Springs, California was subject to a targeted attack that caused major damage to their offices.

Thankfully, no patients or providers were harmed directly in the attack, but this horrific tragedy is a reminder that political violence is increasing in our country.

This is a clinic that provides fertility evaluations, IVF services, egg donation and freezing, and reproductive counseling. This attack was no accident. The elected leaders on the right who continue to attack reproductive care have set the stage for extremists to attack healthcare providers.

My team and I are advocating for law enforcement to conduct a thorough investigation and to ensure that anti-choice extremists are stopped before they can cause more harm.

I won’t stop using my voice to stand up for robust reproductive care. Thanks for your support, Peter.

— Yassamin Ansari
Yassamin Ansari for Congress
PO Box 13524
Phoenix, AZ 85002
United States
yassaminforcongress.com [yassaminforcongress.com] | info@yassaminforcongress.com [info@yassaminforcongress.com]

clean_body: [] Peter — An attack on our reproductive rights anywhere is a threat to all of us. This weekend, a fertility clinic in Palm Springs, California was subject to a targeted attack that caused major damage to their offices. Thankfully, no patients or providers were harmed directly in the attack, but this horrific tragedy is a reminder that political violence is increasing in our country. This is a clinic that provides fertility evaluations, IVF services, egg donation and freezing, and reproductive counseling. This attack was no accident. The elected leaders on the right who continue to attack reproductive care have set the stage for extremists to attack healthcare providers. My team and I are advocating for law enforcement to conduct a thorough investigation and to ensure that anti-choice extremists are stopped before they can cause more harm. I won’t stop using my voice to stand up for robust reproductive care. Thanks for your support, Peter. — Yassamin Ansari Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States yassaminforcongress.com [yassaminforcongress.com] | info@yassaminforcongress.com [info@yassaminforcongress.com] Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Jared Golden
subject: I’ve made my decision
body:
The path to a Democratic majority runs through Maine.

| | **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108065598/546726778/-989746044?&refcode=E13371-20250520-GoldenAnnouncement-Image-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzMzk4Y2Y0LWNhMzUtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BP78wiMqdz3mvWgrwPcqOHK-GJb-bsxCsK9y50oXuAA=)** Peter, Over the past several months, many of you have asked about my political future. I’ve made my decision and today I’m excited to share some big news: **I’m officially running for re-election in Maine’s 2nd Congressional District!** I believe the best way to restore balance in Washington is for Democrats to take back the House of Representatives — and that starts right here in Maine. [_**Can I count on you to split a donation between me and the Blue Dogs to power our campaign to victory?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108065600/546726780/-989746044?&refcode=E13371-20250520-GoldenAnnouncement-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzMzk4Y2Y0LWNhMzUtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BP78wiMqdz3mvWgrwPcqOHK-GJb-bsxCsK9y50oXuAA=) [DONATE $25 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108065603/546726782/-989746044?&refcode=E13371-20250520-GoldenAnnouncement-SB-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzMzk4Y2Y0LWNhMzUtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BP78wiMqdz3mvWgrwPcqOHK-GJb-bsxCsK9y50oXuAA=) The path to a Democratic majority runs directly through Maine. I’m committed to making sure no one like Paul LePage blusters his way into Congress. **While Republicans in Washington are pushing to dismantle healthcare, rig the tax code for the wealthy, and roll back fundamental rights, I’m fighting for what matters: affordable healthcare, workers’ rights, reproductive freedom, and Maine’s proud heritage industries.** The stakes couldn’t be higher. This race will be competitive and expensive — but we’ve proven before that we can win here, and I know we can do it again. clean_body: The path to a Democratic majority runs through Maine. | | = Peter, Over the past several months, many of you have asked about my political future. I’ve made my decision and today I’m excited to share some big news: I’m officially running for re-election in Maine’s 2nd Congressional District! I believe the best way to restore balance in Washington is for Democrats to take back the House of Representatives — and that starts right here in Maine. = = The path to a Democratic majority runs directly through Maine. I’m committed to making sure no one like Paul LePage blusters his way into Congress. While Republicans in Washington are pushing to dismantle healthcare, rig the tax code for the wealthy, and roll back fundamental rights, I’m fighting for what matters: affordable healthcare, workers’ rights, reproductive freedom, and Maine’s proud heritage industries. name: Haley Stevens HQ
subject: Without a win in Michigan, there’s no Senate majority for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
These are the hallmarks of the Trump administration – and they’re policies that are directly harming people here in Michigan and all around the country.

| Uncertainty. Chaos. Rising prices. Threats to Social Security and Medicare. Attacks on civil liberties. And a $6 trillion tax in the form of tariffs.

**These are the hallmarks of the Trump administration – and they’re policies that are directly harming people here in Michigan and all around the country.**

That’s why Democrat Haley Stevens is running to be Michigan’s U.S. senator and help Democrats take back the Senate majority – to serve as a check on Trump and his MAGA allies like Elon Musk.

Without a win in Michigan, there is no Senate majority for Democrats. Plain and simple. And without that majority, we cannot stop Trump and Musk. **That’s why, in the early stages of Haley’s Senate campaign, we’ve set an ambitious $1 million goal to build up the early resources it will take to compete against the GOP’s war chest and win.**

[_**So will you please rush a gift of $10 – split between our campaign and Hillary Scholten's – to help us hit this goal, win in Michigan, and take back the Senate for Democrats?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108065671/546726973/-873513011?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-05-20_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTk4NDc2MS1jYjM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nkGRSklAvIXl1sl0AeNS7rt1X02-4oxUqdkmK_M8RX4=) Thank you,

A lifelong resident of West Central Indiana, Jim grew up on his family's farm and had the values of faith, family, and hard work instilled in him at an early age. He is an unwavering defender of America's Constitutional liberties and has spent the vast majority of his life serving our country. After earning both his bachelor's and his master's at Purdue University, Jim was assigned to the 523rd Transportation Company at Cha Rang Valley in Vietnam. He fought in two of the deadliest battles of Operation Lam Son 719 and lost his left arm during a convoy ambush in March of 1971. In a true embodiment of American sacrifice and patriotism, Jim Baird has put his life on the line time and time again fighting communism abroad. His belief in the American Dream and our American way of life go far beyond words. For the entirety of his life, Jim has fought the good fight for our country both physically and spiritually. And he wears his love for the world's greatest country on his sleeve each and every day that he shows up for work in Washington, D.C. Previously, Jim Baird spent eight years in the Indiana House of Representatives serving District 44 from 2010 to 2018. Prior to that, he was Putnam County Commissioner from 2006 to 2010. A fiscal conservative and America First Republican, Jim is incredibly proud to fight every day in DC to advance the best interests of Indiana's families through Congress. A loving husband to his wife Danise, a devoted father to his children, and the world's best pop-pop to his grandkids, Jim spends most of his free time in the company of his loved ones or tending to the family farm.

body:
Critical 2026 Battle Plan: Take Down 26 Liberal Targets
Our sights are set on 26 vulnerable seats in 2026.

|
---
| | | Dear Friend,

As we gear up for the 2026 elections, I'm writing to share a critical battle plan with you. **[Our team has identified 26 vulnerable seats.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=db4980981be143d98b0831539e7af253&_e=66dqQ8MjtRYxeIOH-H9DE-cG8vf2NQjPVxcanzOOEwAS97ALR7OTr0mW753eMqQ01Fukjh4L5wL2eUD08TKu4nTSejzVSlzrO_JwnUp6ubE9TajQ_tkI7D7o5twydkb6ko6aCny__dDKVAuLx70hHX9ItX_Rje4m-XMqWrmLk6IC1Swg8eJBmsX9W9iBkRqnKJ39H3Oyk-yiU1OPumyUHhCVNZNtA4v2AiYYMpXIwdGR3SO_XzBn5SvEtDupPrS3BGgEZ50nuQyf78T1mWiIIL9F7rL5IYOI2_bXd-AMAOYx_ALui5Kkq0hORIdrwK1VNT_z0zJw4-UWulxRHHbdFAH0QBs90uJU1DE4XPDze3x-6_xmldd_k2uY_egUrgvx "Our team has identified 26 vulnerable seats.")** The Democrats running for these seats are laser-focused on dismantling our conservative progress.

These proud Swamp members have consistently blocked our efforts to advance the America First agenda, and it's time we take them head-on. But to do that, we need your support. **[We're counting on grassroots patriots like you to fuel our efforts and help secure victory for these seats.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=db4980981be143d98b0831539e7af253&_e=66dqQ8MjtRYxeIOH-H9DE-cG8vf2NQjPVxcanzOOEwAS97ALR7OTr0mW753eMqQ01Fukjh4L5wL2eUD08TKu4nTSejzVSlzrO_JwnUp6ubE9TajQ_tkI7D7o5twydkb6ko6aCny__dDKVAuLx70hHX9ItX_Rje4m-XMqWrmLk6IC1Swg8eJBmsX9W9iBkRqnKJ39H3Oyk-yiU1OPumyUHhCVNZNtA4v2AiYYMpXIwdFavzPmdlAOJdWtKVsTXV5uTiT4geeUqlJgLMmTQ3bqPO1yCJ1Jn-2FUR_QN0Q-EmLtHxbYiJbnx0WCm2AJT5er7krv5kceT2xA8-ANrVZtD7XKkoeNWYHui4DJIH_yenoeO_00eUt8_UmxbY5CDOST "We're counting on grassroots patriots like you to fuel our efforts and help secure victory for these seats.")**

That's why I'm asking you to make a critical investment in our 2026 campaign. clean_body: Critical 2026 Battle Plan: Take Down 26 Liberal Targets Our sights are set on 26 vulnerable seats in 2026. | | | | Dear Friend, As we gear up for the 2026 elections, I'm writing to share a critical battle plan with you. "Our team has identified 26 vulnerable seats." The Democrats running for these seats are laser-focused on dismantling our conservative progress. These proud Swamp members have consistently blocked our efforts to advance the America First agenda, and it's time we take them head-on. But to do that, we need your support. "We're counting on grassroots patriots like you to fuel our efforts and help secure victory for these seats." That's why I'm asking you to make a critical investment in our 2026 campaign. Your contribution of "$26" , "$52" , or "$100" will be used to build a powerhouse campaign infrastructure, recruit top talent, and unleash a barrage of targeted ads that will leave the radical left reeling. | | | "STEP UP NOW >>" We can't afford to wait - the liberal machine is already cranking up its fundraising apparatus, and we need to stay ahead of the curve. Your timely support will give us the power we need to take down these 26 liberal targets and add to our ranks to defend our America First agenda. So I'm personally asking you to join the fight today. name: Representative Darin Harbick
subject: May 20th Legislative Update
body:
It's been a busy week in Salem and I wanted to give you a few updates on what's been going on.
---
| | | [](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fcontent.govdelivery.com%2Faccounts%2FORLEG%2Fbulletins%2F3e14fe3/1/01010196efe46515-2f9ad4c8-1af0-4a55-886e-cd3ba2487425-000000/UiqWiIo4K5fM2oH_mUGPNj4jDZsO_co49_0jAEfCIy8=406)
---|---
---
Replies to this message are sent to an unmonitored mailbox.
To contact me, please click here: [Rep.DarinHarbick@oregonlegislature.gov](mailto:Rep.DarinHarbick@oregonlegislature.gov) |
* * *
---
Hello Friends,
It's been a busy week in Salem and I wanted to give you a few updates on what's been going on. This week we discussed a lot of issues related to affordability. I will always stand up for working families by opposing new taxes and regulations, and by advocating for you to keep more of what you make.
Best,
Darin
# Revenue Forecast
Last week state economists released the revenue forecast. It showed that despite Democrats reckless spending and mismanagement of our state economy the state government is projected to bring in 12% more revenue from the last budget cycle. However, this forecast predicts $500 million less than the previously forecast. The governor's budget was based on the previous estimates. That means Democrats are scrambling to fill this $500 million gap.
I gave a speech on this very issue on the House Floor. In it I warned Democrats not to hurt working families by increasing taxes to fill the $500 million gap. [You can watch my speech here. ](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2Fmediaplayer%3FclientID=4879615486%26eventID=2025051177%26startStreamAt=7704/1/01010196efe46515-2f9ad4c8-1af0-4a55-886e-cd3ba2487425-000000/Uc7EmqaoLqNBHRntS4qLP9LJAoAkY_rxOfKSNtEs2ik=406)
[](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2Fmediaplayer%3FclientID=4879615486%26eventID=2025051177%26startStreamAt=7704/2/01010196efe46515-2f9ad4c8-1af0-4a55-886e-cd3ba2487425-000000/1427xuQwgAtrsq5H6QPlXt4au4prYVTGNULUhwSg9QY=406)
* * *
---
* * *
---
# Big Win for Oregon Truckers!
On May 15th, the Oregon Department of Environmental Quality (DEQ) announced that it would be delaying enforcement of the Advanced Clean Truck rules for 2025 and 2026 medium and heavy-duty truck model years. If this rule had been enforced it would have had long lasting devastating impacts for our truckers. As someone who drives a log truck in my spare time I am happy to see these rules get delayed.
Representative Boshart-Davis started this conversation by introducing HB 3119 a bill that would have accomplished the same goal. I was proud to co-sponsor the bill and testify in support of it back in January. If it wasn't for the introduction and House Republican advocacy for this bill I'm not sure DEQ would have delayed the Clean Truck rules.
[You can watch my testimony on HB 3119 here. ](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2Fmediaplayer%3FclientID=4879615486%26eventID=2025011106%26startStreamAt=3145/1/01010196efe46515-2f9ad4c8-1af0-4a55-886e-cd3ba2487425-000000/IPevnJ2C56tmR32vGRXituzHwqLyCyhiDSUPOiDU5HE=406)
[](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2Fmediaplayer%3FclientID=4879615486%26eventID=2025011106%26startStreamAt=3145/2/01010196efe46515-2f9ad4c8-1af0-4a55-886e-cd3ba2487425-000000/Ch7aKWJM9PP4wOiUJnG8gP17GHxmMBFmkMIObaLJOxU=406)
* * *
---
# Bad Bill Alert!
Tomorrow the House Rules committee will be hearing HB 3971. This dangerous bill would directly harm the residents of Goshen. It would override local zoning laws to allow Lane County to build a garbage plant that would process hazardous materials on wetland property that floods often. To make matters worse this would also increase the garbage fees for Lane County residents.
I will be testifying in front of the House Rules committee committee tomorrow morning at 8:00am (05/21/2025) along with some residents of Goshen. I need your help to speak out against this bad legislation. If you are able to make the time work with your schedule then please register to testify against the bill in person or remotely.
If not, that's ok! The committee accepts written comments on the bill up to 48 hours after the hearing. If your not able to testify remotely or in person this is a great way to make sure your voice is heard.
[Click here to register to submit written testimony to the committee](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FTestimony%2FHRULES%3FmeetingDate=2025-05-21-08-00/1/01010196efe46515-2f9ad4c8-1af0-4a55-886e-cd3ba2487425-000000/YedP6PpuqLaEjrqDt6OeMM-FF8_nlcXx14KQZ64PscI=406)
[Click here to register to speak on the bill.](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1%2FMeasures%2FOverview%2FHB3971/1/01010196efe46515-2f9ad4c8-1af0-4a55-886e-cd3ba2487425-000000/sms_hdm131X6XagVnO86vkhdcooZnLLM2m9r7O0xWTE=406) (after opening the link scroll down and click register to testify at the bottom of the page.)
# House Republicans Urge President Trump to Allow More Timber Harvesting
This week, my colleagues and I sent a [letter](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fleg-my.sharepoint.com%2F:b:%2Fg%2Fpersonal%2Fherscos_oregonlegislature_gov%2FER1T6rLVXMFPlRiSk8KBHAcBaOuwXfLfmzAj7TQVi5enXA%3Fe=PjABRJ%%26sdata=UlpYcm5lUW5TcmNDOHdTUFVST1dITU05MllaTUppQnF0OHEySVg5V2N2Zz0%253d/1/01010196efe46515-2f9ad4c8-1af0-4a55-886e-cd3ba2487425-000000/mFFR6jMzREbknSnIxBxMy3O_3hzLrT2abigrQy2_U04=406) to President Donald Trump, urging additional and immediate federal action to increase timber harvests on federally managed land. We also applauded the president’s recent executive orders aimed at boosting domestic timber production. The letter was signed by all 24 members of the House Republican Caucus.
Oregonians benefit when our state and federal government work together to responsibly manage our forests and timber resources. After years of mismanagement, we welcome the opportunity to work with the federal administration to create jobs and revitalize rural communities, source sustainable building materials locally, and ensure that one of our greatest assets, our forests, don’t burn to the ground every summer.
The federal government owns and is responsible for managing 61% of Oregon’s forestland. Oregon's forest sector currently supports 62,000 jobs. Expansion of the timber industry onto federal lands would lead to dramatic increases in employment, especially in rural communities.
Yours truly,
Representative Darin Harbick
House District 12
**Capitol Phone:** 503-986-1412
**Capitol Address:** 900 Court St. NE, H-376, Salem, Oregon 97301
**Email:** [Rep.DarinHarbick@oregonlegislature.gov](mailto:Rep.DarinHarbick@oregonlegislature.gov)
**Website:**[https://www.oregonlegislature.gov/harbick](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fharbick/1/01010196efe46515-2f9ad4c8-1af0-4a55-886e-cd3ba2487425-000000/YsHZg3D2cMUEOGMTNYcSKBOyxPkWwl1azDC-DKWQHjQ=406)
* * *
**SUBSCRIBER SERVICES OPTIONS:**
**•** To **stop** receiving this newsletter, **add** new newsletters, or**delete** your subscription services click [Manage Preferences](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fpublic.govdelivery.com%2Faccounts%2FORLEG%2Fsubscriber%2Fnew%3Fpreferences=true/1/01010196efe46515-2f9ad4c8-1af0-4a55-886e-cd3ba2487425-000000/9DPjTudVYJjajw2XapbpeBdMx1VA74W0XypEbVnytUg=406)
**•** For questions about subscriber services, please email [Help](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fsubscriberhelp.govdelivery.com%2F/1/01010196efe46515-2f9ad4c8-1af0-4a55-886e-cd3ba2487425-000000/UsbBmRdPblDsSyB-kobx2LBUsh8Lf8H_mXrGW6vuMF4=406) Information provided may not be final and is subject to change.
---
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com using GovDelivery · 707 17th St, Suite 4000 · Denver, CO 80202 · 1-800-439-1420 | [](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fsubscriberhelp.granicus.com%2F/1/01010196efe46515-2f9ad4c8-1af0-4a55-886e-cd3ba2487425-000000/3FUEDM-PoBwM1pISH9Kv99KfBnyBOWYH_meHv55sBB0=406)
---|---

subject: I hate to bug you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
Here are 4 reasons why I need you right now...
| | | | [](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2OnDAQhJ_G3IygDRgOHEiA_BxWiRJpo1yQxz-Dd21jYTOjzdNHIGZOlstfd1e5mfVGq48W0U8IYNYiIABEOgTQ_YTXX7_lICleX_68YzbI7y_7K3w-0Rs8YceZqJdxZd03Eq7DJdfe_f13y598_PDySZ9TU2mZNrtK-0S0wGvgPJFtTgtK67yosmRulcrKXNWVaBRtKCVM5YKqi2RAaFFneaJbyKDMSshgP6qUVE153CpVXOr8gorsrl0qFseMeIvrZn3KF5uYdo7Rh8PSiGAMkm-rTO_arVLsBILxoLFjUe_VmC_W6hilxG-KIxiNx7PCRwxc4FWysLiA8wzfAIcGkXGLdrJS6M0i0p9xq10My7ZyiUhv_GT8NKtT58x6pq8Okf4Ra4qOT8XZ_Og9hWYSh7XJ-Efh4qJ0EZF-DxolgmpyRot9bj38-Np19Mt6iMeWST-wUmz0nb0mayv8XRujQ0VRkV13m8cP3Vr4HwAA__-OdqrJ)
---
## Friend

I hate to bug you, but this can’t wait any longer.
Here are 4 reasons why I need your support right now:
#1 **_My administration is being SUED_** by several states for the historic TRUMP EXECUTIVE ORDERS signed on Day One, so I need to know whether you still support me!
#2 Giving right now shows your support for my ENTIRE CABINET that Radical Democrats are trying to DESTROY.
#3 We’re unleashing the next GOLDEN AGE of America, and I’m going to need your support to make it happen.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: This is a PR stunt
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, Israel blocked all aid and
food from entering Gaza starting March 2nd. As of yesterday, Israel will
reportedly allow “minimal” aid which is far, far from sufficient.

This is a war crime, Peter:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250520-end-famine-gaza/?source=em20250520-36694&akid=36694%2E1203867%2EeTp9Fs ]Tweet from Kenneth Roth @KenRoth. Text reads "The UN humanitarian chief
warns that 14,000 Palestinian babies could die in Gaza within the next 48
hours without aid. The pittance that Israel just allowed won't be enough."

Yesterday, Israel let 5 aid trucks into Gaza. Before October 2023, Gaza
received an average of 500 aid trucks per day.

Now, 14,000 babies are at risk of dying without proper aid. Israel
allowing in 5 aid trucks is a PR stunt.

Israel’s far-right Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich even admitted as
much, stating aid is only being allowed in “so the world does not stop us
and accuse us of war crimes...It allows the world to continue providing us
with international protection.”

He even bragged how little the world has done to stop these atrocities:
“We are dismantling Gaza, leaving it in ruins with unprecedented
destruction, and the world still hasn’t stopped us.”

Israel has weaponized mass starvation in its brutal, genocidal campaign
against the Palestinian people. The International Criminal Court issued
arrest warrants for Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and former
Defense Minister Yoav Gallant last November over their use of starvation
throughout the conflict.

Members of Congress cannot sit idly by and look away from this atrocity.
We need to demand their attention and call on them to take action.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250520-end-famine-gaza/?source=em20250520-36694&akid=36694%2E1203867%2EeTp9Fs ]Lives are on the line in Gaza. Add your name to our petition urging
Congress to demand that Israel immediately allow enough humanitarian aid
to reach Palestinian families who are starving and in desperate need of
aid.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250520-end-famine-gaza/?source=em20250520-36694&akid=36694%2E1203867%2EeTp9Fs ]Sign on

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250520-36694-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36694_1203867_eTp9Fs&akid=36694%2E1203867%2EeTp9Fs

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36694%2E1203867%2EeTp9Fs

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108066123/546728893/646752777?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzYyNjcyMmItY2UzNS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HQqqIPVY8Wado44wwLtHvRQjqwYV27KydCi0VuY1qJw=&emci=a56b0363-b035-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c626722b-ce35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1120212) Hi there, This week, House Republicans are preparing to vote to gut nearly**$1 trillion** from Medicaid. If that sounds extreme, it’s because it is – and no community has more to lose than ours. **Nearly 70% of folks in CA-22 rely on Medicaid for their healthcare – the highest rate of any congressional district in the entire country.** That’s tens of thousands of our neighbors – kids, seniors, working parents, and people with disabilities – who rely on these programs for basic care. And now, Republicans in Washington are threatening to take that away – all to pay for tax cuts for billionaires and big corporations. It’s not just reckless, it’s cruel. You have my word that in Congress, I’ll never stop fighting to protect the care our communities depend on. This campaign is about standing up for the people who’ve been left out, not selling them out. clean_body: | Hi there, This week, House Republicans are preparing to vote to gut nearly$1 trillion from Medicaid. If that sounds extreme, it’s because it is – and no community has more to lose than ours. Nearly 70% of folks in CA-22 rely on Medicaid for their healthcare – the highest rate of any congressional district in the entire country. That’s tens of thousands of our neighbors – kids, seniors, working parents, and people with disabilities – who rely on these programs for basic care. And now, Republicans in Washington are threatening to take that away – all to pay for tax cuts for billionaires and big corporations. It’s not just reckless, it’s cruel. You have my word that in Congress, I’ll never stop fighting to protect the care our communities depend on. This campaign is about standing up for the people who’ve been left out, not selling them out. | | Thank you, Randy | = | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. name: DNC HQ
subject: re: House Republicans’ budget
body:
---
Derek, **FIRST:** House Republicans began pushing a budget with massive cuts to health care and food assistance. **THEN:** While millions of people continue to face rising costs and potential cuts to services they rely on, Donald Trump reportedly accepted a luxury private jet from Qatar. **NOW:** Democrats are fighting back — organizing more than 100 town halls across the country and working to take back Congress from Republican lawmakers who refuse to meet with their constituents or defend their basic needs. **[If protecting health care, SNAP benefits, and our democracy is worth $3 to you, we’re asking you to pitch in now to help fund this fight:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250520_3500_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3522_22930333_sDKi-X&akid=3522%2E22930333%2EsDKi-X)**

We’re not going to let Trump and House Republicans gut critical programs just to line the pockets of the ultra-wealthy. Not without a fight.
Thanks for being in this fight,
The Democrats

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Let’s not blow it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter,
Voters are souring on Trump. That’s true. His support is sliding – even among some people who helped put him back in office.
But here’s the part no one wants to talk about: that doesn’t mean those voters are flocking back to Democrats.
In fact, a lot of them are tuning out completely, and unless we do something right now to bring them back in, we risk fumbling a massive opportunity to build power.
GOTV PAC is built for this moment. We’re already doing work in places where these voters can make the difference – like San Antonio, where we’re powering the grassroots effort to elect Gina Ortiz Jones mayor ahead of the June election, and in Virginia, where we’re working to hold the House of Delegates this fall.
It costs just $10 to reach a disengaged, low-propensity voter – and every single one of them could make the difference in a close race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05202025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=Email05202025] DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=Email05202025]
DONATE $60 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=60&refcode=Email05202025] DONATE $120 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=120&refcode=Email05202025]
OTHER AMOUNT → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05202025]
If we sit back and wait for people to come to us, we lose. But if we organize like hell – person to person, voter by voter — we can win in 2025 and flip the House in 2026.
Let’s not blow it.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05202025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05202025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

# [ACTION ALERT: VOTE YES ON SB 269 AND HB 1586](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU0OTYwNjc3NTQwMjAyMzA3LFwiclwiOjE1NDk2MDcxOTA0MTc5MTA0OH0iLCJzIjoiZjE0ODRlMjE1MWY2MjhmMyJ9 "ACTION ALERT: VOTE YES ON HB 1586, HB 4076 AND HB 4535 AND VOTE NO ON HB 3540")
|
---
SB 269 by Senator Charles Perry (House Sponsor: Representative James Frank) would require healthcare providers to report vaccine and drug-related adverse events. This bill will be on the House floor for a vote on Wednesday, May 21. HB 1586 by Representative Lacey Hull (Senate Sponsor: Senator Lois Kolkhorst) would allow Texans to print Reasons of Conscience vaccine exemptions from home. This bill will be heard in the Senate Committee on Health and Human Services on Wednesday, May 21. **TAKE ACTION NOW BY URGING MEMBERS OF THE TEXAS HOUSE TO VOTE “YES” ON SB 269 AND MEMBERS OF THE SENATE HHS COMMITTEE TO SUPPORT HB 1586!** **1- Email and call YOUR State Representative**

| Use our public [House Directory](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU0OTYwNjc3NTQ1NDQ1MTg5LFwiclwiOjE1NDk2MDcxOTA0MTc5MTA0OH0iLCJzIjoiYzU2YzJmYWQxNWUyMzVmZSJ9) to find contact info for **your** State Representative. **Not sure** who your State Representative is? Click [here](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU0OTYwNjc3NTUwNjg4MDczLFwiclwiOjE1NDk2MDcxOTA0MTc5MTA0OH0iLCJzIjoiMmViOGU5MTNkYjVkNzZjOSJ9), enter your address, and look for:
“Representative [Name]
Texas House District [Number]”
_Your State Rep should be the second name on the list of results._
**Then use the linked directory to call and email.**

HB 1586 by Representative Lacey Hull (Senate Sponsor: Senator Lois Kolkhorst) would allow Texans to print Reasons of Conscience vaccine exemptions from home. This bill will be heard in the Senate Committee on Health and Human Services on Wednesday, May 21. name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: “When we are going to cut the VA, and I hope you do sir”
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108067274/546732427/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIyNmVkMy1kMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gig5y6ZTbGeBHjTc_sPNKACjChlimkTsWGYpEY3aWfw=&emci=97b26ed3-d035-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a1b26ed3-d035-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5944223)
This is infuriating, Peter. In one smug, dismissive moment, Derrick Van Orden cheered on efforts to gut the Department of Veterans Affairs – the very system that serves the men and women who put their lives on the line for this country. _**“When we are going to cut the VA, and I hope you do, sir...”**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108067275/546732428/-2087246159?refcode=em-5.20.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIyNmVkMy1kMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gig5y6ZTbGeBHjTc_sPNKACjChlimkTsWGYpEY3aWfw=) This is deeply personal to me, Peter. My grandfather was a Marine in Korea; my father served in the Army as a medic at Walter Reed Hospital, caring for wounded soldiers returning from Vietnam; and my brother served in the Navy. And they’re not alone: Over 40,000 veterans live in WI-03. Van Orden is all too happy to leave them out to dry, and once again shows us who he represents – _and it’s not any of us._ **Van Orden claims he supports veterans, then turns around and cheers for cutting the VA. That’s a betrayal. In Congress, I’ll fight to fully fund veterans’ care, expand mental health services, and stand by those who’ve sacrificed for us.** [**Donate $3 today to help defeat Van Orden and elect someone who actually shows up for our veterans -- and for the rest of us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108067276/546732429/-2087246159?refcode=em-5.20.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIyNmVkMy1kMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gig5y6ZTbGeBHjTc_sPNKACjChlimkTsWGYpEY3aWfw=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | ******[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108067277/546732430/-2087246159?refcode=em-5.20.25-all-c&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIyNmVkMy1kMDM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gig5y6ZTbGeBHjTc_sPNKACjChlimkTsWGYpEY3aWfw=)******

clean_body: | This is infuriating, Peter. In one smug, dismissive moment, Derrick Van Orden cheered on efforts to gut the Department of Veterans Affairs – the very system that serves the men and women who put their lives on the line for this country. “When we are going to cut the VA, and I hope you do, sir...” = This is deeply personal to me, Peter. My grandfather was a Marine in Korea; my father served in the Army as a medic at Walter Reed Hospital, caring for wounded soldiers returning from Vietnam; and my brother served in the Navy. And they’re not alone: Over 40,000 veterans live in WI-03. Van Orden is all too happy to leave them out to dry, and once again shows us who he represents – and it’s not any of us. Van Orden claims he supports veterans, then turns around and cheers for cutting the VA. That’s a betrayal. In Congress, I’ll fight to fully fund veterans’ care, expand mental health services, and stand by those who’ve sacrificed for us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ****=** | ****=** ****** | | ****=** | ****=** ****** | | ****=** | ****=**** Together, Rebecca | = = Rebecca Cooke is a small business and nonprofit leader who has focused her career on building community and serving others. name: LaMonica McIver
subject: I was charged by the Trump administration because I was doing my job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight.
Peter,
The Trump administration just charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight. This is a first—and it’s a flashing red light for our democracy.
I went to an ICE facility in my district to conduct oversight because that is my job and my lawful right as a member of Congress. It’s clear: Trump and his administration don’t want transparency or oversight, and they want to punish any person who dares to speak up.
These baseless, politically motivated charges against me make that even more obvious. We must stand up together against an administration that weaponizes law enforcement to persecute its opponents before it's too late. Democrats stand ready to fight back against the Trump administration’s overreach, and protect democracy and our Constitutional separation of powers.
**We need your help.[I’m asking you to split a donation between me and Pramila Jayapal so we have the resources to win this battle for our democracy. We need 500 more grassroots donations before our deadline at midnight to make sure Republicans know we won’t be intimidated.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250520-1?refcode=em20250520-5066&amount=3&refcode2=5066_420207_7UE5GT&akid=5066%2E420207%2E7UE5GT)**
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250520-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250520-5066&refcode2=5066_420207_7UE5GT&akid=5066%2E420207%2E7UE5GT)**
This is far bigger than just me—the rule of law is at stake. Our democracy as we know it is under threat.
**To ensure everyone who dares to speak truth to power is safe from political persecution, we must make as much noise and as big an impact as possible.[Split a donation between me and Pramila and share this with your friends.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250520-1?refcode=em20250520-5066&amount=3&refcode2=5066_420207_7UE5GT&akid=5066%2E420207%2E7UE5GT)**
We're in this together,
LaMonica

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250520-5066-footer&t=1&refcode2=5066_420207_7UE5GT&akid=5066%2E420207%2E7UE5GT)**

name: Bonta HQ
subject: Trump’s mass firings have been stopped, for now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
When we stand up to Trump’s lawlessness, we can win!
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250520&t=1&akid=1796%2E1088799%2EermwBR)
This is big: **A court recently stopped Donald Trump’s mass firings.**
President Trump and Elon Musk have been trying to gut the federal government from the inside out, firing anyone in the name of efficiency. But in reality, they were dismantling the critical services and programs that so many Californians and other Americans depend on, while putting thousands of workers’ livelihoods in danger.
**That’s why Rob took action.** He’s filed _three lawsuits_ to stop the mass firing of probationary federal employees, Department of Health and Human Services staff, and Department of Education workers.
Rob also joined a coalition of attorneys general in submitting an amicus brief ahead of a court issuing the TRO that halted Trump’s federal firings.
Rob’s message is clear. He will never back down as long as Donald Trump is attacking our government –**because we can win when we stand up to Trump’s lawlessness!**
We can’t let up now – especially since the administration asked the U.S. Supreme Court to step in and appeal this lower court order so it can proceed with firing tens of thousands of workers.
While Rob’s been focused on holding the administration accountable, he hasn’t had much time left to fundraise. That’s why he’s counting on grassroots supporters like you to keep him in this fight.
**[Can you chip in $5 to re-elect Rob and give him the resources he needs to stand up to Trump every time he picks a fight with California?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250520?refcode=em20250520-1796&amount=5&refcode2=1796_1088799_ermwBR&akid=1796%2E1088799%2EermwBR)**

Thank you for standing with us,
Team Bonta

name: EMILYs List
subject: BREAKING: Trump's DOJ is charging Rep. McIver
body:
An EMILYs List woman is being prosecuted for doing her job. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108067575/546733530/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE556_20250520_McIver_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1056200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjc0YTliZC1kMjM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8E0HQzTYw9rwpUrO9G4lFT45SH3kBmHmgrdjEWmHlI4=) BREAKING: A federal prosecutor aligned with Donald Trump just announced criminal charges against U.S. **Rep. LaMonica McIver (NJ-10)** , after she dared to do her job.

Let's be clear: This is political retribution. A sitting member of Congress — a Black woman, a Newark native, and a fearless champion for her community — is being targeted by the Trump administration for conducting Congressional oversight and speaking out against cruelty.

These charges aren't just wrong — they're a warning. Trump and his allies are abusing the power of the presidency to silence dissent and intimidate those who dare to hold them accountable. That's not democracy. It's authoritarianism.

We proudly endorsed Rep. McIver in her race last year because we knew she wouldn't back down — and she hasn't. She showed up, took a stand, and put her body on the line for what's right. Now, we're standing with her again — and we're more committed than ever to electing Democratic pro-choice women who will fight back against corruption, cruelty, and chaos.

[**Can you chip in now to help us fight back and elect more women like Rep. LaMonica McIver?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108067576/546733531/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE556_20250520_McIver_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1056200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjc0YTliZC1kMjM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8E0HQzTYw9rwpUrO9G4lFT45SH3kBmHmgrdjEWmHlI4=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108067577/546733532/-1686146655?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFE556_20250520_McIver_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1056200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjc0YTliZC1kMjM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8E0HQzTYw9rwpUrO9G4lFT45SH3kBmHmgrdjEWmHlI4=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108067578/546733533/-1686146655?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=WUEFE556_20250520_McIver_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1056200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjc0YTliZC1kMjM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8E0HQzTYw9rwpUrO9G4lFT45SH3kBmHmgrdjEWmHlI4=)

clean_body: An EMILYs List woman is being prosecuted for doing her job. | = BREAKING: A federal prosecutor aligned with Donald Trump just announced criminal charges against U.S. Rep. LaMonica McIver (NJ-10) , after she dared to do her job. Let's be clear: This is political retribution. A sitting member of Congress — a Black woman, a Newark native, and a fearless champion for her community — is being targeted by the Trump administration for conducting Congressional oversight and speaking out against cruelty. These charges aren't just wrong — they're a warning. Trump and his allies are abusing the power of the presidency to silence dissent and intimidate those who dare to hold them accountable. That's not democracy. It's authoritarianism. We proudly endorsed Rep. McIver in her race last year because we knew she wouldn't back down — and she hasn't. She showed up, took a stand, and put her body on the line for what's right. Now, we're standing with her again — and we're more committed than ever to electing Democratic pro-choice women who will fight back against corruption, cruelty, and chaos. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for stepping up, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Corruption on full display
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8595%2E5257348%2EDkUm0g ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

You may have heard by now that Trump is accepting a $400 million plane
from Qatar — a “palace in the sky,” as many have called it.

Trump has received a lot of criticism since, and he’s responded to it by
saying he’d be “stupid” to turn down a kind “gesture” like this, as if
this is somehow equivalent to someone holding the door open for him at the
grocery store or offering him a ride home.

This isn’t just a simple gesture,
Derek. This is blatantly illegal.
The Constitution prohibits federal officials — including the President of
the United States — from accepting gifts from foreign governments without
Congressional approval.

The Trump administration has tried to defend this move by pointing to a
memo signed by Attorney General Pam Bondi declaring the acceptance of the
plane as legal. There are two problems with that: 1) Pam Bondi has
demonstrated time and time again that her loyalty lies with serving as
Donald Trump’s personal lawyer instead of defending the Constitution and
her oath of office, and 2) Bondi previously served as a lobbyist for... you
guessed it, Qatar.

Bondi may not see a problem with this (just as she doesn’t see a problem
with any of the corruption coming out of the White House), but the
Emoluments Clause was put in the Constitution for a very simple reason: To
make sure that every action taken by the President of the United States
was done on behalf of the American people and not influenced by
extravagant gifts from foreign governments.

This very well may be the largest gift ever received by any federal
official, but it doesn’t end here. Trump’s son-in-law, Jared Kushner, is
receiving hundreds of millions of dollars from Qatar for his investments.
His sons, Don Jr. and Eric, are also receiving a ton of money from Qatar
for an investment in a new golf course.

Meanwhile, air travel in the United States is plagued by collisions and
near misses, radar and power outages, high fares, and hidden fees. Prices
are way too high. But Trump isn’t focused on your air travel — he’s
focused on his. And apparently, Air Force One is just not gilded enough
for his taste.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250520_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8595%2E5257348%2EDkUm0g ]Donald Trump is busy making deals[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250520_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8595%2E5257348%2EDkUm0g ],
Derek — not for you or your
family, but for himself. I’m working around the clock to fight back
against his corruption and hold him accountable. If you support this work,
please pitch in today.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q22025_abs_em.WLH6yo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250520_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1006&akid=8595%2E5257348%2EDkUm0g ]EXPRESS DONATE

Friend, A decade ago, Miami-Dade County was a deep blue county with hundreds of thousands more registered Democrats than Republicans. **For the first time in history, the county,****_ _with more than 2.8 million people__**** _,_ has a Republican voter registration advantage!** That’s in no small part because of the strength and dedication of Republicans across the state of Florida, who have helped turn a once-purple state into a deep red state. Friend, it’s time we take the Florida blueprint across the nation and help other purple states become a deep-red state just like Florida, where freedom, prosperity, and the American dream can once again become alive. _**I know America has what it takes to get back on track**._ I know everyone’s situation is different, and I hate to even ask you right now, but **_[could you please consider donating $10, $15, $25, $35, or any amount you can afford?](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xueo4pIteknop5I8ITmaxeb133&s=DMMHAFCDKKAMPMEL) _**

We have an opportunity to change the country and help elect true conservative Republican across the county. name: David Hogg
subject: Infuriating
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This is no joke.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250520-1&t=1&akid=2156%2E587540%2EiFhusf)
Peter, it is fucking infuriating to watch the Trump administration wreak havoc on our government and enact their dangerous, destructive agenda.
We need to be taking pages out of Mitch McConnell’s playbook that he used for years to stop Obama, to stop Biden, and prevent Democrats from passing our agenda. Everything has to be on the table to stop and slow Trump.
On top of that, we need to be organizing against vulnerable Republicans and turning the screws on them. We have to make their lives as painful as possible and line up the incentives for them to oppose Trump.
And finally we have to look ahead to upcoming elections and get behind people that are filled with rage over Trump’s actions and have a burning fire within them to stop Trump and fight aggressively for a vision of this country that allows us to have more affordable housing, better healthcare, and provides some real economic opportunity and security.
**That’s where we come in, Peter.**
**[Can you pitch in $5 to help reach our goal and power our mission to elect the next generation of leaders?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250520_1_infuriating?refcode=em20250520-2156&amount=5&refcode2=2156_587540_iFhusf&akid=2156%2E587540%2EiFhusf)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250520_1_infuriating?amount=5&refcode=em20250520-2156&refcode2=2156_587540_iFhusf&akid=2156%2E587540%2EiFhusf)**
This is no joke. _Every single day counts in the fight ahead._ If we fall short of this goal, we’ll be at a serious disadvantage going into the critical battles to come.
**Here’s the truth:** The GOP is already gearing up for the next fight. If we don’t keep our fundraising on track, the billionaires and corporate elite will keep pouring money into the Republican right-wing agenda while Democrats and progressives are left scrambling.
**But we’re not going to let that happen.** We may not have the special interests on our side, but I know that the grassroots can be even more powerful.
This goal is bigger than just hitting a fundraising target. It’s about empowering real leadership and political progress.
**We need leaders who fight for working families, voting rights, and climate justice. Leaders who will not back down when things get tough.**
That’s exactly why Leaders We Deserve exists. Now, we need your help to make sure we can keep electing the young, progressive leaders we deserve.
[**Can you chip in $5 toward our goal and help power our game-changing work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250520_1_infuriating?refcode=em20250520-2156&amount=5&refcode2=2156_587540_iFhusf&akid=2156%2E587540%2EiFhusf)
Thank you for being part of this movement,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250520-1&t=2&refcode2=2156_587540_iFhusf&akid=2156%2E587540%2EiFhusf)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2156%2E587540%2EiFhusf)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2156%2E587540%2EiFhusf)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
