name: Brent Hennrich
subject: Why I’m challenging Marie Gluesenkamp Perez.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITb17Q8KOzKF48KER49UnYah25vBYdDydiasrnMdepintBTZA59U_fr3UnQVIiczuyLthbJE4oMTcIrJF4yWlHdWhUbx-cxpf4thHk-PHD4SqRzTefxI5Wci3MQVo3DNTF_yL-ZdXShhvgV8CbZHo_FB8sZkz-RJ9PoMvSJ6qG0BPczE1pMaXnDhbYO8NBTYhMYIFooDpieMi7qZyu7y10ig/4gn/K220ViXPSxOifBEHro4hUQ/h0/h001.FihpT8LkGGFu1yV_P7HB0ZlarGAmsvDQC6xAvhub0MA)
---
Hi Peter,

I wanted you to hear it from me: I'm running to represent Washington's 3rd congressional district. In our last campaign 3 years ago, we broke this race wide open for Democrats. With MAGA Joe Kent squaring off against then-incumbent Jaime Herrera Beutler, early polling had our campaign LEADING the top-two primary. That laid the groundwork for one of the biggest surprise upsets for Republicans in the 2022 cycle. As those who followed our last campaign may know, once Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez entered the race in 2022, the vote math became a Democrat losing vote split, so I stepped aside to prevent Joe Kent from winning.

**Today, I 'm stepping back in the race for WA-03 because I've heard the calls from across our district. ** I'm reaching out to you specifically because you followed our last campaign. If you still believe we deserve a representative who stands firm on democratic values, I hope you'll join us now. **The truth is that Marie Gluesenkamp Perez has shown us who she really is - consistently siding with Trump and MAGA Republicans in some of the most destructive legislation in Congress. And staying silent just isn't an option anymore.** [**If you 're as fired up as I am to fight for real working-class values in Congress; if you believe we can win without pandering to MAGA authoritarianism, then I need you to dig deep and give generously today to help us build this movement.**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUA9IR6rQhgSMpnqIJVuAMLPHdMmi0HGZX8aj08LIVett_0oJlOp6-zDe7sAkQyvevsAXy-49_LVn6ZL3FGFabw7U_ud4B1bPFeWoVo6JRpzhBLVEEv5u44PC119cof5hOV7F0RvxaeikaY7IdD1mteF7WdelCCICT8tRN-EDBaG1yNNOgGrH37u-SsjTTl6YiprAyzxXV7_8k-25rS7U4CMQq9LLYQjiZflt4bp1ZFA1iWB5IMdzKSAhOiOoa-_KR8dP50-_Gzb8cpUtk9EnTusfkzk3esC7kN0DMlv71FFLg/4gn/K220ViXPSxOifBEHro4hUQ/h1/h001.ySyqUCaBNnexXF6Rad35XpPQHEhwHFBcxH2YvWHNCo0) Look, in 2022, I had a lot of respect for Marie and her story. As a working class dad and a lifelong Democrat, her story as a small business owner resonated with me. Like everyone else, I hoped she'd lead with courage. But we have to face the truth: her tenure has been a disaster for our district. My opponent recently told constituents that national politics _"aren 't her job."_ That's BS. National politics is the ENTIRE job of a United States congressperson. And that attitude masks how often she's sided with MAGA Republicans on key national votes. **Gluesenkamp-Perez was one of just two Democrats to oppose Biden 's student debt relief efforts**. She **backed the SAVE Act** , a GOP voter suppression bill that puts married women and millions of others at risk of losing the right to vote. **She voted for the Laken Riley Act** , one of the first bills Trump signed into law and the justification for his violent immigration enforcement. Gluesenkamp-Perez blames fentanyl on undocumented immigrants, ignoring the truth: most trafficking is done by U.S. citizens, and it's made here at home. She voted for a defense bill that **restricted reproductive care and abortion access for the women serving our country in uniform** - a vote so outrageous that it cost her Planned Parenthood's endorsement. **As a father who nearly lost his wife during a complicated pregnancy, I know firsthand that reproductive freedom isn 't a debate. It's life or death.** Let's be clear: My opponent's approach to governing is not pragmatism. It's a highly-calculated capitulation to MAGA extremism. And in the face of a growing authoritarian movement, we don't need Democrats hedging their bets. We need Democrats who fight like hell. As your representative, I will fight for reproductive rights, economic freedom, and a democracy that works for everyone - not just those with money and power. I'll stand with working people, not use them as a backdrop for performative politics. **And I will never back down in the face of threats to our democracy.** In 2022, we led early in the polls, and this time, I intend to finish what we started. But I need you with me from start to finish.
[**We can 't afford to sit on the sidelines while a supposedly-Democratic congressmember repeatedly betrays our community by siding with MAGA radicals. Please give $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help us build this campaign and reclaim our democratic values.**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUA9IR6rQhgSMpnqIJVuAMLPHdMmi0HGZX8aj08LIVett1iIO_oCpPNT9FFf2NOtFvxSVHLyAaQmlSu5xL5Ddq3jwyQGoBkVNsGs85LBRIT-OlB_ellcoFzMhkaXbx-80PNMKIJ9_OjEixmQoMUEE5wgwGsfXkUVLAGMwhKzxW3xQqnUb55e9qyWxUUaz959FyHKjLwVEk3lY8qiOQ2AuGA5vTPP3FoEPw-LMMgamkhd7jLR4fgDB9FvjdSmpodEz_P3_alGLkKwlg59IKp19eSIeEvfWQlbDWN6IE3yvVE1mQ/4gn/K220ViXPSxOifBEHro4hUQ/h2/h001.9D0zfOxNHwKGIyhbIupzMaT_7MFeWtwOuViZg8QscF4) Let's heal Washington,

Brent

clean_body: | | Hi Peter, I wanted you to hear it from me: I'm running to represent Washington's 3rd congressional district. In our last campaign 3 years ago, we broke this race wide open for Democrats. With MAGA Joe Kent squaring off against then-incumbent Jaime Herrera Beutler, early polling had our campaign LEADING the top-two primary. That laid the groundwork for one of the biggest surprise upsets for Republicans in the 2022 cycle. As those who followed our last campaign may know, once Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez entered the race in 2022, the vote math became a Democrat losing vote split, so I stepped aside to prevent Joe Kent from winning. Today, I 'm stepping back in the race for WA-03 because I've heard the calls from across our district. I'm reaching out to you specifically because you followed our last campaign. If you still believe we deserve a representative who stands firm on democratic values, I hope you'll join us now. The truth is that Marie Gluesenkamp Perez has shown us who she really is - consistently siding with Trump and MAGA Republicans in some of the most destructive legislation in Congress. And staying silent just isn't an option anymore. Look, in 2022, I had a lot of respect for Marie and her story. As a working class dad and a lifelong Democrat, her story as a small business owner resonated with me. Like everyone else, I hoped she'd lead with courage. But we have to face the truth: her tenure has been a disaster for our district. My opponent recently told constituents that national politics "aren 't her job." That's BS. National politics is the ENTIRE job of a United States congressperson. And that attitude masks how often she's sided with MAGA Republicans on key national votes. Gluesenkamp-Perez was one of just two Democrats to oppose Biden 's student debt relief efforts. She backed the SAVE Act , a GOP voter suppression bill that puts married women and millions of others at risk of losing the right to vote. She voted for the Laken Riley Act , one of the first bills Trump signed into law and the justification for his violent immigration enforcement. Gluesenkamp-Perez blames fentanyl on undocumented immigrants, ignoring the truth: most trafficking is done by U.S. citizens, and it's made here at home. She voted for a defense bill that restricted reproductive care and abortion access for the women serving our country in uniform - a vote so outrageous that it cost her Planned Parenthood's endorsement. As a father who nearly lost his wife during a complicated pregnancy, I know firsthand that reproductive freedom isn 't a debate. It's life or death. Let's be clear: My opponent's approach to governing is not pragmatism. It's a highly-calculated capitulation to MAGA extremism. And in the face of a growing authoritarian movement, we don't need Democrats hedging their bets. We need Democrats who fight like hell. As your representative, I will fight for reproductive rights, economic freedom, and a democracy that works for everyone - not just those with money and power. I'll stand with working people, not use them as a backdrop for performative politics. And I will never back down in the face of threats to our democracy. In 2022, we led early in the polls, and this time, I intend to finish what we started. But I need you with me from start to finish. Let's heal Washington, Brent | | Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington ---|--- (C)2025 Brent Hennrich for Washington, all rights reserved Our mailing address is: Brent Hennrich for Washington PO BOX 820070 Vancouver, WA 98682 We hate to see you go, but if you believe you received this email in error, or you no longer wish to receive our emails you can | | Sent via . subject: I work for people like you and me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
As the Congresswoman for Oakland, Berkeley, Emeryville, Piedmont, Albany, Alameda, and San Leandro, I consider it both my privilege and duty to bring the voices and needs of working-class, diverse communities straight into the halls of power where people like us have historically been left behind.
I’ve been an organizer for over 30 years, so I know what it takes to bring communities together, hold the powerful accountable, and demand results.
That’s why I asked my team to create a quick form for you to fill out on what issues you’re most concerned about, how Congress can better serve you, and if you’ve been affected by the Trump administration. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/y_xac2qEAUuOlWCDgNCPdA2]
At every step — whether we’re fighting for affordable health care access, education programs, or accessible transit — I know that the people closest to the pain are also closest to the solutions, and we need to use every tool in the toolbox to create solutions. This survey will help us to hear directly from the folks who matter most: the organizers, caregivers, riders, and neighbors like you in our communities - so we can continue lifting up your voices in Congress.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_las_email-25q2?refcode=x_250411_recurring_act&recurring=1]
I know you’ve got wisdom that can’t be found in any policy memo or campaign talking point. So please, Friend, take a minute or two to fill out this form. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/y_xac2qEAUuOlWCDgNCPdA2]
SHARE YOUR RESPONSE → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/y_xac2qEAUuOlWCDgNCPdA2]
Thank you for always showing up for me, for your community, and for real change.
— Lateefah Simon
